Job6:30 Ve ũsili ũte wa katĩ ũĩmĩnĩ wakwa? Kaakaa wakwa ndũmanyaa maũndũ mathũku? 
Job7:1 Vati kaũ wa mũndũ kũũ nthĩ? Na mĩthenya yake ti ta mĩthenya ya mũthũkũmi ũtuvawa? 
Job7:2 Ta mũthũkũmi ũla wendaa mũno muunyĩ, Na ta ũla ũtuvawa ũla weteelaa ĩtuvi yake:" 
Job7:3 Ta ũu nanengiwe kwĩthĩwa na myei ya thĩna, Na matukũ me mĩnoo nĩmatwiwe kwondũ wakwa." 
Job7:4 Yĩla ngũkoma, nĩasya, Ngookĩla ĩndĩĩ, na ũtukũ ũithela? Nakwa nusũĩtwe nĩ kwĩalyũlanga kũvika kũitheana." 
Job7:5 Mwĩĩ wakwa nũkwatanĩte na iinyu na tũvali twa kĩtoo; Kĩkonde kyakwa nĩkĩũkwatana, na kĩilekan’ya ĩngĩ." 
Job7:6 Mĩthenya yakwa ĩ mĩtũkĩ kwĩ mbavini, Nayo ĩthelaa vate wĩkwatyo." 
Job7:7 A! Lilikana kana thayũ wakwa nĩ mũthũmũ: Itho yakwa yĩtikona ũseo ĩngĩ. 
Job7:8 Itho ya ũla ũmbonaa yĩtikambona ĩngĩ; Metho maku makeethĩwa ĩũlũ wakwa, ĩndĩ ndikethĩwa." 
Job7:9 O tondũ ĩthweo yĩminawa na yĩkyaa, Now’o ũla ũtheeaa Seoli ndakambata ĩngĩ." 
Job7:10 Ndakasyoka ĩngĩ nyũmbanĩ yake, O na vandũ vake vatikamũmanya ĩngĩ." 
Job7:11 Kwondũ wa ũu ndikasiĩĩa kanyw’a wakwa; Nganeena woonĩ mũnene wa veva wakwa; Nganyungunyĩsya ũũnĩ wa ngoo yakwa. 
Job7:12 Nyie nĩ ũkanga, kana mũkũnga wa ũkanganĩ, Ũndũ ũmbiĩaa mũsyaĩĩsya?" 
Job7:13 Yĩla ngwasya, Ũkomo wakwa ũkangiakisya, Ũkomo wakwa ũkanyivĩsya mũnyungunyĩsya wakwa;" 
Job7:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nũũndelemya na ndoto, Na kũndĩsya na mawoni:" 
Job7:15 Na kwondũ wa ũu ngoo yakwa nĩnyuvaa kwitwa, Na kĩkw’ũ kwĩ mavĩndĩ aa makwa." 
Job7:16 Nĩngũthĩtha thayũ wakwa; ndikwenda kwĩkala thayũ ĩndĩ yonthe: Ndeka; nũndũ mĩthenya yakwa nĩ mana. 
Job7:17 Mũndũ nĩ kĩndũ kyaũ, ũndũ ũmũnenevasya, Na ũndũ ũmũlilikanaa," 
Job7:18 Na ũndũ ũendaa vala ũĩ kĩla kĩoko, Na kũmũtata kĩla kavinda?" 
Job7:19 Nĩ ĩvinda yĩana ata ũkanzisya, Kana kũlea kũndia nĩ nyioka nĩmelye mata makwa?" 
Job7:20 Ethĩwa nĩmbĩtĩtye, nĩkwĩka ata, we mũsyaĩĩsya wa andũ? Nĩkĩ ũmbiĩte nĩthĩwe ũvano wa kũathawa nue, Ũkethĩa nĩ mũio kwakwa mwene?" 
Job7:21 Na nũndũ wa kĩ ndũekea ĩvĩtyo yakwa, na kũveta ũthũku wakwa? Nũndũ yu ngakoma kĩtoonĩ; Na ũkamantha na kĩthing’ĩĩsyo, ĩndĩ ndikethĩwa." 
Job8:1 Na ĩndĩ Mbilitati Mũsui asũngĩa, na asya," 
Job8:2 Ukaneena maũndũ aa kũvika ĩndĩĩ? Na ndeto sya kanyw’a waku ikeethĩwa ta kĩseve kĩ vinya kũvika ĩndĩĩ? 
Job8:3 Ngai nĩwelelũkasya ũsili wa katĩ? Kana Mwene Vinya W’onthe nĩwelelũkasya ũlũngalu? 
Job8:4 Ethĩwa syana syaku nimũvĩtanĩsye, Nake nĩwinenganĩte kw’okonĩ kwa ĩvĩtyo yasyo;" 
Job8:5 Kethĩwa ũkamantha Ngai na kĩthing’ĩĩsyo, Na kũmwĩsũva Mwene Vinya W’onthe;" 
Job8:6 Kethĩwa wĩ mũtheu na mũlũngalu: Vate ndĩi yu ethĩwa okĩlĩte kwondũ waku, Na kũtuma ũtũo wa ũlũngalu waku ũathimĩka." 
Job8:7 O na kau wambĩlĩlyo waku waĩ mũnini, Ĩndĩ mũminũkĩlyo waku ũkaingĩva mũno." 
Job8:8 Ĩndĩ nĩngũkwĩsũva, kũlya nzyawa ya tene, Na ĩnengane ũndũnĩ ũsu ũla aaĩthe mayo mamanthie" 
Job8:9 (Nũndũ ithyĩ twĩ ma ĩoo, na tũtyĩsĩ ũndũ, Nĩkwĩthĩwa mĩthenya yaitũ kũũ nthĩ no muunyĩ);" 
Job8:10 Ndĩkakũmanyĩsya, na ũkũtavya, Na kũneena ndeto kuma ngoonĩ yayo?" 
Job8:11 Malula nĩmatonya kũmea vate ndaka? Makangaa nĩmatonya kũmea vate manzĩ? 
Job8:12 O yĩla me mathithinĩu na mate mateme, Nĩmavovaa mĩtũkĩ kwĩ ũsũni o na wĩva." 
Job8:13 Now’o iilyĩ nzĩa sya onthe ala molawa nĩ Ngai; Na wĩkwatyo wa ũla ũtakĩaa Ngai ũkaaa: 
Job8:14 Wĩkwatyo wake ũkavetwa, Ũĩkĩĩi wake nĩ ũlũalũĩ." 
Job8:15 Akaaĩĩa nyũmba yake, ĩndĩ ndĩkaũngama: Akamĩkwata, ĩndĩ ndĩkekala." 
Job8:16 Nake nĩ mũthithinĩu o na kwĩ syũa, Na nthongooo syake nitambaa ĩũlũ wa mũũnda wake." 
Job8:17 Mĩi yake nĩyĩlingĩlĩte kĩvumbu kya mavia, Nũsiasya vandũ va mavia." 
Job8:18 Ethĩwa akaanangwa kuma vandũ vake, Nĩvo ĩndĩ vakamũkaĩa vakyasya, Ndyaakwona." 
Job8:19 Sisya, ũũ nĩw’o ũtanu wa nzĩa yake; Na angĩ makathandĩka kuma nthĩ." 
Job8:20 Sisya, Ngai ndakamwĩkya ũtee mũndũ mwĩanĩu, O na ndakaũngamya eki ma naĩ." 
Job8:21 Akausũsya kanyw’a waku na ĩtheka, Na ilomo syaku na wasya mũnene." 
Job8:22 Ala makũmenaa makeevw’ĩka nthoni; Na ĩeema ya ala athũku yĩtikethĩwa ĩngĩ. 
Job9:1 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa, na asya," 
Job9:2 Nĩ w’o nĩnĩsĩ kana ũu nĩ wa w’o: Ĩndĩ mũndũ atonya kwĩthĩwa mũlũngalu kwa Ngai ata? 
Job9:3 Ethĩwa nũnũkwendeew’a nĩ kũkananĩa nake, Ndatonya kũmũsũngĩa ũndũ ũmwe katĩ wa ngili." 
Job9:4 Nĩ mũĩ ngoonĩ, na e ũtonyi vinyanĩ: Nũũ ũla ũmwĩyũmĩsya, na aiathimĩka?" 
Job9:5 Nĩwe ũla ũthamasya iĩma, na itimanya, Yĩla wing’uthũlanga ũthatunĩ wake;" 
Job9:6 Ũla ũthingithangasya nthĩ kuma vandũ vayo, Na ituĩ syayo ikĩtetema;" 
Job9:7 Ũla wĩaĩaa syũa, na yĩkĩlea kuma, Na kũvw’ĩkĩthya ndata;" 
Job9:8 Ũla e weka ũtambũũkasya matu, Na kũkinya itulumonĩ sya ũkanga;" 
Job9:9 Ũla ũseũvasya ndata syĩtawa Ayisi, na Olioni, na Kĩeemea, Na tũsũmba twa ngalĩ ya ĩtheo;" 
Job9:10 Ũla wĩkaa maũndũ manene matamanyĩka, Ĩĩ, maũndũ ma ũseng’ya matatalĩka." 
Job9:11 Sisya, nũnũũvĩtĩla vakuvĩ nakwa, na ndimwona: O na aendeea mbee, ĩndĩ ndimũmanya." 
Job9:12 Sisya, nũkwataa sya nzyĩma, nũũ ũtonya kũmũsiĩĩa? Nũũ wĩmwĩa, Wĩĩka ata?" 
Job9:13 Ngai ndakatũnga ũthatu wake; Ĩtheo wake atethya ma Laavi nĩmakunamaa. 
Job9:14 Nyie nĩmũsũngĩa ata, Na kũnyuva ndeto syakwa sya kũsũanĩa nake?" 
Job9:15 Nake, o na kethĩwa nyie nĩ mũlũngalu, ndimũsũngĩa; Nĩthĩwa namwĩsũva mũsili wakwa." 
Job9:16 Kethĩwa nĩneetanie, na ayĩthĩwa nĩwanzũngĩie, Ĩndĩ ndyĩthĩwa neetĩkĩlile kana nĩwethukĩĩsye wasya wakwa." 
Job9:17 Nũndũ nũmbanangaa na kĩuutani, Na kwingĩvya mawũkite makwa vate kĩtumi." 
Job9:18 Ndakandeka nĩveve, Ĩndĩ nũmbusũsya na ũũ." 
Job9:19 Ethĩwa nĩtũwetaa vinya, sisya, nĩwe ũtonyi! Na ethĩwa nĩ ũsili wa katĩ, easya atĩĩ, Nũũ ũla wĩmbĩta silanĩ?" 
Job9:20 O na ethĩwa nĩ mũlũngalu, kanyw’a wakwa mwene ũkandw’a mũvĩtanya: O na nĩ mwĩanĩu, ũkoonan’ya nĩ na ngũlũ." 
Job9:21 Nĩ mwĩanĩu; ndyĩsiasya mwene; Nĩngũvũthya thayũ wakwa. 
Job9:22 No ũndũ ũmwe; kwondũ wa ũu nĩasya, We nĩwanangaa ala eanĩu na ala athũku." 
Job9:23 Ethĩwa ũthĩn’yo nĩwũaa na kĩthũlũmũko, Akavũĩa ngũĩ kũtatwa kwa ũla ũte ĩvĩtyo." 
Job9:24 Nthĩ nĩnenganĩtwe kw’okonĩ kwa athũku; Nũvw’ĩkaa mothyũ ma asili mayo: Ethĩwa ti we, nũũ ĩndĩ?" 
Job9:25 Ĩndĩ mĩthenya yakwa ĩ mĩtũkĩ kwĩ mũsembi: Nĩendaa, ndĩonaa ũseo." 
Job9:26 Ĩvĩtĩte ta ngalawa ila iendaa mĩtũkĩ; Ta ndiũ ĩla ĩtheeeaa nzyĩma. 
Job9:27 Ethĩwa nĩasya, Ngoolwa nĩ mũnyungunyĩsyo wakwa, Ngaeka kũluta ũthyũ wakwa, na ngeethĩwa na ũtanu;" 
Job9:28 Nĩngũkĩa mawoo makwa onthe, Nĩnĩsĩ ndũkasya ndi na ĩvĩtyo." 
Job9:29 Ngatuwa mũvĩtan’ya; Nũndũ wa kĩ ĩndĩ nĩtethasya wĩa mana? 
Job9:30 Ethĩwa ngathamba na manzĩ ma ĩa, Na kũthesya moko makwa vyũ;" 
Job9:31 Ĩndĩ ũkandikya mũtaũnĩ, Na ngũa syakwa mwene ikanthĩtha." 
Job9:32 Nũndũ we ti mũndũ, takwa, nĩ kana nĩmũsũngĩe, Tũkomane silanĩ." 
Job9:33 Vati mũsilan’ya katĩ waitũ, Ũla ũtonya kwilĩĩla kw’oko kwake ĩũlũ waitũ ithyelĩ." 
Job9:34 Navete ndata yake kwakwa, Na kũtĩsya kwake kũtikandelemye:" 
Job9:35 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nĩneena, na ndikamũkĩa; Nũndũ ndiilyĩ ũu nthĩnĩ wakwa." 
Job10:1 Ngoo yakwa nĩkolete thayũ wakwa; Nganenga mũnyungunyĩsyo wakwa ũthei vyũ; Nganeena ũũnĩ wa ngoo yakwa. 
Job10:2 Ngamwĩa Ngai, Ndũkandw’e mũvĩtan’ya; Mbon’ya ũndũ ũtuma ũkĩlan’ya vinya nakwa." 
Job10:3 Nĩ ũseo kwaku kũthĩn’ya, Na kũvũthya wĩa wa moko maku, Na kũkenea ũtao wa ala athũku?" 
Job10:4 Wĩ na metho ma mwĩĩ? Kana wonaa o tondũ mũndũ wonaa? 
Job10:5 Mĩthenya yaku nĩ ta mĩthenya ya mũndũ, Kana myaka yaku ta mĩthenya ya mũndũ," 
Job10:6 Ũndũ ũkũlanasya ũndũ wa ũthũku wakwa, Na kũthiana ũndũ wa naĩ yakwa," 
Job10:7 O na kau nĩwĩsĩ atĩ ndi mũthũku, Na vati ũmwe ũtonya kũmbonokya kw’okonĩ kwaku?" 
Job10:8 Moko maku nĩmangwatanisye na kũmbũmba Ngalĩ syonthe vamwe; ĩndĩ nũmbanangaa. 
Job10:9 Lilikana, nĩngũkwĩsũva, kana nũmbũmbĩte ta yũmba; Na ũkandũnga kĩtoonĩ ĩngĩ?" 
Job10:10 Ndũmbonoetye ta ĩia, Na ũkatuma nĩkama ta matulu?" 
Job10:11 Nũmbw’ĩkĩte kĩkonde na nyama, Na nũngwatanĩtye na mavĩndĩ na malangũ" 
Job10:12 Nũnengete thayũ na ũseo wĩ wendo; Na ũsyaĩĩsyo waku nũsũvĩĩte veva wakwa. 
Job10:13 Ĩndĩ maũndũ aa nĩwamavithie ngoonĩ yaku; Nĩnĩsĩ ũu wĩ kwaku: 
Job10:14 Ethĩwa ngũvĩtya, nĩvo ĩndĩ wĩmbĩkĩa ũvano, Na ndũkandw’a ta nde na ũndũ kwondũ wa ũthũku wakwa." 
Job10:15 Ethĩwa nĩ mũthũku, woo nĩ wakwa; Na ethĩwa nĩ mũlũngalu, ndikokĩlya mũtwe wakwa Nusũĩtwe nĩ nthoni, Na kũsyaĩĩsya thĩna wakwa." 
Job10:16 Na ethĩwa mũtwe wakwa nĩwĩtũlasya, we nũnzyĩmaa ta mũnyambũ; Na ĩngĩ nĩwĩyonanasya kwakwa atĩ wĩ ũseng’yo." 
Job10:17 Nĩwongeleelaa ngũsĩ syaku ĩũlũ wakwa. Na kũmbingĩvĩsya ũthatu waku: Nguthu na nguthu syĩ ũlũ wakwa. 
Job10:18 Nĩkĩ ĩndĩ wambumisye ĩvunĩ? Nĩthĩwa naumiwe nĩ veva, na vaiĩthĩwa itho yaambona." 
Job10:19 Ngethĩwa ta ndyaaĩthĩwa; Ngethĩwa nakuiwe kuma ĩvunĩ kũvika mbũanĩ. 
Job10:20 Mĩthenya yakwa ti mĩvũthũ? Eka ĩndĩ, Na ndeka, nĩ kana nikiakiĩke o vanini," 
Job10:21 Ndanamba kũthi vala ndakasyoka kuma vo, O nthĩ ya kĩvindu na kyuu kya kĩkw’ũ;" 
Job10:22 Nthĩ yĩ kĩvindu ta ũtukũ katĩ, Nthĩ ya kyuu kya kikw’ũ, ĩte ũseũvyo wa maũndũ, Na vala kyeni nĩ ta ũtukũ katĩ." 
Job11:1 Na ĩndĩ Nzovali Mũnaamathi asũngĩa, na asya," 
Job11:2 Ndeto mbingĩ mũno ityaĩle kũsũngĩwa? Na mũndũ wusũĩte kũneena nĩwaĩle kũtalĩlwa ũlũngalu? 
Job11:3 Ngathĩĩo syaku nĩsyaĩle kũtuma andũ mavindya? Na yĩla ũũkaakasya, mũndũ o na wĩva ndakakũsonokya?" 
Job11:4 Nũndũ nũkwasya, Ũmanyĩsyo wakwa nĩ mũtheu, Na nĩ mũtheu methonĩ maku." 
Job11:5 A! Kethĩwa Ngai akaneena, Na ũkũtumũĩsya ilomo syake," 
Job11:6 Na kũkwon’ya syĩmbithĩ sya ũĩ! Nũndũ nake e na ũmanyi mwingĩ mũno. Manya ĩndĩ kana Ngai nũkũandũa kwaku ũndũ ũnini kwĩ ũla waĩle ũthũku waku. 
Job11:7 Nũtonya kũmũmanya Ngai kwondũ wa kũmantha? Nũtonya kũmũmanya Mwene Vinya W’onthe ki? 
Job11:8 Wĩ ĩũlũ ta ĩtu; ũtonya kwĩka ata? Mũliku kwĩ Seoli; ũtonya kũmanya kyaũ? 
Job11:9 Ũthimi waw’o nĩ mũasa kwĩ nthĩ, Na mũthanthau kwĩ ũkanga." 
Job11:10 Ethĩwa nũvĩtĩlaa, na kwova, Na kwĩta ũsilĩlonĩ, nũũ indĩ ũtonya kũmũsiĩĩa?" 
Job11:11 Nũndũ nake niwisi andũ me ũvũngũ: O na nĩwonaa ũthũku, o na ethĩwa ndosũanĩa." 
Job11:12 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũte kĩĩĩ nde na ũmanyi, Ĩĩ, mũndũ nũsyaawa ta katena ka ĩng’oi ya kĩthekanĩ." 
Job11:13 Ethĩwa nũlũngalasya ngoo yaku, Na kũtambũũkya moko maku mamwelekele;" 
Job11:14 Ethĩwa ũthũku wĩ kw’okonĩ kwaku, ũvete kũasa, Na ũla ũte ũlũngalu ndũkekale maeemanĩ maku." 
Job11:15 Nĩ w’o ĩndĩ ũkookĩlya ũthyũ waku vate kalanga; Ĩĩ, ũkeethĩwa mũlũmu, na ndũkakĩa:" 
Job11:16 Nũndũ ũkoolwa nĩ thĩna waku; Ũkoolilikana ta manzĩ ala mavĩtu. 
Job11:17 Na thayũ waku ũkeethĩwa wĩsang’ũlĩtye kwĩ mũthenya katĩ; O na ethĩwa ve kĩvindu, kĩkeethĩwa ta kĩoko." 
Job11:18 Na ũkeethĩwa wĩyelele, nĩkwĩthĩwa kwĩ wĩkwatyo; Ĩĩ, ũkamantha vakuvĩ naku, na ũkathũmũa vate mũisyo." 
Job11:19 O na ũkakoma, na vai ũla ũkakũtelemya; Ĩĩ, aingĩ makakwĩsũva." 
Job11:20 Ĩndĩ metho ma athũku makaya mbindu, Na matikethĩwa na nzĩa ya kũkĩa nayo; Na wĩkwatyo woo ũkeethĩwa wa kũmwa nĩ veva." 
Job12:1 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa, na asya," 
Job12:2 Vate nzika no inyw’ĩ andũ ki, Na ũĩ ũkakusanĩsya vamwe nenyu." 
Job12:3 Ĩndĩ nĩ na ũmanyi tenyu; Ndi mũnyivu kĩlĩko kwĩ inyw’ĩ: Ĩĩ, nũũ ũtesĩ maũndũ ta asu?" 
Job12:4 Nyie nĩilyĩ ta mũndũ ũla ũthekeeawa nĩ mũtũi wake, Nyie ũla namwĩkaĩlile Ngai, na asũngĩa: Mũlũngalu, mũndũ mwĩanĩu nĩ wa kũthekeewa." 
Job12:5 Ũsũanĩonĩ wa ũla ũthũmũĩte ve kĩvũthya ũndũ wa thĩna; Nĩkyũmbanĩte kwondũ wa ala maũũ moo matendelũka. 
Job12:6 Maeema ma avutani nĩmaunĩka, Na ala mathatasya Ngai nĩmeyelele; Mokonĩ moo Ngai nũnenganae na wingĩ." 
Job12:7 Ĩndĩ yu kũlya nyamũ, na ikakũmanyĩsya; Na nyũnyi sya yayaya, na ikakũtavya:" 
Job12:8 Kana neena na nthĩ, na ĩkakũmanyĩsya; Na makũyũ ma ũkanganĩ makakũtavya." 
Job12:9 Nũũ ũla ũtesĩ kwondũ wa isu syonthe, Kana kw’oko kwa Yeova nĩkwĩkĩte ũu," 
Job12:10 Na thayũ wa kĩla kĩndũ kĩ thayũ wĩ kw’okonĩ kwake, Na mĩthũmũ ya mbaa andũ onthe?" 
Job12:11 Kũtũ kũtitataa ndeto, O tondũ kaakaa ũsamaa lĩu waw’o?" 
Job12:12 Ũĩ wĩ kwa andũ akũũ, Na ũmanyi mĩthenyanĩ mingĩ." 
Job12:13 Ũĩ na ũtonyi syĩ na Ngai; E na ũtao na ũmanyi. 
Job12:14 Sisya, nũomboaa, na kũitonyeka kwakwa ĩngĩ; Nũvingĩaa mũndũ na kũivingũĩka." 
Job12:15 Sisya, nũsiĩĩaa manzĩ, na nĩmang’alaa; Ĩngĩ, nũmalekasya, na nĩmakulumanasya nthĩ." 
Job12:16 Vinya na ũĩ syĩ nake; Mũkengwa na mũkengani nĩ make. 
Job12:17 Nũtongoeasya atai mathi me mavũla, Na nũtw’ĩkĩthasya asili ndia." 
Job12:18 Nũthaasya syĩndũ syovete asumbĩ, Na kũmavotoa inyunyu syoo mĩsivi." 
Job12:19 Nũtongoeasya athembi mathi me mavũla; Na kwananga ala me na ũtonyi. 
Job12:20 Nũvetaa ndeto sya ala maĩkĩĩawa, Na kũveta ũmanyi wa ala akũu." 
Job12:21 Nĩwonoasya kũvũthya ĩũlũ wa anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ, Na kũleelya mũsivi wa ala me na vinya." 
Job12:22 Nĩwumĩlasya maũndũ maliku kuma kĩvindunĩ, Na kũete kyuu kya kĩkw’ũ kyeninĩ." 
Job12:23 Nĩwingĩvasya mbaĩ, na nũsyanangaa: Nũnenevasya mbaĩ, na nĩwitwaa syĩ ndave." 
Job12:24 Nũvetaa ũmanyi anenenĩ ma andũ ma nthĩ, Na nũtumaa manganga weũnĩ vala vate nzĩa." 
Job12:25 Nĩmavavataa kĩvindũnĩ vate kyeni; Na kũtuma malũalũa ta mũthengi. 
Job13:1 Sisya, itho yakwa nĩyonete ũu w’onthe, Kũtũ kwakwa nĩkũwĩw’ĩte na kũkomanya." 
Job13:2 O ũndũ inyw’ĩ mwĩsĩ, now’o nakwa nĩsĩ: Ndi mũnyivu kĩlĩko kwĩ inyw’ĩ." 
Job13:3 Nĩw’o nenda kũneena na Mwene Vinya W’onthe, Na nĩngwenda kũsũanĩa na Ngai." 
Job13:4 Ĩndĩ inyw’ĩ mwĩ atili ma movũngũ; Inyw’onthe mwĩ aiiti mate vata. 
Job13:5 A! Kethĩwa inyw’ĩ mũkavindya ki! Ũu nĩw’o wĩthĩwa ũĩ wenyu. 
Job13:6 Ĩw’ai yu ũndũ nĩsũanĩĩte, Na ĩthukĩĩsyei mawĩsũvano ma ilomo syaka." 
Job13:7 Mũkaneena ũndũ ũte ũlũngalu kwondũ wa Ngai, Na kũneena ũkengani kwondũ wake?" 
Job13:8 Mũkamwendeesya? Mũkateta kwondũ wa Ngai? 
Job13:9 Nĩ ũseo akakwĩkuũa? Kana o tondũ mũndũ ũkengaa mũndũ, mũkamũkenga?" 
Job13:10 Nde ndĩi ya ũmũkan’ya, Ethĩwa mwonanasya wendeesyo na kĩmbithĩ." 
Job13:11 Ũnene wake ndũkamũtelemya, Na ũtĩsyo wake kũmũvalũkĩla?" 
Job13:12 Mĩneeno yenyu ya ũlilikan’yo nĩ nthimo sya mũu, Maũvai menyu nĩ maũvai ma yũmba." 
Job13:13 Vindyai, ndekai, nĩ kana nĩneene; O ũla wĩmbũkĩa nĩwũke." 
Job13:14 Nĩkĩ ngaũma nyama ya mwĩĩ wakwa, na maeo makwa, Na kwia thayũ wakwa kw’okonĩ kwakwa?" 
Job13:15 Sisya, akambũaa; ndi na wĩkwatyo: Ĩndĩ o na ũu w’onthe ngaĩkĩĩthya mĩendele yakwa mbee wake." 
Job13:16 Na ũũ naw’o ũkeethĩwa ũtangĩĩo wakwa, Atĩ mũndũ ũtakĩaa Ngai ndakamũthengeea." 
Job13:17 Ĩw’ai na kĩthing’ĩĩsyo kũneena kwakwa, Na ũtavan’yo wakwa nĩwĩthĩwe matũnĩ menyu." 
Job13:18 Sisyai yu, nĩnĩseũvĩtye ũvoo wakwa; Nĩnĩsĩ atĩ nĩ mũndũ mũlũngalu." 
Job13:19 Nũũ ũla wĩkananĩa nakwa? Ethĩwa ngavindya ngaumwa nĩ veva. 
Job13:20 No maũndũ elĩ ndũkambĩke; Na ĩndĩ ndikevitha ũthyũnĩ waku: 
Job13:21 Veta kw’oko kwaku kũasa nakwa; Na ũtĩsyo waku ndũkandelemye. 
Job13:22 Na ĩndĩ ĩtana, na ngakwĩtĩka; Kana ndeka nĩneene, naku ũinzũngĩa." 
Job13:23 Mothũku makwa na naĩ syakwa nĩ syĩana? Tuma nĩmanya kũvĩtya kwakwa na na yakwa. 
Job13:24 Nĩkĩ ũvithaa ũthyũ waku, Na kũndw’a ta mũmaitha waku?" 
Job13:25 Ũkathĩn’ya ĩtũ yĩũlũkangaw’a? Na ũkaatĩĩa ũa wũmũ? 
Job13:26 Nũndũ nũandĩkaa maũndũ me ũũ ĩũlũ wakwa, Na kũndw’a mũtiĩwa wa mothũku ma wana wakwa:" 
Job13:27 Nũmbĩkĩaa maũũ makwa mĩtĩnĩ ya kũmoveea, Na nũnziasya mĩendele yakwa yonthe; Nĩwĩkĩaa mũvaka wa nyaĩĩ sya maũũ makwa:" 
Job13:28 O na kau nĩilyĩ kĩndũ kyou kĩla kĩthelaa, Ta ngũa ĩla ĩĩtwe nĩ lungulu." 
Job14:1 Mũndũ, ũla ũsyaĩtwe nĩ mũndũ mũka, Nĩ wa mĩthenya mĩvũthũ, na ausũĩte thĩna." 
Job14:2 Nĩwumĩlaa ta ĩlaa, na kũtilwa: Nũsembaa ta muunyĩ, na ndekalaa." 
Job14:3 Naku wĩmũsalukĩlya metho maku ũla ũilyĩ ũu, Na kũndwaa nĩsile naku?" 
Job14:4 Nũũ ũtonya kumya kĩndũ kĩtheu nthĩnĩ wa kĩla kĩte kĩtheu? Vaiĩ ũmwe. 
Job14:5 Nũndũ mĩthenya yake nĩtw’ĩtwe, Ũtalo wa myei yake wĩ naku, Na nũtw’ĩte mĩvaka yake ũndũ ũtatonya kũmĩkĩla;" 
Job14:6 Eka ũmũsisya, nĩ kana athũmũe, Kũvika eanĩsye mũthenya wake ta mũndũ ũtuvawa." 
Job14:7 Nũndũ ve wĩkwatyo ũndũ wa mũtĩ, Ethĩwa ũkatemwa, ũkathongooa ĩngĩ, Na kana ĩthongooo ya ũvonge waw’o ĩtikaeka." 
Job14:8 O na ethĩwa mũi waw’o ũkakũĩa nthĩnĩ wa nthĩ, Na kĩtina kyaw’o kĩkoomĩa mũthanganĩ;" 
Job14:9 Ĩndĩ kwondũ wa mũuke wa manzĩ ũkaete wenze, Na kũthongoosya mbonge ta mũtĩ mwĩũ." 
Job14:10 Ĩndĩ mũndũ nũkusaa, na aianangĩka: Ĩĩ, mũndũ nĩwumawa nĩ veva, na aĩva?" 
Job14:11 O tondũ manzĩ manyivaa ũkanganĩ, Na ũsĩ nũnyivasya, na ũing’ala;" 
Job14:12 Now’o mũndũ nũkomaa na ndokĩlaa: Kũvika yĩla matu matikethĩwa vo ĩngĩ, matikaamũka, Kana kũamũkw’a kuma toonĩ woo." 
Job14:13 A! Kethĩwa ũkambitha nthĩnĩ wa Seoli, Kethĩwa ũkanzũvĩa na kĩmbithĩ, kũvika ũthatu waku ũvĩte, Kethĩwa ũkandw’ĩĩa ĩvinda ĩtw’ĩtwe, na kũndilikana!" 
Job14:14 Ethĩwa mũndũ akakw’a, akeethĩwa thayũ ĩngĩ? Mĩthenya yonthe ya kaũ wakwa ngeteela, Kũvika ũthasyo wakwa ũvike." 
Job14:15 Naku wĩthĩwa wĩtana, nakwa ngakwĩtĩka: Ũkeethĩwa na mea ma wĩa wa moko maku." 
Job14:16 Ĩndĩ yu nũtalaa matambya makwa: Ndũsyaĩĩasya naĩ yakwa? 
Job14:17 Kũvĩtya kwakwa nĩkũsiĩlĩtwe mũvukonĩ, Na nĩwovete ũthũku wakwa." 
Job14:18 Ĩndĩ kĩĩma kĩiombokanga nĩkyanangĩkaa; Na ĩvia nĩyĩvetetwe kuma vandũ vayo; 
Job14:19 Manzĩ nĩmathĩĩvaa mavia; Kũkĩla kwamo nĩkũkuaa kĩtoo kya nthĩ: O ta ũu naku nĩwanangaa wĩkwatyo wa mũndũ. 
Job14:20 Nũmũkĩlasya vinya tene na tene, nake nũvĩtaa; Naku nũalyũlaa ũthyũ wake, na kũmwĩa athi." 
Job14:21 Ana make nĩmavikĩaa ndaĩa, nake ndesĩ: Na nĩmatheeaw’a nthĩ, ĩndĩ ndamanyaa ũndũ woo." 
Job14:22 Ĩndĩ mwĩĩ wake nĩwalasya, Na ngoo yake nĩmeteaa nthĩnĩ wake." 
Job15:1 Na ĩndĩ Elivasi Mũtemani asũngĩa, na asya," 
Job15:2 Mũndũ mũĩ nĩwaĩle kũsũngĩa na ũmanyi wa mana, Na kwĩyusũsya kĩseve kyumĩte wumĩlonĩ wa syũa?" 
Job15:3 Nĩwaĩle kũneenan’ya na ndeto itauna, Kana moneeni ala ũtatonya kwĩka namo?" 
Job15:4 Ĩĩ, nũvetaa w’ĩa, Na kũsiĩĩa ũthaithi mbee wa Ngai." 
Job15:5 Nũndũ ũthũku waku nũmanyĩasya kanyw’a waku, Na nũnyuvaa ũĩmĩ wa nzeleke." 
Job15:6 Kanyw’a waku mwene nũkũtusaa mũvĩtan’ya, na ti i nyie: Ĩĩ, ilomo syaku mwene, nikũkũsĩĩaa." 
Job15:7 Nue mũndũ wa mbee wa kũsyawa? Kana wasyaiwe tene kwĩ iĩma? 
Job15:8 Nĩwĩw’ĩte ũtao wa kĩmbithĩ wa Ngai? Na kũkũsiĩĩa ũĩ wĩthĩwe waku wĩ weka? 
Job15:9 Wĩsĩ ũndũ wĩva, ũla tũtesĩ? Ũmanya ũndũ wĩva, ũla ũte nthĩnĩ waitũ?" 
Job15:10 Ala me mbuĩ na atumĩa akũu mũno onthe me vamwe naitũ, Akũũ mũno kwĩ au." 
Job15:11 Mokiakisyo ma Ngai nĩ manini kwaku, O ndeto ĩla ya ũuu kwaku?" 
Job15:12 Nĩkĩ ngoo yaku ĩkũtwaaa kũasa? Na nĩkĩ metho maku mekũvenaven’ya na ngathĩĩo," 
Job15:13 Ũndũ ũkũthyũũa veva waku ũkite na Ngai, Na kũvulũkya ndeto kuma kanyw’anĩ waku?" 
Job15:14 Mũndũ nĩ mwaũ, kana ethĩwe mũtheu? Na ũla ũsyaĩtwe nĩ mũndũ mũka, kana ethĩwe mũlũngalu?" 
Job15:15 Sisya, ndaĩkĩĩaa ala make atheu; Ĩĩ, matu ti matheu methonĩ make:" 
Job15:16 Avukĩte ata ũla ũthatasya na nĩ mũvuku, Mũndũ ũla ũnyusaa ũthũku ta manzĩ!" 
Job15:17 Ngakwon’ya, mbĩthukĩĩsya; Na ũndũ ũla nonete nĩw’o ngatavan’ya" 
Job15:18 (Ũndũ ũla andũ oi matavanĩtye Kuma kwa aaĩthe moo, na matyaovitha;" 
Job15:19 Ala manengiwe ĩ nthĩ me oka, Na vati mũeni waavĩtĩla katĩ woo):" 
Job15:20 Mũndũ mũthũku nĩwaũnyaw’a nĩ woo mĩthenya yake yonthe, O ũtalo wa myaka ĩla yiĩtwe kwondũ wa mũthĩn’ya." 
Job15:21 Kĩlonzo kya motĩsyo kĩ matũnĩ make; Ũunĩkonĩ mwanangi akamũkĩa. 
Job15:22 Ndekwĩtĩkĩla atĩ akasyoka kuma kĩvindunĩ, Na nĩweteelawa nĩ ũvyũ." 
Job15:23 Nĩwangangaa kũasa aimantha lĩu, akyasya, Ũĩva? Nĩwĩsĩ kana mũthenya wa kĩvindu nĩwũmbanĩtw’e kw’okonĩ kwake." 
Job15:24 Ũnyamao na woo mwingĩ niũmũtelemya; Nimũkĩlasya vinya, ta mũsumbĩ wĩyũmbanĩtye kũkita." 
Job15:25 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nũmũtambũũkĩĩtye Ngai kw’oko kwake, Na kũmwĩkaa Mwene Vinya W’onthe na ngathĩĩo;" 
Job15:26 Nũsembaa vala ũĩ na ngingo nyũmũ, E na tũkalo twĩ na tũlũta twa kĩaa;" 
Job15:27 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nũvw’ĩkĩte ũthyũ wake na ũnou wake, Na kũmbanĩsya mathunya kĩnyunyunĩ kyake;" 
Job15:28 Na nĩwekalĩte ndũanĩ nthei, Nyũmbanĩ ila mũndũ o na wĩva ũtaitũa, Ila syakilĩlye kũtw’ĩka ivumbu;" 
Job15:29 Ndakethĩwa mũthwii, o na syĩndũ syake itikekalaa, O na mothwii moo matikaingĩvw’a ĩũlũ wa nthĩ." 
Job15:30 Ndakauma kĩvindunĩ; Ũmũĩ ũkoomya mbonge syake, Na kwondũ wa mĩthũmũ ya kanyw’a wa Ngai akathi vyũ." 
Job15:31 Ndakaĩkĩĩe vathei, ayĩkenga mwene; Nũndũ ĩtuvi yake yĩkeethĩwa vathei." 
Job15:32 Ũu ũkeanĩwa mbee wa ĩvinda yake, Na ũvonge waku ndũkethĩwa mwĩũ." 
Job15:33 Akathingithya etĩkye nzavivũ syake ite mbĩu ta mũsavivũ, Na kwĩtĩkya malaa make ta mũtĩ wa mũthata." 
Job15:34 Nũndũ nguthu ya ala matakĩaa Ngai ndĩkethĩwa na ũsyao, Na mwaki ũkamina maeema ma vala vaumaw’a mavaki." 
Job15:35 Nĩmaitavaa ũthũku, na kũsyaa naĩ, Na ngoo syoo iseũvasya ũkengani." 
Job16:1 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa na asya," 
Job16:2 Nĩnĩw’ĩte maũndũ maingĩ ta asu: Inyw’onthe mwĩ akiakisya ma kũthĩn’ya. 
Job16:3 Ndeto sya mana ikeethĩwa na mũminũkĩlyo? Kana nĩ kyaũ kĩla kĩkũthatasya ũsũngie? 
Job16:4 O nakwa nĩndonya kũneena tenyu; Kethĩwa thayũ wenyu wĩ vandũ va thayũ wakwa, Nĩthĩwa ndonya kũmban’ya ndeto ĩũlũ wenyu, Na kũmũthingithĩsya mũtwe wakwa." 
Job16:5 Ĩndĩ nĩthĩwa ngĩmwĩkĩa vinya na kanyw’a wakwa, Na ũkiakisyo wa ilomo syakwa wĩthĩwa ũkĩnyivya woo wenyu." 
Job16:6 O na kau nĩngũneena, woo wakwa ndũnyivaa; O na ngavindya, nĩolekelwa nĩ ũndũ mwaũ?" 
Job16:7 Ĩndĩ yu nũnoetye: Nĩwanangĩte nguthu yakwa yonthe. 
Job16:8 Naku nũngwete mũno, na ũũ nĩ ũkũsĩ ĩũlũ wakwa: Na ũmosu wakwa nũmbũkĩlĩle, Naw’o nũkũngũsĩĩa ũthyũnĩ wakwa." 
Job16:9 Nũndembũangĩte ũthatunĩ wake, na kũnthĩn’ya; Nũmbevetanĩsye maeo make: Nthũ yakwa nĩkũngũnũĩa metho mayo mai." 
Job16:10 Nĩmambathamĩsye kanyw’a woo; Nĩmangũnĩte ĩtau na kĩvũthya: Nĩmembũmbanĩsye. 
Job16:11 Ngai nũnenganĩte nyie kwa ala matakĩaa Ngai, Na kũmbĩkya mokonĩ ma ala athũku." 
Job16:12 Nĩneethũmũĩtye na andilan’ya; Ĩĩ, nũngwatĩte ĩkoti, na kũng’atangan’ya nĩthĩwe ilungu: O na nũmbũkĩlĩtye nĩthĩwe ũvano wake wa kũatha." 
Job16:13 Andũ make ma mata nĩmanthyũlũlũkaa; Nĩwatũaa kĩnyunyu kyakwa, na ndew’ĩaa tei; Nĩwĩtaa nyongo yakwa nthĩ." 
Job16:14 Nũmbanangaa na wanangĩko ĩũlũ wa wanangĩko; Nũmbithũkĩaa ta ngũmbaũ. 
Job16:15 Nĩndumĩte makunĩa makwete kĩkonde kyakwa, Na nĩniĩte ũvya wakwa kĩtoonĩ." 
Job16:16 Ũthyũ wakwa nĩ mũtune kwondũ wa kũĩa, Na ilomonĩ sya metho makwa ve kyuu kya kĩkw’ũ;" 
Job16:17 O na kau vati ũng’endu mokonĩ makwa, Na mboya yakwa nĩ ntheu." 
Job16:18 We nthĩ, ndũkavw’ĩke nthakame yakwa, Na kũĩa kwakwa kũikethĩwe na vandũ va ũthũmũo." 
Job16:19 O na yu, sisya, ngũsĩ yakwa yĩ ĩtunĩ, Na ũla ũngũsĩĩaa e ĩũlũ." 
Job16:20 Anyanyawa nĩmambũthasya: Ĩndĩ itho yakwa nĩyĩmwĩtĩkĩĩasya Ngai methoi," 
Job16:21 Kana alũlũmĩlye kĩanda ĩ kya mũndũ mbee wa Ngai, Na kya mwana wa mũndũ mbee wa mũtũi wake!" 
Job16:22 Nũndũ myaka mĩvũthũ yavĩta, Ngathi na nzĩa ĩla ndakamĩsyokela ĩngĩ." 
Job17:1 Veva wakwa nũminĩtwe, mĩthenya yakwa nĩthelete, Mbũa nĩĩyũmbanĩtye kwondũ wakwa." 
Job17:2 Vate ndĩi kwĩ akaakaan’ya vala nĩĩ, Na itho yakwa nĩyĩsiasya ũthatyo woo." 
Job17:3 Yu nengane ngwatĩlĩlyo, ĩthĩwa mũĩkĩĩwa kwakwa naku; Nũũ ũla wĩkwatana kw’oko nakwa?" 
Job17:4 Nũndũ nũvithĩte ngoo syoo itikamanye: Kwondũ wa ũu ndũkamanenevya. 
Job17:5 Ũla ũnenganae anyanyae methĩwe mũtavo, O na metho ma syana syake makasekeea." 
Job17:6 Ĩndĩ nũndw’ĩkĩthĩtye wa kũvũthw’a nĩ andũ; Nao nĩmandwĩlaa mata ũthyũnĩ. 
Job17:7 Itho yakwa nayo yĩ na mbindu nũndũ wa woo, Na mamutha makwa onthe nĩ ta kyuu." 
Job17:8 Andũ alũngalu makaseng’w’a nĩ ũu. Na ũla ũte ĩvĩtyo akeethũlũmũĩla ũla ũtakĩaa Ngai. 
Job17:9 Ĩndĩ ũla mũlũngalu akalũmya nzĩa yake, Na ũla wĩ na moko matheu akongeleela vinya mbee na mbee." 
Job17:10 Ĩndĩ ũndũ wenyu inyw’onthe, syokai; Na ndikona mũndũ mũĩ katĩ wenyu." 
Job17:11 Mĩthenya yakwa nĩ mĩvĩtu, mosũanĩo makwa nĩ matile, O mosũanĩo ma ngoo yakwa." 
Job17:12 Nĩmalyũlaa ũtukũ wĩthĩwe mũthenya: Nĩmekwasya, Kyeni kĩ vakuvĩ na kĩvindu." 
Job17:13 Ethĩwa nĩeteela Seoli vethĩwe nyũmba yakwa; Ethĩwa nalanĩtye ũkomo wakwa kĩvindunĩ; 
Job17:14 Ethĩwa nĩtavĩtye wanangĩko, Nue nau; Na kĩinyu, Nue mwaitũ na mwĩĩtu‐a‐ia;" 
Job17:15 Wĩkwatyo wakwa ũĩva ĩndĩ? Na ũndũ wa wĩkwatyo wakwa, nũũ ũla wĩwona?" 
Job17:16 Ũkatheea kũvika ivingonĩ sya Seoli, O yĩla kũkethĩwa ũthũmũo kĩtoonĩ." 
Job18:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mbilitati Mũsui wasũngĩie, na asya," 
Job18:2 Mũkamantha ndeto kũvika ĩndĩĩ? Sũanĩai, na ĩtina tũkaneena." 
Job18:3 Nũndũ wa kĩ tũtalawa ta nyamũ Na kũtw’ĩka avuku mũsyaĩtye? 
Job18:4 We ũla ũĩtembũanga ũthatunĩ waku, Nthĩ ĩkaekwa kwondũ waku? Kana ĩvia yĩkathamw’a kuma vandũ vayo?" 
Job18:5 Ĩĩ, kyeni kya ala athũku kĩkavow’a, Na ngala ya mwaki wake ndĩkakena." 
Job18:6 Kyeni kĩkeethĩwa kĩvindu ĩeemanĩ yake, Na taa wake ĩũlũ wake ũkavow’a." 
Job18:7 Matambya ma vinya wake makavivinyawa, Na ũtao wake mwene ũkamwĩkya nthĩ." 
Job18:8 Nũndũ nĩwĩkĩtw’e kĩteinĩ nĩ maũũ make mwene, Na nũkinyaa ĩũlũ wa itei." 
Job18:9 Kĩloo kĩkamũkwatya kĩtiinyo, Na mũteo ũkamũlũmya." 
Job18:10 Mũkwa nũvithĩtwe nthĩ kwondũ wake, Na kĩtei kwondũ wake nzĩanĩ." 
Job18:11 Motĩsyo makamũtelemya kĩla ngalĩko, Na makamũatĩĩa itiinyonĩ syake." 
Job18:12 Vinya wake ũkaũmwa nĩ nzaa, Na wanangĩko mũnene ũkeethĩwa wũmbanĩtw’e ũtee wake." 
Job18:13 Mamutha ma mwĩĩ wake makaanangwa, Ĩĩ, mũsyawa wa mbee wa kĩkw’ũ akamina mamutha make." 
Job18:14 Akaumw’a ĩeemanĩ yake yĩla ũĩkĩĩaa; Na akatwawa vala ve mũsumbĩ wa motĩsyo. 
Job18:15 Kĩla kĩte kyake kĩkekalaa ĩeemanĩ yake: Mũvĩlĩtĩ ũkanyaĩĩkw’a ũtũonĩ wake. 
Job18:16 Mĩi yake ĩkoomĩla ĩtheo, Na ĩũlũ ũvonge wake ũkatilwa." 
Job18:17 Ũlililan’yo wake ũkaaa nthĩ, Na ndakethĩwa na syĩtwa nzĩanĩ nene." 
Job18:18 Akalũngw’a kuma kyeninĩ kũvika kĩvindunĩ, Na kũlũngw’a kuma ĩũlũ wa nthĩ." 
Job18:19 Ndakethĩwa na mwana kana nzũkũlũ katĩ wa andũ make, Kana ũmwe ũtĩala vala wekalĩte ũeni." 
Job18:20 Ala makoka ĩtina makaseng’w’a nĩ mũthenya wake, O tondũ ala maendie mbee matelemilw’e." 
Job18:21 Nĩ w’o motũo ma ala matakĩaa Ngai mailyĩ, Na vau nĩvo vandũ va ũla ũtamanyaa Ngai." 
Job19:1 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa na asya," 
Job19:2 Mũkathatya ngoo yakwa kũvika ĩndĩĩ, Na kũndilanga ilungu na ndeto?" 
Job19:3 Mavinda aa ĩkũmi nĩmũmbũthĩtye: Mũtisonokaa ũndũ wa kũnthĩn’ya na vinya. 
Job19:4 O na ethĩwa nĩ w’o nĩnĩvĩtĩtye, Ĩvĩtyo yakwa nĩyĩkalaa nakwa mwene." 
Job19:5 Ethĩwa nĩ w’o mũkeenenevya ĩũlũ wakwa, Na kũete ĩũlũ wakwa kũvũthw’a kwakwa;" 
Job19:6 Manyai yu kana Ngai nũngĩlĩtye vinya ũvoonĩ wakwa, Na nũnthyũlũlũkĩtye kĩtei kyake." 
Job19:7 Sisya, nĩngũkaya ũndũ wa kũthĩnw’a, ĩndĩ ndikwĩw’ĩka: Nĩngwĩtya ũtethyo, ĩndĩ vati ũsili wa katĩ." 
Job19:8 Nĩwiiĩte nzĩa yakwa ũndũ ndatonya kũvita, Na kwia kĩvindu nzĩanĩ syakwa." 
Job19:9 Nũmbenete ndaĩa yakwa, Na kumya ngovia ya ũsumbĩ mũtwenĩ wakwa." 
Job19:10 Nũnomboangĩte kĩla ngalĩko, na nĩ mũthelu; Na wĩkwatyo wakwa we nũkũĩte ta mũtĩ." 
Job19:11 Nũmbakanĩsye ũthilĩku wake, Na nũndalaa kwake ta ũmwe wa nthũ syake." 
Job19:12 Nguthu syake nĩsyũkaa vamwe, Na kwĩnza nzĩa syoo inziĩĩe, Na kwaka maeema kũthyũlũlũka ĩeema yakwa." 
Job19:13 Nĩwĩkĩtye ana‐a‐asa makwa kũasa nakwa, Na ala nĩsene nao nĩmataanĩĩtye nakwa vyũ." 
Job19:14 Andũ makwa nĩ athelu, Na anyanyawa ala nĩsene nao nĩmolĩtwe ninyie." 
Job19:15 Ala mekalaa nyũmbanĩ yakwa, na athũkũmi makwa eĩtu mandalaa nĩ mũeni: Nyie nĩ mũndũ wa nthĩ ĩngĩ methonĩ moo." 
Job19:16 Nĩngũmwĩta mũthũkũmi wakwa na ndambĩtĩka, O na kau nĩmwĩsũva na kanyw’a wakwa." 
Job19:17 Mĩthũmũ yakwa nĩ mĩeni kwa kĩveti kyakwa, Na wĩsũvano wakwa nĩ mũeni kwa syana sya mwaitũ." 
Job19:18 O na syana nini nimbũthasya; Ethĩwa nĩngũkĩla, niũneena ĩũlũ wakwa." 
Job19:19 Anyanyawa onthe ala twĩsene nĩmanthĩthaa, Na ala namendaa nĩmangalyũkĩle." 
Job19:20 Ĩvĩndĩ yakwa nĩyĩlũmanĩtye na kĩkonde kyakwa na nyama syakwa, No kĩni kya maeo makwa mbonokete nakyo." 
Job19:21 Mbĩw’ĩai tei, mbĩw’ĩai tei, inyw’ĩ anyanyawa; Nũndũ kw’oko kwa Ngai nĩkũngiitĩte." 
Job19:22 Nĩkĩ mũũnthĩn’ya o ta Ngai, Na mũtikwĩanĩwa nĩ nyama sya mwĩĩ wakwa!" 
Job19:23 A! Kethĩwa ndeto syakwa nĩ nandĩke yu! A! Kethĩwa nĩ nandĩke ĩvukunĩ! 
Job19:24 Kethĩwa nivanĩĩwa ĩvianĩ tene na tene, Na kĩandĩki kya kĩaa na ĩvulũ!" 
Job19:25 Ĩndĩ ngalĩ ĩ yakwa nĩnĩsĩ Mwovosya wakwa e thayũ, Na mũminũkĩlyo akaũngama ĩũlũ wa nthĩ:" 
Job19:26 Na ĩtina wa kwanangĩka kwa kĩkonde kyakwa, o mwĩĩ ũũ, Ngamwona Ngai nĩ na mwĩĩ wakwa;" 
Job19:27 Ũla nyie, o nyie, nĩmwona, nyie mwene, Na metho makwa makoona, na ti ta mũeni. Ngoo yakwa nĩyathela nthĩnĩ wakwa." 
Job19:28 Ethĩwa mwĩasya, A! Ũndũ tĩmũthĩn’ya! Na kĩtina kya ũndũ ũũ nĩ kyoneku nthĩnĩ wakwa;" 
Job19:29 Kĩai ũvyũ: Nũndũ ũthilĩku nũetae mosilĩlo ma ũvyũ, Nĩ kana mũmanye atĩ ve ũsilĩlo." 
Job20:1 Na ĩndĩ Nzovali Mũnaamathi asũngĩa, na asya," 
Job20:2 Kwondũ wa ũu mosũanĩo makwa nĩmeũnzũngĩa, O kwondũ wa mĩtũkĩ yakwa ĩla yĩ nthĩnĩ wakwa." 
Job20:3 Nĩnĩw’ĩte ũkan’yo ũla ũnzonokasya; Na veva wa ũmanyi wakwa nũũnzũngĩa. 
Job20:4 Ndũũmanya ũu kuma tene, Kuma mũndũ aiwa nthĩ," 
Job20:5 Kana kũkĩlya vinya kwa ala athũku nĩ kwa ĩvinda ĩkuvĩ, Na ũtanu wa ala matakĩaa Ngai no wa kavinda kanini mũno?" 
Job20:6 O na ethĩwa ũasa wake ũkambata kũvika matunĩ, Na mũtwe wake ũkavika mathweonĩ;" 
Job20:7 Ĩndĩ akaaa tene na tene ta mai make mwene: Ala mamwonete makasya, Aĩva?" 
Job20:8 Akaũlũka ta ndoto, na ndakoneka: Ĩĩ, akalũngw’a ta woni wa ũtukũ" 
Job20:9 Itho yĩla yamwonie yĩtikamwona ĩngĩ; O na vandũ vake vatikamwona ĩngĩ. 
Job20:10 Syana syake ikamantha ũseo kwa ngya, Na moko make makatũnga ũthwii wake." 
Job20:11 Mavĩndĩ make nĩmausũĩte wana wake, Ĩndĩ ũkakoma nake kĩtoonĩ." 
Job20:12 O na kau ũthũku wĩ mũyo kanyw’anĩ wake, O na nũvithaa ungu wa ũĩmĩ wake," 
Job20:13 O na nũwĩw’ĩaa tei, na nũleaa kũlekya, Ĩndĩ no kũwĩkalya kanyw’anĩ wake;" 
Job20:14 Ĩndĩ lĩu wake nũalyũkĩle maanĩ make, Nĩ nyongo ya syĩko nthĩnĩ wake." 
Job20:15 Nũmeletye ũthwii, na akootavĩka ĩngĩ; Ngai akawumya ĩvunĩ yake." 
Job20:16 Akoonga ũoi wa syĩko: Ũĩmĩ wa nzoka mbai ũkamũaa. 
Job20:17 Ndakasiasya mbũsĩ, Tũlũsĩ tũvĩtĩte twa ũkĩ wa nzũkĩ na mauta." 
Job20:18 Kĩla wenoesya akatũnga, na ndakakĩmelya; Kwĩanana na ũthwii ũla wũmbanĩtye, ndakatana." 
Job20:19 Nũndũ nũthĩnĩtye ngya na kwitia; Nũomboete nyũmba na vinya, na ndakamĩtũngĩĩa." 
Job20:20 Nĩkwĩthĩwa ndaamanya ũuu nthĩnĩ wake, Ndakatangĩĩa kĩndũ o na kĩva kĩla ũtanĩaa." 
Job20:21 Kũtyaĩ kĩndũ kĩtiele kĩla ũtaakĩmina; Kwondũ wa ũu ũunĩko wake ndũkekala. 
Job20:22 Wusũunĩ wa wĩanĩu wake akeethĩwa mũvivinye: Kw’oko kwa kĩla mũndũ ũla wĩ thĩanĩ kũkooka ĩũlũ wake. 
Job20:23 Yĩla ũkilĩlye kusũsya ĩvu yake, Ngai akekya wai wa ũthilĩku wake ĩũlũ wake, Na akoonosya ĩũlũ wake o yĩla wĩĩthĩwa akĩya." 
Job20:24 Akakĩĩa mĩio ya kaũ ya iaa, Na ũta wa ũthuku ũkamũtonya mũkuthũ." 
Job20:25 Nũkusasya, na nũkuma mwĩĩnĩ wake; Ĩĩ, mũthya mũtisu kuma nyongonĩ yake: Motĩsyo me ĩũlũ wake." 
Job20:26 Kĩvindu kyonthe nĩkiĩtwe kwondũ wa mothwii make: Mwaki ũtakanĩtw’e nĩ mũndũ ũkamũmina; Ũkamina kĩla kĩtiele ĩeemanĩ yake. 
Job20:27 Matu makoonan’ya ũthũku wake, Na nthĩ ĩkamũkĩlĩla." 
Job20:28 Wingĩvo wa nyũmba yake ũkaenda; Ũthwii wake ũkaenda ũvĩtĩte mũthenya wa ũthilĩku wake. 
Job20:29 Kyu nĩkyo kĩanda kya mũndũ mũthũku kyumĩte kwa Ngai, Na ũtiĩwa ũtw’ĩĩwe nĩ Ngai." 
Job21:1 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa, na asya," 
Job21:2 Ĩw’ai na kĩthing’ĩĩsyo ndeto syakwa; Na ũũ nĩwĩthĩwe mokiakisyo menyu. 
Job21:3 Ndekai, nakwa nganeena; Na namina kũneena, endeeai na kũvũa ngũĩ." 
Job21:4 Ngalĩ ĩ yakwa, nĩngũnyungunyĩĩsya mũndũ? Na nĩkĩ ndyaĩle kwaa wũmĩĩsyo?" 
Job21:5 Nzisyai, na kũseng’a, Na kunĩkai makanyw’a menyu na moko menyu." 
Job21:6 O yĩla ngũlilikana nĩngũũũya, Na w’ĩa mũnene nũkwataa nyama syakwa." 
Job21:7 Nĩkĩ ala athũku mekalaa thayũ, Maikũa, ĩĩ, kũendeea kwĩthĩwa na vinya?" 
Job21:8 Ũsyao woo nũlũlũmĩlw’e vamwe nao mene, Na syana syoo mbee wa metho moo." 
Job21:9 Nyũmba syoo syĩ na mũuo vate w’ĩa, O na ndata ya Ngai ndĩ ĩũlũ woo." 
Job21:10 Nzaũ yoo nĩsyaĩthasya, ndĩleelaa; Ng’ombe nga yoo nĩsyaaa, na ndĩvunaa kasaũ kayo." 
Job21:11 Nĩmaumaalasya twana twoo tũnini ta ndĩthya ya mbũi na malondu, Na syana syoo ikĩtũlĩlanga." 
Job21:12 Nĩsinaa na kathembe na mbeve, Na kũtana ũndũ wa wasya wa mũtũlilũ." 
Job21:13 Mĩthenya yoo maminĩaa ũunĩkonĩ, Na o kavinda kanini nĩmatheeaa Seoli." 
Job21:14 Na mamwĩa Ngai, Uma vaa tũĩ; Nũndũ tũtikwenda ũmanyi wa nzĩa syaku." 
Job21:15 Mwene Vinya W’onthe nĩ kyaũ, ũndũ twaĩle kũmũthũkũma? Na tũkeethĩwa na ũtandĩthyo mwaũ, ethĩwa nĩtũũmũvoya?" 
Job21:16 Sisya, ũunĩko ndwĩ kw’okonĩ kwoo: Ũtao wa ala athũku wĩ kũasa nakwa." 
Job21:17 Taa wa ala athũku ũvoaw’a mavinda meana ata? Kana wanangĩko woo mũnene kũmokĩa? Kana Ngai kũaan’ya mawoo ũthatunĩ wake? 
Job21:18 Kana mailyĩ mavuthĩ mbee wa kĩseve, Na ta wewa ũla kĩuutani kĩtwaaa?" 
Job21:19 Inyw’ĩ mwĩasya, Ngai nĩwiĩaa syana syake ũthũku. Namũĩve mwene, nĩ kana omanye:" 
Job21:20 Metho make mwene nĩmone wanangĩko wake mwene, Na nanyw’e ũthilĩku wa Mwene Vinya W’onthe." 
Job21:21 Nũndũ e vata mwaũ na nyũmba yake ĩtina wake, Yĩla ũtalo wa myei yake wĩtilwa?" 
Job21:22 Mũndũ o na wĩva akamũmanyĩsya Ngai ũmanyi, Nũndũ nũsilĩlaa ala me ĩũlũ?" 
Job21:23 Mũndũ nũkusaa e na vinya wake mwĩanĩu, Athũmũĩte na auĩtye ki." 
Job21:24 Ndoo syake nĩ mbusũu ĩia, Na mũthungo wa mavĩndĩ make nĩ mwololo." 
Job21:25 Na ũngĩ nũkusaa e na woo wa ngoo, Na ndaasama ũseo nongi." 
Job21:26 Nĩmakomaa ũndũ ũmwe kĩtoonĩ, Na kĩinyu nĩkĩmavw’ĩkaa." 
Job21:27 Sisya, nĩnĩsĩ mosũanĩo menyu, Na mosũanĩo ala mũkwenda kũmbĩka naĩ namo." 
Job21:28 Nũndũ inyw’ĩ mwĩasya, Nyũmba ya mũnene wĩ mbee ũsumbĩnĩ ĩĩva? Na ĩeema yĩla ala athũku matwĩe yĩĩva?" 
Job21:29 Mũtyaakũlya aendi ma kyalo? Na mũtyĩsĩ ũndũ monanasya," 
Job21:30 Atĩ mũndũ mũthũku nũsũvĩawa kũvika mũthenya wa wanangĩko mũnene? Atĩ nĩmatongoeaw’a kũvika mũthenya wa ũthilĩku? 
Job21:31 Nũũ ũla wĩmũtavĩsya ũthyũnĩ mũendele wake? Na nũũ ũla wĩmũĩva ũndũ wĩkĩte? 
Job21:32 Ĩndĩ akakuwa kũvika mbũanĩ, Na andũ makasyaĩĩsya vala wĩthikwa." 
Job21:33 Mavali ma mwanda makeethĩwa me mũyo kwake, Na andũ onthe makamũatĩĩa, O tondũ matatalĩka ala maĩ mbee wake." 
Job21:34 Nĩkĩ mũngiakisya mana, Nũndũ mosũngĩonĩ menyu kĩla kĩtialĩte no ũvũngũ?" 
Job22:1 Na ĩndĩ Elivasi Mũtemani asũngĩa, na asya," 
Job22:2 Mũndũ nũtonya kũmũuna Ngai? Vate ndĩi ũla mũĩ nĩwĩunaa mwene. 
Job22:3 Nĩ ũndũ wa kwendeesya Mwene Vinya W’onthe, atĩ wĩ mũlũngalu? Kana nĩ ũtandĩthyo wake, atĩ nĩwĩanĩasya mĩendele yaku?" 
Job22:4 Nĩ ũndũ wa kũmũkĩa kwaku, atĩ nũkũkanasya, Na kũlikan’ya naku silanĩ?" 
Job22:5 Ũthũku waku ti mũnene? O na kũti mũminũkĩlyo wa mothũku maku. 
Job22:6 Nũndũ nĩwosete ngwatĩlĩlyo sya mwana‐a‐au mana, Na kũmavena ala ngya ngũa syoo." 
Job22:7 Ndũmanengete ala me na mĩnoo manzĩ ma ũnyw’a, Na nũmavatĩte lĩu ala me na nzaa." 
Job22:8 Ĩndĩ ũndũ wa ngũmbaũ, yaĩ na nthĩ; Na mũndũ wĩ ndaĩa, nake nĩwamĩtũaa." 
Job22:9 Nĩwũmbũũkĩtye aka ndiwa me athei, Na moko ma ala makw’ĩĩwe nĩ aaĩthe nĩmatũlĩtwe." 
Job22:10 Kwondũ wa ũu itei nikũthyũlũlũkaa, Na w’ĩa wa kĩthũlũmũko nũkũthĩnasya," 
Job22:11 O na kĩvindu, na ndũtonya kwona, Na manzĩ maingĩ nĩmakũvw’ĩkaa." 
Job22:12 Ngai nde ũtũlunĩ wa ĩtu? Na sisya ũasa wa ndata, kũla syĩng’ũthĩte!" 
Job22:13 Naku wĩasya, Ngai esĩ kyaũ? Nũtonya kũsila asiĩlyĩ kĩvindu kya ngokomi?" 
Job22:14 Mathweo makamu nĩ kĩvw’ĩki kyake, na kwondũ wa ũu ndonaa; Na akinyaa kĩlingenĩ kya ĩtu." 
Job22:15 Ũkakwataa nzĩa ngũũ Ĩla andũ athũku makinyĩle? 
Job22:16 Ala mavulilw’e ĩvinda yoo yĩtanavika, Ala wambĩlĩlyo woo woonoiw’e ta kalũsĩ," 
Job22:17 Ala mamwĩie Ngai, Uma vala tũĩ; Na, Mwene Vinya W’onthe atonya kũtwĩka ata?" 
Job22:18 Ĩndĩ ausũsya nyũmba syoo na syĩndũ nzeo: Ĩndĩ ũtao wa ala athũku wĩ kũasa nakwa. 
Job22:19 Ala alũngalu moona ũu, na nĩmeũtana; Na ala mate na ĩvĩtyo mamathekeea mũno," 
Job22:20 Makyasya, Nĩ w’o ala matũkĩlĩĩle nĩmavetetwe, Na ũtialo woo nũminĩtwe nĩ mwaki." 
Job22:21 Manyana yu nake, na ĩthĩwa na mũuo: Kwondũ wa ũu ũseo ũkooka kwaku." 
Job22:22 Osa, nĩngũkwĩsũva, mĩao kuma kanyw’anĩ wake, Nokia ndeto syake ngoonĩ yaku." 
Job22:23 Ethĩwa wĩmũsyokea Mwene Vinya W’onthe ũkaakwa, Ethĩwa wĩveta kũasa ũla ũte ũlũngalu maeemanĩ maku." 
Job22:24 Na ia ũthwii waku kĩtoonĩ, Na thaavu wa Ovilu katĩ wa mavia me tũlũsĩnĩ;" 
Job22:25 Na Mwene Vinya W’onthe akeethĩawa ũthwii waku, Na vetha wĩ vata mũno kwaku." 
Job22:26 Nũndũ nĩvo ũketanĩthĩsya nthĩnĩ wa Mwene Vinya W’onthe, Na ũkamũkĩlĩlya Ngai ũthyũ waku." 
Job22:27 Ũkamũvoyaa, nake akakwĩthukĩĩasya; Naku ũkeanĩasya mawĩvĩto maku." 
Job22:28 O na ũkatw’a ũndũ, na ũkalũlũmĩlw’a kwaku; Na kyeni kĩkakeneeaa mĩendele yaku." 
Job22:29 Yĩla makakwĩkya nthĩ, ũkasya, Kwĩ kũkĩla; Na mũndũ wĩ na wĩnyivyo akamũtangĩĩa." 
Job22:30 Akamũvonokya ũla wĩ na ĩvĩtyo: Ĩĩ, akavonokw’a kwondũ wa ũtheu wa moko maku." 
Job23:1 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa na asya," 
Job23:2 O na ũmũnthĩ mũnyungunyĩsyo wakwa wĩ na ũlei: Ĩkũna yakwa nĩ ĩito kwĩ kũluma kwakwa. 
Job23:3 A! Kethĩwa nĩnĩsĩ vala ndonya kũmwona! Kethĩwa nĩmbika o kĩvĩlanĩ kyake! 
Job23:4 Ngethĩwa ngia ũvoo wakwa ũatianĩe mbee wake, Na kusũsya kanyw’a wakwa na ngananĩo." 
Job23:5 Ngethĩwa ngĩmanya ndeto ila wĩnzũngĩa, Na kũmanya ũla wĩndavya." 
Job23:6 Akakĩlan’ya vinya nakwa ũnenenĩ wa vinya wake? Aiee; ĩndĩ akambĩthukĩĩsya. 
Job23:7 Vo ũla mũlũngalu akethĩwa atonya kũsũanĩa nake; Kwondũ wa ũu ngethĩwa nĩvonokete tene na tene kuma kwa mũsili wakwa. 
Job23:8 Sisya, nĩendaa mbee, ĩndĩ nde vo; Na nĩsyokaa na ĩtina, ĩndĩ nditonya kũmwona;" 
Job23:9 Nĩendaa kw’okonĩ kwa aka, yĩla ũtethasya wĩa, ĩndĩ nditonya kũmwona; Evithaa ngalĩ ya kw’oko kwa aũme, nĩ kana ndikamwone." 
Job23:10 Ĩndĩ nake nĩwĩsĩ nzĩa ĩla nĩendaa nayo; Yĩla wĩmina kũndata, ngauma ta thaavu." 
Job23:11 Ũnyaĩĩ wakwa nũkwatĩte matambya make; Nzĩa yake nĩnĩmĩkwatĩte, na ndyaaelelũka." 
Job23:12 Ndinasyoka na ĩtina na kũtia mĩao ya ilomo syake; Niĩte ndeto sya kanyw’a wake kũvĩtũka lĩu wakwa ũla wĩ vata. 
Job23:13 Ĩndĩ e na kĩlilikano kĩmwe, na nũũ ũtonya kũmũthyũũa? Na ũndũ ngoo yake yendaa, now’o wĩkaa." 
Job23:14 Nũndũ nĩwĩanĩasya ũla ũtw’ĩtwe kwondũ wakwa: Na maũndũ maingĩ ta asu me nake. 
Job23:15 Kwondũ wa ũu nĩtelemetwe mũno nĩ mbee wake; Yĩla ngũsũanĩa, nĩngũmũkĩa." 
Job23:16 Nũndũ Ngaĩ nũtumĩte ngoo yakwa ĩthelekela, Na Mwene Vinya W’onthe nũndelemetye mũno;" 
Job23:17 Nũndũ ndyaavetwa kĩvindu kĩtanoka, O nake ndaavw’ĩka ũthyũ wakwa ndikone kĩvindu kya ngokomi." 
Job24:1 Nĩkĩ mavinda mayiĩtw’e nĩ Mwene Vinya W’onthe? Na nĩkĩ ala mamwĩsĩ matyonaa mĩthenya yake? 
Job24:2 Nĩvo maĩ amwe ala makũĩĩasya syambo sya mĩvaka; Nĩmavutanaa ndĩthya sya mbũi na malondu, na kwiĩthya." 
Job24:3 Nĩmatavaa ĩng’oi ya ala makw’ĩĩwe nĩ aaĩthe; Nĩmosaa ng’ombe ya mũndũ mũka ndiwa yĩthĩwe ngwatĩlĩlyo. 
Job24:4 Nĩmathũkasya athĩni maume nzĩanĩ: Ngya syonthe sya nthĩ nĩsyĩvithaa. 
Job24:5 Sisya, ta mang’oi ma kĩthekanĩ me yalatanĩ Nĩmaumaalaa maende wĩanĩ woo, makĩmantha lĩu na kĩthing’ĩĩsyo; Weũ nũmanengae lĩu kwondũ wa syana syoo." 
Job24:6 Nĩmakethaa lĩu woo mũũndanĩ; Na nĩmethĩanasya ngethanĩ ya mĩsavivũ ya ala athũku. 
Job24:7 Nĩmakomaa ũtukũ w’onthe me athei mate na ngũa, Na mate na kya kwĩvw’ĩka mbevonĩ." 
Job24:8 Me na ũthithu wa mĩono ya mbua ya iĩmanĩ, Na kwĩyaĩanĩsya na ĩvia nũndũ kũti wĩvitho." 
Job24:9 Nĩvo maĩ ala makusasya ala makw’ĩĩwe nĩ aaĩthe kũmaumya nondonĩ, Na kwosa ngwatĩlĩlyo kwa ngya;" 
Job24:10 Na kwondũ wa ũu niendaa syĩ nthei ite na ngũa, Na nũndũ wa kwĩthĩwa na nzaa nikuaa syove sya ngetha." 
Job24:11 Niseũvasya mauta me nthĩnĩ wa maũvai ma andũ asu; Nikinyangĩaa nzavivũ iangĩonĩ syoo, na kũthĩnw’a nĩ waũni." 
Job24:12 Andũ nĩmalumaa me ndũanĩ yĩ andũ aingĩ, Na ngoo ya ũla mũkite nĩkayaa: Ĩndĩ Ngai ndasiasya ũtumanu ũsu." 
Job24:13 Asu nĩ ma ala mang’endeaa kyeni; Matyĩsĩ nzĩa syakyo, Kana kwĩkalaa nzĩanĩ syakyo." 
Job24:14 Mũaani nĩwũkĩlaa kwĩ w’oa; Nĩwũaaa ngya na athĩni; Na ũtukũ nĩ ta kĩng’ei. 
Job24:15 O na itho ya kĩlaalai nĩyeteelaa ũmithi, Kĩkyasya, Vati itho yĩkambona: Na kĩialyũlanga ũthyũ wakyo." 
Job24:16 Kĩvindunĩ nĩmavũthũaa nyũmba: Nĩmevingĩa mũthenya; Matyĩsĩ kyeni. 
Job24:17 Nũndũ kĩoko kwa asu onthe nĩ ta kĩvindu kya ngokomi; Nũndũ nĩmesĩ motĩsyo ma kĩvindu kya ngokomi. 
Job24:18 Nĩmavĩtaa mĩtũkĩ ĩũlũ wa manzĩ; Kĩanda kyoo nĩkĩumanĩwe nthĩ: Matyathũkĩlaa nzĩanĩ yĩ mĩũnda ya mĩsavivũ. 
Job24:19 Mũnyao na muutĩa niminaa manzĩ ma ĩa: Now’o Seoli vamekaa ala mavĩtĩtye. 
Job24:20 Ĩvu yĩkamũla; Kĩinyu kĩkamũya na mũyo; Ndakalilikanwa ĩngĩ; Na ũla ũte ũlũngalu ũkatũlwa ta mũtĩ. 
Job24:21 Nũminaa ngũngũ ĩla ĩtasyaaa, Na ndamwĩkaa mesa mũndũ mũka ndiwa." 
Job24:22 Ĩndĩ Ngai nũsũvĩaa na vinya wake ũla wĩ na ũtonyi: Ũla ũte na wĩkwatyo wa thayũ nĩwũkĩlaa. 
Job24:23 Ngai nũmanengae kwĩyelela, na nĩmathũmũaa nthĩnĩ wakw’o; Na metho make nĩmasiasya mĩendele yoo." 
Job24:24 Nĩmeũnenevw’a; ĩndĩ kavinda kanini, na nĩmeũthi; Ĩĩ, nĩmeũtheew’a, nĩmeũvetwa ta angĩ onthe, Na nĩmeũtilwa ta mĩthya ya iia sya lĩu wa mbaa ngetha." 
Job24:25 Na ethĩwa ti ta ũu yu, nũũ ũla wĩonan’ya ki kana nĩ mũneeni wa ũvũngũ, Na kũtw’ĩkĩthya kũneena kwakwa kũte vata?" 
Job25:1 Na ĩndĩ Mbilitati Mũsui asũngĩa, na asya," 
Job25:2 Ũsumbĩko na w’ĩa syĩ nake; Nũseũvasya mũuo e kũndũ kwake kũtũlu. 
Job25:3 Ita syake nitalĩka? Na nũũ ũla kyeni kyake kĩtamumĩlĩlaa? 
Job25:4 Mũndũ atonya ata kwĩthĩwa mũlũngalu kwa Ngai? Kana atonya ata kwĩthĩwa mũtheu ũla ũsyaĩtwe nĩ mũndũ mũka? 
Job25:5 Sisya, o na mwei ndwĩ na ũtisu, Na ndata ti ntheu methonĩ make:" 
Job25:6 Na mũndũ nata, nake nĩ kĩinyu! Na mwana wa mũndũ, nake nĩ kĩinyu!" 
Job26:1 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa na asya," 
Job26:2 A! Ũndũ ũmũtethetye ũla ũte vinya! Ũndũ ũtangĩĩĩte kw’oko kũte na vinya! 
Job26:3 A! Ũndũ ũmũtaĩte ũla ũte na ũĩ, Na kũvuan’ya mũno ũmanyi mwĩanĩu!" 
Job26:4 Ũtavĩtye ndeto ũũ? Na nĩ veva waũ umĩte kwaku? 
Job26:5 Ala makwie nĩmatetemaa Me ungu wa ala manzĩ na ala matwĩe kw’o. 
Job26:6 Seoli ve ũtheinĩ mbee wa Ngai, Na Avatoni vati kya kũvavw’ĩka." 
Job26:7 Nũtambũũkĩasya ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ vandũ vathei, Na kũsũnzũlya nthĩ vate kĩndũ." 
Job26:8 Nũvingĩaa manzĩ mathweonĩ make makamu; Na ĩthweo yĩtitembũangwa yĩ ĩtheo wamo. 
Job26:9 Nĩwiiĩaa ũthyũ wa kĩvĩla kyake kya ũsumbĩ, Na kwalan’ya ĩthweo yake ĩũlũ wakyo." 
Job26:10 Nĩwiĩte mũvaka ĩũlũ wa iw’ũ, Kũvika vala kyeni na kĩvindu ivakanĩle." 
Job26:11 Ituĩ sya ĩtu nitetemaa Na kũseng’a nũndũ wa kũkan’ya kwake. 
Job26:12 Nĩwũkĩlanasya ũkanga na vinya wake, Na kwondũ wa ũmanyi wake nũtonyaa Laavi mũkuthũ." 
Job26:13 Matu nĩmanakavaw’a nĩ Veva wake; Kw’oko kwake nĩkũtonyete nzoka ya kũnyoloka mĩtũkĩ. 
Job26:14 Sisya, ii no ndee sya nzĩa syake: Na kaĩ no kĩwe kĩnini twĩw’aa ũndũ wake! Ĩndĩ kĩtundumo kya vinya wake nũũ ũtonya ũkĩmanya?" 
Job27:1 Na Yovu aneena ngelekan’yo yake ĩngĩ, na asya," 
Job27:2 O tondũ Ngai wĩ thayũ, ũla ũvetete kĩanda kyakwa, Na Mwene Vinya W’onthe, ũla ũthĩnĩtye ngoo yakwa" 
Job27:3 (Nũndũ thayũ wakwa o na yu no mũima nthĩnĩ wakwa, Na mĩthũmũ ya Ngai yĩ manyiũũnĩ makwa);" 
Job27:4 Vate ndĩi ilomo syakwa itikaneena ũla ũte ũlũngalu, O na ũĩmĩ wakwa ndũkaneena ũkengani." 
Job27:5 Nĩkwĩthĩwe kũasa nakwa kũmũtalĩla ũlũngalu: Kũvika nakw’a ndikaveta kwakwa wĩanĩu wakwa. 
Job27:6 Nĩngũlũmya ũlũngalu wakwa, ndikoeka ũthi: Ngoo yakwa ndĩkangan’ya ĩvinda yonthe nĩ thayũ." 
Job27:7 Mũmaitha wakwa nĩethĩwe ta ũla mũthũku, Na ũla ũmbũkĩlĩĩlaa nĩethĩwe ta ũla ũte mũlũngalu." 
Job27:8 Nũndũ wĩkwatyo wa ũla ũtakĩaa Ngai nĩ mwaũ, o na ethĩwa nĩwĩyonee ũtandĩthyo, Yĩla Ngai wĩosa thayũ wake?" 
Job27:9 Ngai akeew’a kũkaya kwake, Yĩla thĩna wĩmũkĩa?" 
Job27:10 Akeetan’ya nthĩnĩ wa Mwene Vinya W’onthe, Na kũmwĩkaĩla Ngai mavinda onthe?" 
Job27:11 Ngakũmanyĩsya ũndũ wa kw’oko kwa Ngai; Ũndũ ũla wĩ na Mwene Vinya W’onthe ndikovitha. 
Job27:12 Sisyai, inyw’onthe ene nĩmũwonete; Nĩkĩ ĩndĩ nĩmũtw’ĩkĩte ma mana ki?" 
Job27:13 Kĩĩ nĩkyo kĩanda kya mũndũ mũthũku kwa Ngai, Na ũtiĩwa wa athĩn’ya, ũla mosaa kwa Mwene Vinya W’onthe:" 
Job27:14 Ethĩwa syana syake nikwingĩvaa, syĩ kwondũ wa ũvyũ; Na ũsyao wake ndũkavũnwa nĩ lĩu." 
Job27:15 Ala make ala metiala makathikwa kĩkw’ũnĩ, Na aka make ndiwa matikethĩwa na kĩĩo." 
Job27:16 O na ethĩwa akomban’ya kĩvumbu kya vetha ta kĩtoo, Na kũseũvĩthya ngũa ta yũmba;" 
Job27:17 Nake nũtonya kwĩseũvĩthya, ĩndĩ ala alũngalu makasyĩkĩa, Na ala mate na ĩvĩtyo makeeaan’ya ũ vetha." 
Job27:18 Nũnũkwaka nyũmba yake ta lungulu, Na ta ĩlwanda mũsũvĩi ũnũkwaka." 
Job27:19 Nũnũũkoma e mũthwii, ĩndĩ ndakombanw’a vamwe na aaĩthe make; Nũnũũsalukya metho make, na nde vo." 
Job27:20 Motĩsyo mamũkwataa ta manzĩ; Kĩuutani kĩmũyaa ũtukũ. 
Job27:21 Kĩseve kyumĩte ngalĩ ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa nĩkĩmũtwaa, nake aithi; Na kĩimumya vyũ vandũ vake." 
Job27:22 Nũndũ Ngai akamwĩkĩsya, na ndakew’ĩa tei: Nake akenda kũsemba kuma kw’okonĩ kwake." 
Job27:23 Andũ makamũkũnangĩa mbĩ, Na makamũtimba aume vandũ vake." 
Job28:1 Vate ndĩi ve ĩima ya vetha, Na vandũ va thaavu ũla matheasya." 
Job28:2 Kĩaa nĩkyumaw’a nthĩ, Na ũthuku nũtwekethaw’a kuma ĩvianĩ." 
Job28:3 Mũndũ nĩwiĩte mũvaka wa kĩvindu, Na kũmantha, kũvika mũvaka wĩ kũasa mbee, Mavia me wiũnĩ na me kĩvindunĩ kya ngokomi." 
Job28:4 Nĩwĩnzaa ĩima kũasa na vala andũ matũaa; Nĩmolawa nĩ ũkinyĩlo wa kũũ; Nĩmeũsũnzũlw’a kũasa na andũ, nĩmasũaa kũu na kũu." 
Job28:5 Ũndũ wa nthĩ, lĩu nĩwumaa kwayo; Na ĩtheo nĩkũlumanaw’a ta kũkũlumanw’a nĩ mwaki." 
Job28:6 Mavianĩ mayo nĩ vala ve tũvila twa savili, Na yĩ na mũthanga wa thaavu." 
Job28:7 Nzĩa ĩsu vaiĩ nyũnyi mbai ĩmĩsĩ, O na itho ya kĩvaalala yĩtyaamyona:" 
Job28:8 Nyamũ syĩ ngathĩĩo ityaamĩkinya, O na mũnyambũ mwai ndwaamĩkinyĩla." 
Job28:9 Nũtambũũkĩĩsya kw’oko kwake ĩvia yũmũ mũno; Nũkũlumanasya iĩma na mĩi. 
Job28:10 Nĩwalasya mokinyĩlo mavianĩ; Na itho yake nĩyonaa kĩla kĩndũ kĩ vata mũno. 
Job28:11 Nũvingĩaa tũlũsĩ tũikavivũke; Na kĩla kĩvithe nũetae kyeninĩ. 
Job28:12 Ĩndĩ ũĩ ũkooneka va? Na vandũ va ũmanyi nĩ va? 
Job28:13 Mũndũ ndesĩ thooa waw’o; O na ndwoneka nthĩ ya ala me thayũ. 
Job28:14 Kyũngũ nĩkyaasya, Ndwĩ nthĩnĩ wakwa; Na ũkanga nĩwaasya, Ndwĩ nakwa." 
Job28:15 Ndũtonya kũthoowa na thaavu, O na vetha ndũkathimwa wĩthĩwe thooa waw’o." 
Job28:16 Ndũtonya kwĩananw’a thooa waw’o na thaavu wa Ovilu, Kana kavila ke thooa mũnene ka nzumalati, kana ka savili." 
Job28:17 Thaavu na kĩsisyo ititonya kwĩananw’a naw’o, O na ndũkakũanw’a na mĩio ya wanake ya thaavu mũseo." 
Job28:18 Vethalũka kana kĩsisyo kĩtisu itikawetwa: Ĩĩ, thooa wa ũĩ nĩ mũnene kũvĩtũka tũvila twa maliani." 
Job28:19 Kavila ka tovasi ka Ethiovia kaitonya kwĩananw’a naw’o, O na ndũkeanan’ya thooa na thaavu mũseo." 
Job28:20 Ũĩ wumaa va ĩndĩ? Na vandũ va ũmanyi nĩ va? 
Job28:21 Nũndũ nũvithanĩtw’e na metho ma onthe me thayũ, Na kũvithwa nyũnyi sya yayaya itikawone." 
Job28:22 Wanangĩko na kĩkw’ũ nikwasya, Nĩtwĩw’ĩte na matũ maitũ ĩsyũ yaw’o." 
Job28:23 Ngai nũmanyaa nzĩa yaw’o, Na nĩwĩsĩ vandũ vaw’o." 
Job28:24 Nũndũ nake nĩwona kũvika itulu sya nthĩ, Na kũsisya ĩtheo wa ĩtu yonthe;" 
Job28:25 Aseũvya kĩthimo kya kĩseve: Ĩĩ, nũthimaa manzĩ na kĩthimi." 
Job28:26 Yĩla waseũvisye ũtw’ĩo ũndũ wa mbua, Na nzĩa ya ũtisi wa kĩtundumo;" 
Job28:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wawonie, na ootavan’ya; Oolũlũmĩlya, ĩĩ, na kũmantha." 
Job28:28 Na amwĩa mũndũ, Sisya, kũmũkĩa Mwĩaĩi, nĩkw’o ũĩ; Na kũtia ũthũku nĩkw’o ũmanyi." 
Job29:1 Na Yovu aneena ngelekan’yo yake ĩngĩ, na asya," 
Job29:2 A! Kethĩwa nĩilyĩ o tondũ nailyĩ myei ya tene, Ta mĩthenya ĩla Ngai wanzũvĩaa;" 
Job29:3 Yĩla taa wake wakeneaa mũtwenĩ wakwa, Na kwondũ wa kyeni kyake navĩtĩlaa kĩvindunĩ;" 
Job29:4 O tondũ nailyĩ wĩunĩ wa mĩthenya yakwa, Yĩla ũnyanya wa Ngai waĩ ĩũlũ wa ĩeema yakwa;" 
Job29:5 Yĩla Mwene Vinya W’onthe waĩ nakwa, Na syana syakwa inthyũlũlũkĩte:" 
Job29:6 Yĩla matambya makwa mathambaw’a na mauta, Na ĩvia yambonoeasya tũlũsĩ twa mauta!" 
Job29:7 Yĩla naumaalaa mbingĩlonĩ ya ndũa, Yĩla naiaa kĩvĩla kyakwa nzĩanĩ nene," 
Job29:8 Anake mambona nĩmeevithaa, Na ala akũũ mookĩlaa na kũũngama;" 
Job29:9 Anene nĩmeesiĩĩaa kũneena, Na kũkunĩka makanyw’a na moko moo;" 
Job29:10 Wasya wa anene me ndaĩa nĩwakilasya, Na ũĩmĩ woo uilũman’ya na kaakaa wa kanyw’a woo." 
Job29:11 Nũndũ yĩla kũtũ kwambĩw’aa, nĩkwangathimaa; Na yĩla itho yambonaa, nĩyangũsĩĩaa:" 
Job29:12 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩnavonokasya ngya ila syakayaa, O na ũla wakw’ĩĩwe nĩ ĩthe, ũla ũtaĩ na mũndũ wa kũmũtethya." 
Job29:13 Ũathimo wa ũla wakilĩlye kwaa nĩwambũkĩaa; Na natumaa ngoo ya mũndũ mũka ndiwa yina ũndũ wa ũtanu. 
Job29:14 Nekĩaa ũlũngalu, na ũkĩmbw’ĩka: Ũsili wakwa wa katĩ wailyĩ ta ngũa ndasa na ngovia ya ũsumbĩ." 
Job29:15 Nakwa naĩ metho kwa ililinda, Na naĩ maũũ kwa ala mathuaa." 
Job29:16 Na naĩ ĩthe wa athĩni: Na ũvoo wa ũla ndaamanya nĩnoomanthaa. 
Job29:17 Na natũlaa ngambu sya ũla ũte mũlũngalu, Na kumya sya nzyĩma maeonĩ make." 
Job29:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ naisye, Ngakw’a ndalanĩ yakwa, Na ngaingĩvya mĩthenya yakwa ta kĩthangathĩ:" 
Job29:19 Mũi wakwa nũtambũũkĩte manzĩnĩ, Na ĩmwe nĩyĩkalaa ũtukũ w’onthe ũvongenĩ wakwa:" 
Job29:20 Ũnene wakwa nĩ mweũ nthĩnĩ wakwa, Na ũta wakwa nũtũngĩtwe mweũ kw’okonĩ kwakwa." 
Job29:21 Andũ nĩmambĩthukĩĩasya, na kweteela, Na nĩmavindasya mew’e ũtao wakwa." 
Job29:22 Ndeto syakwa syathela matyaneenaa ĩngĩ; Na kũneena kwakwa nĩkwavolotangaa ĩũlũ woo. 
Job29:23 Na nĩmambeteelaa ta kweteela mbua; Na nĩmaathamasya kanyw’a woo mũno ta kwosa mbua ya uũa. 
Job29:24 Nĩnamasiasya na ũtanu, yĩla mataĩ na ũĩkĩĩi; Na kyeni kya ũthyũ wakwa matyaakĩkya nthĩ." 
Job29:25 Nĩnamanyuvĩaa nzĩa yoo, na nekalaa nthĩ ta mũnene, Na nekalaa ta mũsumbĩ itanĩ Ta ũmwe ũla ũkiakiasya ala mametaa." 
Job30:1 Ĩndĩ yu ala anini kwĩ nyie nĩmeũmbũthya, Ala aaĩthe moo navũthĩtye kũmekĩanĩsya na ngitĩ sya ndĩthya yakwa ya mbũi na malondu." 
Job30:2 Ĩĩ, vinya wa moko moo, ũkanguna na kyaũ? Andũ ala mewĩthĩtye myaka yoo na ĩkanangĩka." 
Job30:3 Nĩ amosu nũndũ wa kwaĩwa na yũa; Nĩmavevetaa nthĩ nyũmũ, kũla kwĩ wiũ wa vathei na wanangĩko." 
Job30:4 Nĩmovaa kyũnyũ vakuvĩ na ikuthu; Na mĩi ya mũlutemu nĩ lĩu woo. 
Job30:5 Nĩmalũngĩtw’e kuma katĩ wa andũ; Nĩmauĩtye ũkemi ĩtina woo ta kũatĩĩa kĩng’ei; 
Job30:6 Kwondũ wa ũu nĩmatũaa myandanĩ yi ũtĩsyo, Maĩmanĩ ma nthĩ na ma mavia." 
Job30:7 Nĩmekwanĩsya ikuthunĩ; Mombanĩte ungu wa syĩnyeelya. 
Job30:8 Nĩ syana sya ndia, ĩĩ, syana sya andũ mate kĩĩĩ; Nĩmakũniwe maumw’e ĩ nthĩ." 
Job30:9 Na yu nĩtw’ĩkĩte wathi woo, Ĩĩ, nĩ wa kũvũthw’a nĩo." 
Job30:10 Nĩmanthĩthaa, nĩmaũngamaa mevathanĩte nakwa, Na matiũlea kũndw’ĩla mata ũthyũnĩ wakwa." 
Job30:11 Nũndũ nũthaĩtye ĩkanda yake, na kũnthĩn’ya; Na nĩmavetete mũkwa mbee wakwa." 
Job30:12 Kw’okonĩ kwakwa kwa aũme nguthu ya imaamai nĩyũkĩlaa; Nĩmalutaa maũũ makwa maende ũtee, Na nĩmambũkĩlĩlasya nzĩa syoo sya wanangĩko." 
Job30:13 Nĩmaanangaa nzĩa yakwa, Nĩmakalaataa wanangĩko wakwa mũnene, O andũ ala mate na mũtethya." 
Job30:14 Nĩmokaa o ta kũvĩtĩla ũvũthũenĩ mũnene: Katĩ wa ũomboku nĩmembonoeasya. 
Job30:15 Motĩsyo nĩmethyũũĩte mambũkĩe; Nĩmaatĩĩaa ndaĩa yakwa ta kĩseve; Na ũunĩko wakwa nũvĩtĩe ta ĩthweo. 
Job30:16 Na yu ngoo yakwa nĩyĩtĩkĩte nthĩnĩ wakwa; Mĩthenya ya thĩna nĩngwatĩte. 
Job30:17 Ũtukũ mavĩndĩ makwa nĩmasinangĩawa nthĩnĩ wakwa, Kyalya kĩla kĩmbevetaa kĩilikaa." 
Job30:18 Kwondũ wa vinya mũnene wa Ngai ngũa yakwa nĩ ngalyũku; Nĩngwete ta kala ya ĩkoti yakwa. 
Job30:19 Nũmbĩkĩtye ndakanĩ, Na nĩnĩtw’ĩkĩte ta kĩtoo na mũu." 
Job30:20 Nĩkwĩkaĩlaa, na ndũnzũngĩaa: Nĩũngamaa, naku nũngeteeaa." 
Job30:21 Nũalyũkĩte wĩthĩwe mwai kwakwa; Nũnthĩnasya na vinya wa kw’oko kwaku. 
Job30:22 Nũmbũkĩlasya kĩsevenĩ, nũtumaa nĩkuwa nĩkyo; Na nũndweketheasya kĩuutaninĩ." 
Job30:23 Nũndũ nĩnĩsĩ ũkambikya kĩkw’ũnĩ, Na nyũmbani ĩla ĩtw’ĩĩwe andũ onthe me thayũ." 
Job30:24 O na ũu w’onthe mũndũ ndatambũũkasya kw’oko aivalũka? Kana wanangĩkonĩ wake mũnene kwondũ wa ũu ndakayaa one ũtethyo? 
Job30:25 Ndyaaĩa kwondũ wa ũla waĩ thĩnanĩ? Ngoo yakwa ndĩaĩw’a woo kwondũ wa mũthĩni? 
Job30:26 Yĩla namanthie ũseo, ũthũku wooka; Na yĩla neeteelile kyeni, kwookie kĩvindu." 
Job30:27 Ngoo yakwa nĩnĩkũũũya, na ndĩthũmũaa; Mĩthenya ya thĩna nĩmbũkĩe." 
Job30:28 Nĩendaa na kĩmeto vate syũa: Nĩũngamaa ũmbanonĩ, na kũkaya none ũtethyo." 
Job30:29 Nyie nĩ mwana‐a‐ĩthe wa mbĩwa, Na mũtindan’ya wa nyaa." 
Job30:30 Kĩkonde kyakwa nĩ kiũ, na nĩkĩmbuma, Na mavĩndĩ makwa nĩ mavĩvye nĩ muutĩa." 
Job30:31 Kwondũ wa ũu mbeve yakwa nĩalyũkĩte ĩkatw’ĩka ya kũmeta, Na mũtũlilũ wakwa wĩ na wasya wa ala maĩaa." 
Job31:1 Nyie nĩnatianĩe ũtianĩo na metho makwa; Ndonya ata ĩndĩ kũsisya mwĩĩtu mũtheu? 
Job31:2 Nũndũ kĩanda nĩ kyaũ kuma ĩũlũ kwa Ngai, Na ũtiĩwa kuma ĩũlũ kwa Mwene Vinya W’onthe?" 
Job31:3 Ti wanangĩko mũnene kwa ala mate alũngalu, Na thĩna kwa eki ma naĩ?" 
Job31:4 Nake ndekwona mĩendele yakwa? Na kũtala matambya makwa onthe? 
Job31:5 Ethĩwa nĩnaendanisye na ũvũngũ, Na kũũ kwakwa nĩkweekalaatile kũkengana" 
Job31:6 (Nyie nĩthimwe na kĩthimi kya katĩ, Nĩ kana Ngai amanye wĩanĩu wakwa);" 
Job31:7 Ethĩwa matambya makwa nĩmeelelũkile kũtia nzĩa, Na ngoo yakwa yaendie kũatĩĩa metho makwa, Na ethĩwa ũvuku nĩwĩkwatĩle moko makwa:" 
Job31:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nĩvuĩe, na ũngĩ nĩaye; Ĩĩ, ũsyao wa mũunda wakwa ũkũwe na mĩi." 
Job31:9 Ethĩwa ngoo yakwa nĩyasengasengiwe nĩ mũndũ mũka, Nakwa neteelile mũomonĩ wa mũtũi wakwa;" 
Job31:10 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kĩveti kyakwa nĩkĩthiĩe ũngĩ, Na angĩ makĩkomee." 
Job31:11 Nũndũ yĩu nĩ ĩvĩtyo yai; Ĩĩ, nĩ naĩ ya kũsilĩlwa nĩ asili:" 
Job31:12 Nũndũ nĩ mwaki ũla ũminaa kũvika wanangĩko, Na ũkakũanĩsya na mĩi wingĩvo wakwa w’onthe." 
Job31:13 Ethĩwa nĩnĩvũthĩtye ũvoo wa mũthũkũmi wakwa mũndũ mũũme kana mũndũ mũka, Yĩla maneenanisye nakwa;" 
Job31:14 Ngeeka ata ĩndĩ yĩla Ngai wĩũkĩla? Na yĩla wĩsila, ngamũsũngĩa ata?" 
Job31:15 Ũla wambũmbĩe ĩvunĩ ndaamũmba? Na ti ũmwe ũla watũmbĩe ĩvunĩ? 
Job31:16 Ethĩwa nĩnaimie ngya kĩla syendete, Kana kũtuma metho ma mũndũ mũka ndiwa maseekea," 
Job31:17 Kana naya kĩlungu kyakwa nĩ nyioka, Na ũla wakw’ĩĩwe nĩ ĩthe ndaaya kyakyo" 
Job31:18 (Aiee, kuma wana wakwa nĩweanie e nakwa ta ũkwĩana e na ĩthe, Na ũ mũndũ mũka nĩnĩmũtongoeetye kuma o nauma ĩvunĩ ya mwaitũ);" 
Job31:19 Ethĩwa nĩnoonie mũndũ o na wĩva akyaa nũndũ wa kwaĩwa nĩ ngũa, Kana mũthĩni ate na kya kwĩvw’ĩka;" 
Job31:20 Ethĩwa kĩnyunyu kyake kĩtyaangathima, Na ethĩwa nake ndaaĩkĩwa muutĩa nĩ w’ĩa wa malondu makwa;" 
Job31:21 Ethĩwa nĩnĩmũkĩlĩĩlye ũla wakw’ĩĩwe nĩ ĩthe kw’oko kwakwa, Nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩnoonie ũtethyo wakwa mbingĩlonĩ:" 
Job31:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kĩtuo kyakwa kĩkavũkĩle kĩkombenĩ kya kĩtuo, Na kw’oko kwakwa nĩkũtũlĩkĩle ĩvĩndĩnĩ." 
Job31:23 Nũndũ wanangĩko mũnene wumĩte kwa Ngai nĩ ũtĩsyo kwakwa, Na kwondũ wa ũnene wake nditonya kwĩka ũndũ." 
Job31:24 Ethĩwa ndw’ĩte thaavu wĩkwatyo wakwa, Na kũtavya thaavu mũseo, Nue ũĩkĩĩi wakwa;" 
Job31:25 Ethĩwa nĩnatanie nũndũ wa ũthwii wakwa kwingĩva, Na nĩkwĩthĩwa kw’oko kwakwa nĩkwosie mwingĩ;" 
Job31:26 Ethĩwa nĩnasiisye syũa yĩla yatisaa, Kana mwei ũkĩendeea ũtisunĩ," 
Job31:27 Na ngoo yakwa yasengasengwa na kĩmbithĩ, Na kanyw’a wakwa wamumunya kw’oko kwakwa:" 
Job31:28 Ĩsu nayo nĩ naĩ ya kũsilĩlwa nĩ asili; Nũndũ nĩthĩwa nakaĩa Ngai ũla wĩ ĩũlũ. 
Job31:29 Ethĩwa nĩnĩtanie nũndũ wa wanangĩko wa ũla wamenie, Kana kwĩyũkĩlya yĩla ũthũku wamũkwatie" 
Job31:30 (Ĩĩ, ndyaaeka kanyw’a wakwa wĩke naĩ Kwondũ wa kwĩtya thayũ wake na kĩumo);" 
Job31:31 Ethĩwa andũ ma ĩeema yakwa matyaasya, Nũũ ũtonya kwona ũmwe ũla ũtaavũnw’a nĩ nyama syake?" 
Job31:32 (Mwĩkali wa ũeni ndaakoma nzĩanĩ nene; Ĩndĩ nĩnamũvingũĩaa mũendi wa kyalo mĩomo yakwa); 
Job31:33 Ethĩwa ta Atamu nĩnavw’ĩkie mavĩtyo makwa, Kwondũ wa kũvitha naĩ yakwa kĩthũinĩ kyakwa," 
Job31:34 Nũndũ nĩnakĩie wingĩ wa andũ, Na kĩvũthya kya mĩvĩa ya andũ nĩkyandĩsisye, Na ĩndĩ navindya, na ndyaaumaala mũomonĩ—" 
Job31:35 A! Kethĩwa nĩ na ũmwe wa kũmbĩthukĩĩsya! (Sisya, saii wakwa nĩ ũũ, Mwene Vinya W’onthe nanzũngĩe) Na kethĩwa nĩ na ũvingan’yo ũla nthũ yakwa ĩandĩkĩte!" 
Job31:36 Vate ndĩi nĩũkua kĩtuonĩ kyakwa; Nĩwoveea kwakwa ta ngovia ya ũsumbĩ: 
Job31:37 Nĩmũtavya ũtalo wa matambya makwa; Nĩmũthengeea ta mũnene wĩ mbee ũsumbĩnĩ. 
Job31:38 Ethĩwa nthĩ yakwa nĩnĩũndonzanĩlya, Na mĩkao yayo kũĩa vamwe;" 
Job31:39 Ethĩwa nĩnaĩe mosyao mayo vate mbesa, Kana nĩnatumie ene mayo masya thayũ woo:" 
Job31:40 Thangila nimee vandũ va nganũ, Na maia mathũku vandũ va mbaale. Ndeto sya Yovu nĩsyathela." 
Job32:1 Na ĩndĩ andũ asu atatũ nĩmaekie kũsũngĩa Yovu, nũndũ aĩ mũlũngalu methonĩ make mwene." 
Job32:2 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũthilĩku wa Eliu mwana wa Mbalakeli Mũvusi, wa mũvĩa wa Lamu, wakanie: ũthilĩku wake wamwakanĩa Yovu, nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩwetalile mwene mũlũngalu kwĩ kũtalĩla Ngai ũlũngalu." 
Job32:3 O na ĩngĩ ũthilĩku wake wamakanĩa anyanyae make atatũ, nĩkwĩthĩwa matyaĩ na ũsũngĩo, ĩndĩ matw’a Yovu nĩ mũvĩtan’ya." 
Job32:4 Eliu aĩ aneteela kũneena na Yovu, nĩkwĩthĩwa asu maĩ akũũ kwĩ we." 
Job32:5 Na yĩla Eliu wonie kana vati ũsungĩo kanyw’anĩ wa andũ asu atatũ, ũthilĩku wake wakana." 
Job32:6 Na Eliu mwana wa Mbalakeli asũngĩa na asya, Nyie nĩ mũnini, na inyw’ĩ mwĩ akũũ mũno; Kwondũ wa ũu nĩneesiĩĩe, na nakĩa kũmwon’ya ũndũ ngwona." 
Job32:7 Naisye, Mĩthenya nĩyaĩle kũneena, Na wingĩ wa myaka nĩwaĩle kũmanyĩsya ũĩ." 
Job32:8 Ĩndĩ kwĩ veva nthĩnĩ wa mũndũ, Na mĩvevo ya Mwene Vinya W’onthe nĩmanengae ũmanyi." 
Job32:9 Ti ala anene me na ũĩ, Kana akũũ ala mamanyaa ũsili wa katĩ." 
Job32:10 Kwondũ wa ũu nasya, Mbĩthukĩĩsyai; Nakwa ngoonan’ya ũndũ ngwona." 
Job32:11 Sisyai, nĩneteelile ndeto syenyu, Neethukĩĩsya nĩw’e mosũanĩo menyu, Yĩla mũũmanthaa ũndũ wa kũneena." 
Job32:12 Ĩĩ, nĩnĩmwĩthukĩĩsye, Na, sisyai, vatyaĩ waamwĩtĩkĩlĩthya Yovu, Kana ũla wasũngĩie ndeto syake, katĩ wenyu." 
Job32:13 Ĩsũvĩei mũtikese kũneena, Nĩtwonete ũĩ; Ngai nũtonya kũmũkĩlya vinya, ti mũndũ:" 
Job32:14 Nũndũ ndaambelekelya ndeto syake; O nakwa ndikamũsũngĩa na ndeto syenyu. 
Job32:15 Nĩmeũseng’a, matisũngĩa ĩngĩ: Mati na ndeto ya kũneena." 
Job32:16 Nakwa ngeeteela, nũndũ matiũneena, Nũndũ maũngeme, na matikũsũngĩa ĩngĩ?" 
Job32:17 Nakwa nĩngũsũngĩa ngalĩ ĩ yakwa, O nakwa ngoonan’ya ũndũ ngwona." 
Job32:18 Nũndũ nĩ mũsũu ndeto; Nĩngũthing’ĩĩw’a nĩ veva nthĩnĩ wakwa. 
Job32:19 Sisyai, kĩthũi kyakwa nĩ ta mbinyu ĩte na ũmĩlo; Ta tũthatwa tweũ twa mbinyu tũla tũkilyĩ kwatũka." 
Job32:20 Nakwa nĩngũneena, nĩ kana nĩvuũkw’e; Ngatumũkya ilomo syakwa na kũsũngĩa." 
Job32:21 Nĩngũmwĩsũva, ndikone mũndũ ta kĩndũ; O na ndikamũnenga mũndũ o na wĩva masyĩtwa ma ũmũkathĩĩa." 
Job32:22 Nũndũ ndyĩsĩ kũnengane masyĩtwa ma kũkathĩĩa; Ethĩwa nĩ ũu Mũmbi wakwa nĩkũmbosa mĩtũkĩ. 
Job33:1 Ĩndĩ, Yovu, nĩngũkwĩsũva, ĩw’a kũneena kwakwa, Noiĩthukĩĩsya ndeto syakwa syonthe." 
Job33:2 Sisya yu, nĩnathamĩtye kanyw’a wakwa; Ũĩmĩ wakwa nũneenete kanyw’anĩ wakwa." 
Job33:3 Ndeto syakwa ikaneena ũlũngalu wa ngoo yakwa; Na ũndũ ũla ilomo syakwa syĩsĩ nĩw’o ikaneena w’o. 
Job33:4 Veva wa Ngai nĩwambũmbie, Na mĩthũmũ ya Mwene Vinya W’onthe nĩnengae nyie thayũ." 
Job33:5 Ethĩwa nũtonya, nzũngĩa; Neena ndeto syaku iatĩĩanĩe mbee wakwa, ũngama." 
Job33:6 Sisya, nĩilyĩ kwa Ngai o ũndũ ũilyĩ: O nakwa nĩnoombiwe na yũmba." 
Job33:7 Sisya, ũtĩsyo wakwa ndũkakũtelemya, O na kũvivinya kwakwa kũikethĩwa kũito ĩũlũ waku." 
Job33:8 Nĩ w’o nũneenete ngĩw’a, Na nĩnĩw’ĩte wasya wa ndeto syaku, ũkyasya," 
Job33:9 Nyie nĩ mũtheu, vate naĩ; Ndi na ĩvĩtyo, o na vati ũthũku nthĩnĩ wakwa:" 
Job33:10 Sisya, nũntheaa, Nũndalaa nĩ mũmaitha wake;" 
Job33:11 Nĩwĩkĩaa maũũ makwa mĩtĩnĩ ya kũmoveea, Nũthianaa mĩendele yakwa yonthe." 
Job33:12 Sisya, nĩngũũsũngĩa, ũndũnĩ ũũ ndwĩ mũlũngalu; Nũndũ Ngai nĩ mũnene kwĩ mũndũ." 
Job33:13 Nĩkĩ ũũkĩlan’ya vinya nake, Nũndũ ndaumasya ũtalo wa ũndũ o na wĩva wake?" 
Job33:14 Nũndũ Ngai nũneenaa ĩmwe, Ĩĩ kelĩ, o na kau mũndũ ndonaa ta ũndũ." 
Job33:15 Ndotonĩ, woninĩ wa ũtukũ, Andũ makomete too mũnene, Momboesye kĩtandanĩ;" 
Job33:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũvingũaa matũ ma andũ, Na kũsiĩla ũmanyĩsyo woo," 
Job33:17 Nĩ kana amũvete mũndũ ũndũnĩ ũla wendaa kwĩka, Na kũmũvitha mũndũ ngathĩĩo;" 
Job33:18 Nũsiĩĩaa thayũ wake ndũkalike yĩla ĩimanĩ, Na thayũ wake ndũkaw’e nĩ ũvyũ." 
Job33:19 Nake nũkũnĩawa nĩ kyalya ũkomonĩ wake, Na ĩteta yĩtatw’ĩkanaa mavĩndĩnĩ make;" 
Job33:20 Na kwondũ wa ũu thayũ wake nũthĩthaa lĩu, Na ngoo yake lĩu mũseo." 
Job33:21 Nyama yake nĩ mine, ndĩtonya kwoneka; Na mavĩndĩ make ala mataĩ moneku nĩmaumĩlĩte." 
Job33:22 Ĩĩ, ngoo yake nĩthengeee yĩla ĩima, Na thayũ wake ala manangaa." 
Job33:23 Ethĩwa ve mũlaĩka vamwe nake, Mũvuan’ya, ũmwe katĩ wa ngili, Kũmwon’ya mũndũ ũla ũseo kwake;" 
Job33:24 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ngai nĩ mũseo kwake, na easya, Mũvonokye ndakatheee yĩla ĩimanĩ, Nĩnonete mbovosya." 
Job33:25 Mwĩĩ wake ũkeethĩwa mwololo kwĩ wa kana; Nũsyokaa mĩthenyanĩ ya wana wake. 
Job33:26 Nũmũvoyaa Ngai, nake nũmwĩkaa ũseo, Ũkethĩa nĩwonaa ũthyũ wake na ũtanu: Na nũmũtũngĩaa mũndũ ũlũngalu wake." 
Job33:27 Nĩwĩnĩaa mbee wa andũ, na kwasya, Nĩnĩvĩtĩtye, na kwelelũkasya kĩla kya w’o, Na ndyaaunĩka:" 
Job33:28 Nĩwovoetye ngoo yakwa ndĩkatheee yĩla ĩimanĩ, Na thayũ wakwa ũkoona kyeni." 
Job33:29 Sisya, maũndũ asu onthe Ngai nĩwĩkaa, Kelĩ, ĩĩ katatũ, kwa mũndũ," 
Job33:30 Atũnge ngoo yake kuma yĩla ĩimanĩ, Nĩ kana eekĩwe kyeni nĩ kyeni kya ala me thayũ." 
Job33:31 Sisya nesa, we Yovu, mbĩthukĩĩsya: Vindya, nakwa nĩngũneena." 
Job33:32 Ethĩwa wĩ na ũndũ wa ũneena, nzũngĩa: Neena, nũndũ nĩngwenda ũkũtala mũlũngalu." 
Job33:33 Ethĩwa ti ũu, mbĩthukĩĩsya: Vindya, na ngakũmanyĩsya ũĩ." 
Job34:1 Na ũndũ ũngĩ Eliu asũngĩa na asya," 
Job34:2 Ĩw’ai ndeto syakwa, ĩnyw’ĩ andũ oĩ; Na ngunũĩai matũ, inyw’ĩ ala mwĩ na ũmanyi." 
Job34:3 Nũndũ kũtũ nĩkũtataa ndeto, O tondũ kaakaa ũsamaa lĩu." 
Job34:4 Twĩnyuvĩe ũndũ ũla ũlũngalu: Tũmanye katĩ waitũ ene ũla ũseo. 
Job34:5 Nũndũ Yovu nũneenete, Nyie nĩ mũlũngalu, Na Ngai nũvetete kĩanda kyakwa:" 
Job34:6 O na kau ũlũngalu wakwa wĩ vo nĩngũtalwa nĩ mũneeni wa ũvũngũ; Wũkite wakwa ndũvoeka, o na ndi na ĩvĩtyo." 
Job34:7 Nĩ mũndũ wĩva ũilyĩ Yovu, Ũla ũnyusaa kĩvũthya ta manzĩ," 
Job34:8 Ũla ũtindanasya na eki ma naĩ, Na kũtambũkanasya na andũ athe?" 
Job34:9 Nũndũ nake nũneenete, kũtiunaa mũndũ na kĩndũ Kwĩtan’ya nthĩnĩ wa Ngai." 
Job34:10 Kwondũ wa ũu mbĩthukĩĩsyai, inyw’ĩ andũ mwĩ na ũmanyi: Nĩkwĩthĩwe kũasa na Ngai, atĩ eke ũthũku, Na kũasa na Mwene Vinya W’onthe, atĩ eke naĩ." 
Job34:11 Nũndũ akamũĩva mũndũ wĩa wake, Na kũtuma kĩla mũndũ osa kwĩanana na mĩendele yake." 
Job34:12 Ĩĩ, nĩ w’o ki, Ngai ndakeka ũthũku, O na Mwene Vinya W’onthe ndakelelũkya ũsili wa katĩ." 
Job34:13 Nũũ ũla wamũnengie wĩaĩo ĩũlũ wa nthi? Kana nũũ ũla wiĩte nthĩ yonthe? 
Job34:14 Ethĩwa akeelekelya ngoo yake mwene kwĩsisya, Ethĩwa akeeyũmbanĩsya veva wake na mĩthũmũ yake;" 
Job34:15 Mĩĩ yonthe ĩkaaa vamwe, Na mũndũ akatw’ĩka o kĩtoo ĩngĩ." 
Job34:16 Ethĩwa yu wĩ na ũmanyi, ĩw’a ũũ: Ĩthukĩĩsye wasya wa ndeto syakwa." 
Job34:17 O na ũmwe ũla ũmenaa ũsili wa katĩ akasumbĩka? Na ũkamũtw’a mũvĩtan’ya ũla mũlũngalu na wĩ ũtonyi?— 
Job34:18 Ũla ũtavasya mũsumbĩ, Wĩ mũvuku, Kana ala me ndaĩa, Mwĩ athũku;" 
Job34:19 Ũla ũtonaa anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ ta kĩndũ, Kana kũsisya athwii kũvĩtũka ngya; Nũndũ onthe nĩ wĩa wa moko make." 
Job34:20 Kavinda kanini nĩmakusaa o ũtukũ katĩ; Andũ nĩmathingithaw’a, na maivĩta, Na ala me na ũtonyi nĩmatwaawa vate kw’oko." 
Job34:21 Nũndũ metho make nĩmasiasya nzĩa sya mũndũ, Na nĩwonaa mĩendele yake yonthe." 
Job34:22 Vati kĩvindu, kana mũki mũnene, Vala eki ma naĩ matonya kwĩvitha." 
Job34:23 Nũndũ nde vata kũsũanĩanga ũndũ wa mũndũ, Kana eũngama mbee wa Ngai ũsilĩlonĩ." 
Job34:24 Nũtilangaa ngũmbaũ ilungu na nzĩa itamanyĩka, Na kwia angĩ vandũ voo." 
Job34:25 Kwondũ wa ũu nũsiasya mawĩa moo; Na nũmakũlumanasya ũtukũ, na kwondũ wa ũu makyanangwa." 
Job34:26 Nũmakũnaa ta andũ athũku Ala angĩ mamasyaĩtye; 
Job34:27 Nũndũ nĩmaathũkie maeka kũmũatĩĩa, Na matyaaĩtĩkĩla nzĩa yake o na yĩva:" 
Job34:28 Kwondũ wa ũu matuma kĩĩo kya ngya kĩmũvikĩa, Na eew’a kĩĩo kya ala mathĩnaw’a." 
Job34:29 Yĩla ũnenganae ũkilyo, nũũ ĩndĩ ũtonya kũtw’a nĩ mũvĩtan’ya? Na yĩla ũvithaa ũthyũ wake, nũũ ĩndĩ ũtonya kũmwona? Nĩ ũndũ ũmwe ethĩwa ũu wĩkawa kwa mbaĩ, kana kwa mũndũ:" 
Job34:30 Nĩ kana ũla ũtakĩaa Ngai ndakasũmbĩke, Nĩ kana vatikethĩwe ũmwe wa kũtea andũ." 
Job34:31 Nũndũ ve ũmwe waamwĩa Ngai, Nĩnũmĩĩsye kũkũnwa, ndikavĩtya ĩngĩ:" 
Job34:32 Ũndũ ũla ndekwona manyĩsya nyie: Ethĩwa nĩnĩkĩte naĩ, ndikamĩka ĩngĩ?" 
Job34:33 Ũĩvanĩsyo wake ũkeethĩwa ta ũndũ ũkwenda, ũndũ ũkũlea? Nũndũ no mũvaka we ũnyuve, ti i nyie: Kwondũ wa ũu neena ũndũ wĩsĩ." 
Job34:34 Andũ me na ũmanyi makambĩa, Ĩĩ, kĩla mũndũ mũĩ ũla ũmbĩw’aa:" 
Job34:35 Yovu aneenaa ate na ũmanyi, Na ndeto syake ti mbũĩ." 
Job34:36 Nenda kethĩwa Yovu ũkatatwa kũvika mũminũkĩlyo, Nũndũ wake kũsũngĩa ta andũ athũku." 
Job34:37 Nũndũ nĩwongeleelaa naĩ yake ũng’endu; Nũkũnangĩaa mbĩ syake katĩ waitũ, Na kwingĩvya ndeto syake vala ve Ngai." 
Job35:1 Na ũndũ ũngĩ Eliu asũngĩa na asya," 
Job35:2 Nũkũsũanĩa ũu nũkwaĩle, Kana nũkwasya, Ũlũngalu wakwa nĩ mũnene kwĩ wa Ngai," 
Job35:3 Ũndũ ũkwasya, Kũkeethĩwa ũtandĩthyo mwaũ kwaku? Na, Ngeethĩwa na ũtandĩthyo mwaũ, kũvĩtũka kethĩwa nĩneekaa naĩ?" 
Job35:4 Nĩngũũsũngĩa, Na atindan’ya maku me naku." 
Job35:5 Sisya matu, noyona; Ĩlooele yayaya, yĩla yĩ ĩũlũ kwĩ we." 
Job35:6 Ethĩwa nũvĩtĩtye, ũmwĩkaa ata? Na ethĩwa mavĩtyo maku nĩ mongeleku, ũmwĩkaa ata?" 
Job35:7 Ethĩwa wĩ mũlũngalu, ũmũnengae kyaũ? Kana nake osaa kyaũ kw’okonĩ kwaku?" 
Job35:8 Ũthũku waku nũtonya kũthĩn’ya mũndũ o taku; Na ũlũngalu waku nũtonya kũuna mwana wa mũndũ. 
Job35:9 Nũndũ wa wingĩ wa mathĩna andũ nĩmakayaa; Nũndũ wa kw’oko kwa ũla wĩ ũtonyi nĩmauaa mbu. 
Job35:10 Ĩndĩ vai ũmwe ũkwasya, Ngai Mũmbi wakwa aĩva? Ũla ũnenganae mbathi ũtukũ," 
Job35:11 Ũla ũtũmanyĩasya kũvĩtũka nyamũ sya nthĩ, Na kũtũĩvya kwĩ nyũnyi sya yayaya?" 
Job35:12 Nĩmaĩĩaa vau, ĩndĩ vai ũla ũsũngĩaa, Nũndũ wa ngathĩĩo ya andũ athũku." 
Job35:13 Vate ndĩi Ngai ndakew’a kĩĩo kĩthei, O Mwene Vinya W’onthe ndakakĩtĩkĩla." 
Job35:14 Nata yĩla waasya ndũmwonaa, Ũvoo wĩ mbee wake, naku nũmweteelaa!" 
Job35:15 Ĩndĩ yu, nũndũ ndaasila ũthatunĩ wake, O na ndasiasya mũno wĩnenevyo;" 
Job35:16 Kwondũ wa ũu Yovu nĩwathamasya kanyw’a wake mana; Nĩwingĩvasya ndeto vate ũmanyi. 
Job36:1 O na Eliu aendeea, na asya," 
Job36:2 Ndeka vanini, na nĩngũkwon’ya; Nũndũ nĩ na ũndũ wa kũneena ngalĩ ĩ ya Ngai." 
Job36:3 Nĩngũete ũmanyi wakwa kuma kũasa, Na kũmũweta Mũmbi wakwa ũlũngalu." 
Job36:4 Nũndũ nĩ w’o ndeto syakwa ti sya ũvũngũ: Ũmwe mwĩanĩu ũmanyinĩ e naku. 
Job36:5 Sisya, Ngai e na ũtonyi, na ndavũthasya mũndũ o na wĩva: Nake e na ũtonyi vinyanĩ wa ũmanyi." 
Job36:6 Ndasũvĩaa thayũ wa ũla mũthũku, Ĩndĩ nũnengae ala mathĩnaw’a kĩanda kyoo." 
Job36:7 Ndaumasya metho make vala ve alũngalu: Ĩndĩ vamwe na asumbĩ me kĩvĩlanĩ kya ũsumbĩ Nũmaiaa tene na tene, nao nĩmanenevaw’a." 
Job36:8 Na ethĩwa nĩmovawa na mbĩngũ, Na kũkwatw’a na ndii sya thĩna;" 
Job36:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũmonasya wĩa woo, Na mavĩtyo moo, atĩ nĩmekĩte na ngathĩĩo." 
Job36:10 O na nũvingũaa kũtũ kwoo mose ũmanyĩsyo, Na kwĩaĩa masyoke kuma naĩnĩ." 
Job36:11 Ethĩwa nĩmethukĩĩasya na kũmũthũkũmaa, Makekalya mĩthenya yoo ũunĩkonĩ, Na myaka yoo motanunĩ." 
Job36:12 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa matikethukĩĩsya, makaaa kwondũ wa ũvyũ, Na makakw’a mate na ũmanyi." 
Job36:13 Ĩndĩ ala matakĩaa Ngai ngoonĩ nĩmeyiĩaa ũthatu: Matikayaa matethw’e yĩla ũnũũmova. 
Job36:14 Nĩmakusaa wananĩ, Na thayũ woo nĩwaĩaa katĩ wa ala avuku." 
Job36:15 Nũvonokasya ala mathĩnaw’a kwondũ wa thĩna woo, Na nũvingũaa kũtũ kwoo me ũnyamaonĩ." 
Job36:16 Ĩĩ, enda ũkũtongoesya wume ũnyamaonĩ Ũkũlilya vandũ vathanthau, vala vate vavivinyanu; Na kĩla kĩiawa mesanĩ yaku kĩkeethĩwa kyusĩe ũnou." 
Job36:17 Ĩndĩ nĩwusũĩte ũsilĩlo wa ala athũku: Ũsilĩlo na ũsili wa katĩ nikũkwete. 
Job36:18 Ndũkaeke ũthilĩku ũkũthokoan’ye ũndũ wa makũna; O na wingĩ wa mbovosya ndũkakwelelũkye. 
Job36:19 Kĩĩo kyaku kĩkaũtethya, ndũkethĩwe na thĩna, Kana mavinya onthe ma vinya waku?" 
Job36:20 Ndũkende ũtukũ, Yĩla andũ mavetawa vandũ voo." 
Job36:21 Ĩsuvĩe, ndũketĩkĩle ũthũku: Nũndũ ũu nũnyuvĩte kwĩ thĩna." 
Job36:22 Sisya, Ngai nĩwĩkaa na ũnene vinyanĩ wake: Nũũ mũmanyĩsya ũilyĩ take?" 
Job36:23 Nũũ ũla ũmwĩaĩĩte nzĩa yake? Kana nũũ ũtonya kwasya, Nĩwĩkĩte ũla ũte ũlũngalu?" 
Job36:24 Lilikana ũtaĩe wĩa wake, Ũla andũ mainĩte ũndũ waw’o." 
Job36:25 Andũ onthe nĩmawonete; Mũndũ nũwonaa wĩ kũasa. 
Job36:26 Sisya, Ngai nĩ mũnene, na tũtimwĩsĩ; Ũtalo wa myaka yake ndũmanthĩka." 
Job36:27 Nũndũ nũkusasya ĩũlũ mavoloto ma manzĩ, Ala mavolotangasya mbua kuma mũkinĩ wamo," 
Job36:28 Ĩla matu mamyonosya Na kũmĩvolotangĩlya mũndũ mbingĩ mũno. 
Job36:29 Ĩĩ, ve ũmwe ũtonya kũmanya ũnyaĩĩku wa mathweo, Itundumo sya ĩlwanda yake?" 
Job36:30 Sisya, nũnyaĩĩkasya kyeni kyake kũmũthyũlũlũka; Na nũvw’ĩkaa nthĩ yĩ ungu wa ũkanga." 
Job36:31 Nũndũ kwondũ wa maũndũ asu nũsilĩlaa ngo sya andũ; Nũnenganae lĩu mwingĩ. 
Job36:32 Nũvw’ĩkaa moko make ũtisi, Na kũwĩaĩa ũathe vala vatw’ĩtwe." 
Job36:33 Kĩlonzo kyaw’o nĩkĩtavanasya ũndũ wake, O na indo nasyo ũndũ wa kĩuutani kĩla kyũkĩte." 
Job37:1 Ĩĩ, kwondũ wa ũu ngoo yakwa nitetemaa, Na kumw’a vandũ vayo." 
Job37:2 Ĩw’a, ĩĩ, ĩw’a kĩlonzo kya wasya wake, Na kĩumo kĩla kyumaa kanyw’anĩ wake." 
Job37:3 We nũkĩtũmaa kĩende ĩtheo wa ĩtu yonthe, Na ũtisi wake kũvika itulu sya nthĩ." 
Job37:4 Ĩtina waw’o wasya nũlitũkaa; Nũtundumaa na wasya wa ũnene wake; Na ndasiĩĩaa motisi yĩla wasya wake wĩw’ĩka. 
Job37:5 Ngai nũtundumaa na ũseng’ya na wasya wake; Nĩwĩkaa maũndũ manene, ala ithyĩ tũtatonya kũmamanya." 
Job37:6 Nũndũ nũtavasya ĩa, Valũka we ĩũlũ wa nthĩ; No ta ũu mũono wa mbua, O na mĩono ya mbua yake yĩ vinya." 
Job37:7 Nũsiĩĩaa kw’oko kwa kĩla mũndũ, Nĩ kana andũ onthe ala wombie mamanye ũu." 
Job37:8 Nĩvo nyamũ ilikaa mawĩvithonĩ, Na kwĩkalaa isumonĩ syasyo." 
Job37:9 Kuma motheinĩ ma ngalĩ ya ĩtheo kĩuutani nĩkyũkaa, Na mbevo kuma ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ." 
Job37:10 Kwondũ wa nĩthũmũ ya Ngai manzĩ momĩtw’e nĩ mbevo nĩmonekaa; Na ũthanthau wa manzĩ ũikoomatana. 
Job37:11 Ĩĩ, nũkuĩthasya ithweo ĩkamu manzĩ maingĩ; Nũtambũũkasya ĩthweo yĩ ũtisi wake." 
Job37:12 Na nĩyĩthyũũawa kwondũ wa kũtongoew’a nĩwe, Nĩ kana meke ũndũ o na wĩva ũla ũnũũmeaĩa Ĩũlũ wa nthĩ yĩ andũ;" 
Job37:13 Ethĩwa nĩ kwondũ wa ũkan’yo, kana kwondũ wa nthĩ yake, Kana kwondũ wa ũseo wĩ wendo, nũtumaa yũka." 
Job37:14 Ĩthukĩĩsye ũũ, we Yovu: Ũngama, ũsũanĩe mawĩa ma ũseng’ya ma Ngai." 
Job37:15 Nĩwĩsĩ ũndũ Ngai wĩaa wĩaĩo wake ĩũlũ wamo, Na kũtuma ũtisi wa ĩthweo yake ũtisa?" 
Job37:16 Naku nĩwĩsĩ ũndũ mathweo masũnzũlĩtw’e, Mawĩa ma ũseng’ya ma ũla mwĩanĩu ũmanyinĩ?" 
Job37:17 Ũndũ ngũa syaku syĩ na muutĩa, Yĩla nthĩ ĩuĩtye nũndũ wa kĩseve kyumĩte ngalĩ ya ĩtheo?" 
Job37:18 Naku nũtonya kũtambũũkya ĩtu wĩ nake, Yĩla yĩ vinya ta kĩsisyo kĩseũvĩtw’e na syĩndũ itwekethetw’e?" 
Job37:19 Tũmanyĩsye ũla twĩneena nake; Nũndũ tũtitonya kũneena tũlũngalĩtye nũndũ wa kĩvindu. 
Job37:20 Akatavw’a kana nĩenda kũneena? Kana mũndũ akenda kũmelw’a vyũ? 
Job37:21 Na yu andũ matyonaa kyeni kĩla kĩtisaa matunĩ; Ĩndĩ kĩseve nĩkĩvĩtaa, na kũmaveta." 
Job37:22 Kuma ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ ũtisu ta thaavu nĩwũkaa: Ngai e na ũnene wa ũtĩsya ĩũlũ wake. 
Job37:23 Ũndũ wa Mwene Vinya W’onthe, tũtitonya kũmũmanya: Nake nĩ mũnene vinyanĩ; Na ndakathĩn’ya ũsilinĩ wa katĩ na ũlũngalunĩ mwingĩ." 
Job37:24 Kwondũ wa ũu andũ mamũkĩaa: Ndasiasya andũ ala me na ũĩ ngoonĩ. 
Job38:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yeova wasũngĩie Yovu e kĩlinginĩ, na asya," 
Job38:2 Ũũ nũũ ũla wĩkĩaa ũtao kĩvindu Na ndeto ite na ũmanyi? 
Job38:3 Ĩvotoe kĩnyunyu kyaku yu ta mũndũ; Nũndũ ngakũkũlya, naku wĩndavya." 
Job38:4 Waĩ va yĩla naiaa myambĩlĩlyo ya nthĩ? Neena, ethĩwa wĩ na ũmanyi." 
Job38:5 Nũũ ũla weaie ithimo syayo, ethĩwa nĩwĩsĩ? Kana nũũ watambũũkisye ũlii ĩũlũ wayo?" 
Job38:6 Myambĩlĩlyo yayo yalũlũmĩlw’e na kyaũ? Kana nũũ waiie ĩvia ya kĩkotonĩ kyayo," 
Job38:7 Yĩla ndata sya kĩoko syainie vamwe, Na ana onthe ma Ngai mookĩlya mawasya ũndũ wa kũtana?" 
Job38:8 Kana nũũ ũla wavingĩie ũkanga na mĩomo, Yĩla wavũngũkie, ta kuma ĩvunĩ;" 
Job38:9 Yĩla naseũvisye mathweo methĩwe ngũa yaw’o, Na kĩvindu kya ngokomi kĩthĩwe ngũa ya ũkenge kwondũ waw’o." 
Job38:10 Na kũtw’ĩa mũvaka wakwa; Na kwia ivingi na mĩomo," 
Job38:11 Na kwasya, Wĩvika vaa, ĩndĩ ti mbee; Na vaa itulumo syaku sya ngathĩĩo ikaũngamw’a?" 
Job38:12 Waaĩaĩa kĩoko kuma mĩthenya yaku yambĩlĩlya, Na kũtuma kũkya kũmanya vandũ vakw’o;" 
Job38:13 Nĩ kana kũvike itulunĩ sya nthĩ, Na ala athũku mavuunzwe mamyume?" 
Job38:14 Nĩalyũlawa ta yũmba yĩ ungu wa ũsiĩlo; Na syĩndũ syonthe ikyoneka ta ngũa: 
Job38:15 Na kyeni kya ala athũku nĩkĩsiĩĩawa, Na kw’oko kũkĩlĩte nĩ kũtũlĩku." 
Job38:16 Naku waalika mbulutinĩ sya ũkanga? Kana waatambũka syũngũlũtũnĩ sya kyũngũ? 
Job38:17 Mbingĩlo sya kĩkw’ũ nĩsyavuaniw’e kwaku? Kana waaona mbingĩlo sya kyuu kya kĩkw’ũ? 
Job38:18 Waamanya nthĩ ũthanthau wayo? Neena, ethĩwa nĩwĩsĩ ũu w’onthe." 
Job38:19 Nzĩa nĩ yĩva ya kũthi ũtũonĩ wa kyeni? Na ũndũ wa kĩvindu, vandũ vakyo nĩ va," 
Job38:20 Ũndũ ũkĩtwaa mũvakanĩ wakyo, Na kũmanya nzĩa sya kũthi nyũmba yakyo?" 
Job38:21 Vate nzika, nĩwĩsĩ, nũndũ waĩ mũsyae ĩvinda yĩu, Na ũtalo wa mĩthenya yaku nĩ mwingĩ!" 
Job38:22 Waavota vala ĩa yiawa, Kana waona vala mbua ya mavia yiawa," 
Job38:23 Ĩla niĩte ũndũ wa ĩvinda ya thĩna, Mũthenya wa kũkita na wa kaũ?" 
Job38:24 Kyeni kĩaanaw’a na nzĩa yĩva, Kana kĩseve kyumĩte wumĩlonĩ wa syũa kĩnyaĩĩkaw’a ata kũũ nthĩ?" 
Job38:25 Nũũ ũla watũĩte ũkinyĩlo wa manzĩ maingĩ, Kana nzĩa ũndũ wa ũtisi wa kĩtundumo;" 
Job38:26 Kuasya mbua nthĩ vala vate mũndũ; Weũnĩ ũla ũte mũndũ; 
Job38:27 Kũkolethya nthĩ mbanangĩku na nthei, Na kũtuma nyeki mbololo ĩthandĩka?" 
Job38:28 Mbua yĩ ĩthe? Kana nũũ ũla wasyaie mavoloto ma ĩmwe? 
Job38:29 Manzi momĩtw’e nĩ mbevo maumie ĩvunĩ yaũ? Na ĩmwe ya ĩtunĩ yĩla yakamĩtw’e nĩ mbevo, nũũ wayĩsyaie?" 
Job38:30 Manzĩ mevithaa na kũtw’ĩka ta ĩvia, Na manzĩ me ĩũlũ wa kyũngũ maiyũma." 
Job38:31 Nũtonya kwovanĩa Kĩeemea, Kana kũthasya kĩla kyovete Olioni?" 
Job38:32 Nũtonya kumĩlya nguthu ya ndata syĩtawa Masalothi ĩvinda yasyo? Kana nũtonya kũtongoesya Ayisi vamwe na ũkondo wayo? 
Job38:33 Nĩwĩsĩ motw’ĩo ma matu? Nũtonya kũlũlũmĩlya ũsumbĩko wamo kũũ nthĩ? 
Job38:34 Nũtonya kũkĩlya wasya waku kũvika mathweonĩ, Nĩ kana manzĩ maingĩ makũvw’ĩke?" 
Job38:35 Nũtonya kumĩlya motisi, kana maende, Na maikwĩa, Twĩ vaa?" 
Job38:36 Nũũ ũla wekĩie ũĩ nthĩnĩ? Kana nũũ wanengie kĩlilikano ũmanyi? 
Job38:37 Nũũ ũtonya kũtala mathweo kwondũ wa ũĩ? Kana nũũ ũtonya kũmatulũla masũva ma ĩtu," 
Job38:38 Yĩla mũthanga ũkwatanaa na ũitw’ĩka mũmũ, Na mavali makĩlũman’ya vamwe?" 
Job38:39 Nũtonya kũsyĩmĩa mũnyambũ mũka sya nzyĩma, Kana kũvũnĩthya mĩnyambũ ya mũika yĩ na nzaa," 
Job38:40 Yĩla yoveeasya isumonĩ syayo, Na kwĩkalaa wĩvithonĩ yoveesye?" 
Job38:41 Nũũ ũnengae ngũngũũ kya nzyĩma yayo, Yĩla tũswii twayo tũmwĩkaĩla Ngai, Na kwanganga nũndũ wa kwaĩwa nĩ lĩu?" 
Job39:1 Nĩwĩsĩ ĩvinda ya kũsyaa ya mbũi sya kĩthekanĩ ila syĩ mavianĩ? Kana nũtonya kũmanya yĩla ndaatai isyaaa? 
Job39:2 Nũtonya kũtala myei ĩla ikwĩanĩsya? Kana nĩwĩsĩ ĩvinda yĩla isyaaa? 
Job39:3 Nitindiaa, nisyaaa maswii masyo, Nivetaa syalya syasyo." 
Job39:4 Maswii masyo nĩmaĩsaa vinya, makĩanĩa weũnĩ; Nĩmaendaa, na matisyokaa ĩngĩ." 
Job39:5 Nũũ ũla ũtũmĩte ĩng’oi ya kĩthekanĩ yĩende yĩ ĩthasye? Kana nũũ ũthaĩtye kĩla kyovete ĩng’oi yĩla yĩendaa mĩtũkĩ," 
Job39:6 Yĩla naseũvĩsye weũ wĩthĩwe mũsyĩ wayo, Na nthĩ yĩ mũnyũ ũtũo wayo?" 
Job39:7 Nayo yĩvũthasya kĩtuu kya ndũa, O na yĩtyĩw’aa wasya mũtũlu wa mũingi." 
Job39:8 Ũthanthau wa iĩma nĩ kĩsesi kyayo, Na nĩyĩmanthaa kĩla kĩndũ kĩũ." 
Job39:9 Mboo ĩkendeew’a nĩ ũkũthũkũma? Kana ĩkekalaa vakuvĩ na kĩĩthĩsyo kyaku? 
Job39:10 Nũtonya kwova mboo na mũkwa wayo mũkaonĩ? Kana ĩkenza myandanĩ ĩkũatĩĩe? 
Job39:11 Ũkamĩĩkĩĩa nũndũ vinya wayo nĩ mũnene? Kana ũkamĩtianĩsya na wĩa waku? 
Job39:12 Ũkamĩĩkĩĩa atĩ ĩkenũkya mbeũ syaku, Na kũmban’ya lĩu wa mbaa ngetha wa kĩvũĩo kyaku?" 
Job39:13 Nthwau sya nyaa nĩkũnanganaw’a na ngathĩĩo; Ĩndĩ nĩ nzĩa na maw’ĩa ma wendo? 
Job39:14 Nũndũ nĩtiaa matumbĩ mayo ĩũlũ wa mũthanga, Na kũmekĩa muutĩa na kĩtoo," 
Job39:15 Na kũlwa kana kũũ nĩkũtonya kũmakinyanga, Kana nyamũ mbai nĩtonya kũmakinyanga." 
Job39:16 Nĩtwĩkaa tũswii twayo na vinya, ta tũte twayo: O na ethĩwa wĩa wayo nĩ mana, ndĩ na w’ĩa;" 
Job39:17 Nĩkwĩthĩwa Ngai nũmĩimĩthĩtye ũĩ, O na ndaamĩnenga ũmanyi." 
Job39:18 Ĩvinda yĩla ĩyũkĩlasya ĩũlũ, Nĩvũthasya mbalasi na ũla ũmĩtũlĩte." 
Job39:19 Nue ũmĩnengete mbalasi vinya wayo? Nue ũmĩvw’ĩkĩte ngingo yayo ũea ũtetemaa? 
Job39:20 Nue ũtumaa ĩtũlĩla ta ngie? Ũnene wa kũtiva kwayo nĩ wa kũtĩsya. 
Job39:21 Nĩvulasya na kũũ mwandanĩ, na kũtana vinyanĩ wayo: Nĩyumaalaa ĩende kũkomana na andũ mekĩte mĩio ya kaũ." 
Job39:22 Nĩvũthasya w’ĩa, na ndĩtevaa; O na ndĩsyokaa na ĩtina kuma ũvyũnĩ." 
Job39:23 Thyaka nũmĩlonzanĩlasya, Ĩtumo yĩla yĩtisũkaa na katumo kanini." 
Job39:24 Nĩmelasya nthĩ na wai na ũthatu mũnene; O na ndĩtĩkĩlaa kana soo nĩwakaya. 
Job39:25 O yĩla soo wesa ũvuvwa ĩkyasya, Aa! Na nĩĩw’aa mũuke wa kaũ wĩ kũasa, Kĩtundumo kya makavuteni, na mawasya manene." 
Job39:26 Nĩ kwondũ wa ũĩ waku kĩlũĩ kĩũlũkaa kĩvolelete, Na kũtambũũkya nthwau syakyo kyelekelye ngalĩ ya ĩtheo?" 
Job39:27 Nĩ ũndũ wa mwĩao waku ndiũ yambataa, Na kwaka ndala yayo ĩũlũ?" 
Job39:28 Nĩyĩkalaa ũkeanĩ, na kũseũvya mũsyĩ wayo, Mũthyanĩ wa ũkea, na ngomenĩ yĩ vinya." 
Job39:29 Ĩ vo nĩthianaa sya nzyĩma; Metho mayo mamyonaa yĩ kũasa. 
Job39:30 Tũswii twayo natw’o nĩtũnyusaa nthakame: Na vala ve oawa, nayo yĩ vo." 
Job40:1 O na ĩngĩ Yeova asũngĩa Yovu, na asya," 
Job40:2 Mũtetan’ya akatetan’ya na Mwene Vinya W’onthe? Ũla ũkananĩa na Ngai, nasũngĩe." 
Job40:3 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa Yeova, na asya," 
Job40:4 Sisya, nyie ti kĩndũ; ngakũsũngĩa kyaũ? Nĩngũkunĩka kanyw’a wakwa na kw’oko kwakwa." 
Job40:5 Nĩneenete ĩmwe, na ndisũngĩa; Ĩĩ, kelĩ, ĩndĩ ndiũendeea." 
Job40:6 Na ĩndĩ Yeova asũngĩa Yovu e kĩlinginĩ, na asya," 
Job40:7 Ĩvotoe kĩnyunyu kyaku yu ta mũndũ: Ngakũkũlya, naku ũndavye." 
Job40:8 Ũkaalyũla ũtw’ĩo wakwa? Ũkatw’a atĩ nyie nĩ na ĩvĩtyo, nĩ kana ũtalwe wĩ mũlũngalu?" 
Job40:9 Kana wĩ na kw’oko ta Ngai? Na nũtonya kũtunduma na wasya take? 
Job40:10 Ĩyanakavye yu na ũnene na ũsumbĩko; Na kwĩvw’ĩka ndaĩa na ũsũng’wa. 
Job40:11 Onosya wusũu wa ũthatu waku; Na sisya kĩla mwĩkathĩĩi, noimũnyivya." 
Job40:12 Sisya kĩla mwĩkathĩĩi, noimũtheesya; Noimakinyangĩa ala athũku vala maũngyĩ." 
Job40:13 Mavithe kĩtoonĩ vamwe; Move mothyũ moo vandũnĩ vavithe. 
Job40:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nĩumbũla ũndũ waku Kana kw’oko kwaku mwene kwa aũme nĩkũtonya ũkũtangĩĩa. 
Job40:15 Sisya yu, nguũ, ĩla namyũmbie o taku; Nĩĩsaa nyeki ta ng’ombe." 
Job40:16 Sisya yu, vinya wayo wĩ kĩnyunyunĩ kyayo, Na ũtonyi wayo wĩ malangũnĩ ma ĩvu yayo." 
Job40:17 Nĩvyũlasya kĩsithe kyayo ta mũtĩ wa mũkũũ: Malangũ ma mawaswa mayo nĩmakwatanĩte. 
Job40:18 Mavĩndĩ mayo nĩ ta mĩtote ya ũthuku; Mamutha mayo nĩ ta ivingi sya iaa. 
Job40:19 Nĩ nene katĩ wa mawĩa ma Ngai: Na ũla wamyũmbie nĩwe ũla wamĩnengie ũvyũ wayo. 
Job40:20 Nĩ w’o iĩma nimeasya lĩu wayo, Vala nyamũ syonthe sya weũ ithaũkĩaa." 
Job40:21 Nĩkomaa ĩtina wa mĩtĩ yĩ muunyĩ Wĩvithonĩ wa mĩangi na ndakanĩ. 
Job40:22 Mĩtĩ ĩsu nĩmĩvw’ĩkaa na muunyĩ wayo; Mĩtĩ ĩla ĩmeaa kalũsĩnĩ nĩmĩthyũlũlũkaa. 
Job40:23 Sisya, ethĩwa ũsĩ nũvingĩte ũkakĩla, ndĩtetema; Nũndũ yĩ na wĩkwatyo, o na ethĩwa ũsĩ ta Yolotani ũkookĩla kũvika kanyw’anĩ wayo." 
Job40:24 Mũndũ o na wĩva nũmĩkwata ĩsyaĩĩsye, Kana kũtonya mũkuthũ ĩnyiũũnĩ yayo na kĩtei?" 
Job41:1 Nũtonya kũkusya leviathani na ngolya ya ũkwatya makũyũ? Kana kũvinyĩĩa ũĩmĩ wayo na ĩkanda? 
Job41:2 Nũtonya kwĩkĩa ĩkanda ĩnyiũũnĩ yayo? Kana kũtonya mũkuthũ ũkambuu wayo na kavoloi? 
Job41:3 Ĩkakwĩsũva na mawĩsũvano maingĩ? Kana ĩkakũtavya ndeto mbololo? 
Job41:4 Ĩkatianĩa ũtianĩo naku, Nĩ kana ũmyose yĩthĩwe mũthũkũmi waku tene na tene?" 
Job41:5 Ũkathaũka nayo ta nyũnyi? Kana ũkamyova kwondũ wa athũkũmi maku eĩtu? 
Job41:6 Nguthu sya atei ma makũyũ ikamĩtw’ĩkĩthya ũtandĩthyo wasyo? Ikamĩaan’ya katĩ wa atandĩthya? 
Job41:7 Nũtonya kusũsya kĩkonde kyayo na mĩw’a ya kĩaa, Kana mũtwe wayo na tũtumo twa kũtonya makũyũ?" 
Job41:8 Ilĩĩla kw’oko kwaku ĩũlũ wayo; Lilikana kaũ ũsu, na ndũkeke ũu ĩngĩ." 
Job41:9 Sisya, wĩkwatyo vala ĩĩ nĩ wa mana: Mũndũ ndevalũkw’a nthĩ no kũmyona?" 
Job41:10 Vati ũla mwai ũla ũtakĩa kũmĩamũkya; Nũũ ĩndĩ ũtonya kũũngama mbee wakwa? 
Job41:11 Nũũ ũla wambie kũnenga, atĩ naĩle kũmũĩva? O kĩla kĩ ĩtheo wa ĩtu yonthe nĩ kyakwa." 
Job41:12 Ndikavindya ũndũ wa mamutha mayo, Kana vinya wayo mũnene, kana wũmbe wayo mũseo." 
Job41:13 Nũũ ũtonya kũmyumya ngũa yayo ya ĩũlũ? Nũũ wĩlika ngambuunĩ syayo? 
Job41:14 Nũũ ũtonya kũvingũa mĩomo ya ũthyũ wayo? Ũtee wa maeo mayo kwĩ ũtĩsyo. 
Job41:15 Makwaũ mayo me vinya nĩmo ngathĩĩo yayo, Makwatanĩte vamwe ta ũsiĩlo mũlũmu" 
Job41:16 Yĩmwe yĩthengeanĩe na yĩngĩ, Ũndũ nzeve ĩtatonya kũvĩtĩla katĩ wamo." 
Job41:17 Nĩmakwatanĩte yĩmwe na yĩngĩ; Makwatene, ũndũ matatonya kũtaanw’a." 
Job41:18 Kwathimũa kwayo kũkenasya kyeni, Na metho mayo nĩ ta ilomo sya metho sya kĩoko." 
Job41:19 Momũĩ makanu maumaa kanyw’anĩ wayo, Na ngala sya mwaki nitũlĩlaa ikyuma." 
Job41:20 Syũki nĩyumaa manyiũũnĩ mayo, Ta mbisũ ĩkĩtheũka na ta malula makanu."
