Psalms147:8 Ũla ũvw’ĩkaa matu mathweo, Ũla ũseũvĩasya nthĩ mbua, Ũla ũmeasya nyeki iĩmanĩ." 
Psalms147:9 Nũnengae nyamũ lĩu wayo, O na tũswii twa ngũngũũ tũla tũũkaya." 
Psalms147:10 Ndatanaw’a nĩ vinya wa mbalasi: Ndendeeaw’a nĩ maũũ ma mũndũ. 
Psalms147:11 Yeova nĩwendeeaw’a nĩ ala mamũkĩaa, Ala mekwatasya ũseo wake wĩ wendo." 
Psalms147:12 Taĩa Yeova, we Yelusaleme; Taĩa Ngai waku, we Saioni." 
Psalms147:13 Nũndũ nũsyĩkĩĩte vinya ivingi sya mbingĩlo syaku; Nũathimĩte syana syaku ila syĩ nthĩnĩ waku. 
Psalms147:14 Nũtumaa mũuo mĩvakanĩ yaku; Nũkũvũnasya na nganũ ila nzeo mbee. 
Psalms147:15 Nũetae mwĩao wake ĩũlũ wa nthĩ; Ndeto yake nĩsembaa mĩtũkĩ mũno. 
Psalms147:16 Nũnenganae ĩa ta w’ĩa wa malondu; Nũnyaĩĩkasya ĩmwe yĩkamĩtw’e nĩ mbevo ta mũu. 
Psalms147:17 Nĩwĩkasya manzĩ make momĩtw’e nĩ mbevo me tũlungu: Nũũ ũtonya kũũngama mbee wa mbevo yake? 
Psalms147:18 Nũetae ndeto yake, natw’o tũitweka: Nũuutanĩthasya kĩseve kyake, na manzĩ maivĩta." 
Psalms147:19 Nĩwonanasya ndeto yake kwa Yakovo, Na myamũlo yake na motw’ĩo make kwa Isilaeli." 
Psalms147:20 Ndaaĩka mbaĩ o na yĩva ta ũu; Na ũndũ wa motw’ĩo make, ityaamamanya. Mũtaĩei Yeova." 
Psalms148:1 Mũtaĩei Yeova. Mũtaĩĩei Yeova kuma matunĩ; Mũtaĩĩei motũlunĩ. 
Psalms148:2 Mũtaĩei, inyw’ĩ alaĩka make onthe: Mũtaĩei, nguthu yake yonthe." 
Psalms148:3 Mũtaĩei, syũa na mwei: Mũtaĩei, inyw’onthe ndata sya kyeni." 
Psalms148:4 Mũtaĩei, inyw’ĩ matu ala me ĩũlũ wa matu, Na inyw’ĩ manzĩ ala mwĩ ĩũlũ wa matu." 
Psalms148:5 Nitaĩe syĩtwa ya Yeova; Nũndũ we nĩweaie, na syoombĩka." 
Psalms148:6 O na nĩwilũlũmĩlĩtye tene na tene: Nũtw’ĩte ũtw’ĩo ũla ũtakavĩta. 
Psalms148:7 Taĩai Yeova kũũ nthĩ, Inyw’ĩ mĩkũnga mĩnene ya ũkanganĩ, o na syũngũ syonthe;" 
Psalms148:8 Mwaki na mbua ya mavia, ĩa na mũki; Kĩseve kĩnene, ikĩanĩsya ndeto yake;" 
Psalms148:9 Iĩma na tũlĩma tw’onthe; Mĩtĩ yĩ ũsyao na mĩtĩ ya mĩkũũ yonthe; 
Psalms148:10 Nyamũ na indo syonthe; Tũsamũ tũla tũtambũkaa na nyũnyi ila iũlũkaa; 
Psalms148:11 Asumbĩ ma nthĩ na ngo syonthe sya andũ; Anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ na asili onthe ma nthĩ; 
Psalms148:12 Anake o na eĩtu atheu; Atumĩa na syana: 
Psalms148:13 Nĩmataĩe syĩtwa ya Yeova; Nũndũ syĩtwa yake yoka nĩ ĩnenevye; Ũtheu mũtisu wake wĩ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ na matu. 
Psalms148:14 Nĩwũkĩlĩtye ũvya wa andũ make, Ndaĩa ya atheu make onthe; O na ya ana ma Isilaeli, ũko wa andũ ũla wĩ vakuvĩ nake. Mũtaĩei Yeova." 
Psalms149:1 Mũtaĩei Yeova. Mũkumyei Yeova na wathi weũ, Na inĩai ndaĩa yake ũmbanonĩ wa atheu." 
Psalms149:2 Isilaeli namũtanĩe ũla wamũmbie: Syana sya Saioni nitane ũndũ wa mũsumbĩ woo. 
Psalms149:3 Nitaĩe syĩtwa yake ikĩsũnga: Nĩsine ikĩmũtaĩa na kĩthembe na mbeve. 
Psalms149:4 Nũndũ Yeova nũtanĩaa andũ make: Akaanakavya ala auu na ũtangĩĩo. 
Psalms149:5 Atheu nĩmekathĩĩe ndaĩanĩ: Nĩmaine ũndũ wa ũtanu me mokomonĩ moo. 
Psalms149:6 Motaĩo manene ma Ngai methĩwe makanyw’anĩ moo, Na ũvyũ mũĩ ngalĩ syelĩ mokonĩ moo;" 
Psalms149:7 Meĩvanĩsye kwa i mbaĩ, Na mosilĩlo ĩũlũ wa ngo sya andũ;" 
Psalms149:8 Move asumbĩ moo na mĩnyololo, Na anene moo me ndaĩa na mbĩngũ;" 
Psalms149:9 Meanĩsye ũsilĩlo ĩũlũ woo ũla ũandĩkĩtwe: Ndaĩa ĩno yĩ na atheu make onthe. Mũtaĩei Yeova. 
Psalms150:1 Mũtaĩei Yeova. Mũtaĩĩei Ngai vandũnĩ vake vatheu: Mũtaĩĩei ku yayayanĩ ya vinya wake. 
Psalms150:2 Mũtaĩei ũndũ wa meko make me ũtonyi: Mũtaĩei kwĩanana na ũnene wake mũnene. 
Psalms150:3 Mũtaĩei na wasya wa soo: Mũtaĩei na kĩnanda na mbeve. 
Psalms150:4 Mũtaĩei na kĩthembe na kũsũnga: Mũtaĩei na syĩndũ sya kũinga syĩ ndii, na mũtũlilũ." 
Psalms150:5 Mũtaĩei na tũmasaya twĩ wasya mũnene: Mũtaĩei na tũmasaya twĩ wasya mũtũlu mũno. 
Psalms150:6 Kĩla kĩndũ kĩ mĩthũmũ nĩkĩtaĩe Yeova. Mũtaĩei Yeova. 
Proverbs1:1 Nthimo sya Solomoni mwana wa Ndaviti, mũsumbĩ wa Isilaeli:" 
Proverbs1:2 Kũmanya ũĩ na ũmanyĩsyo; Kũvathũkan’ya ndeto sya ũmanyi; 
Proverbs1:3 Kwosa ũmanyĩsyo wa kwĩka ũĩ, Na wa ũlũngalu na wa ũsili wa w’o na katĩ;" 
Proverbs1:4 Kũmũnenga ũla ũte ũmanyi kĩlĩko, Na mwanake ũmanyi na kĩlĩko:" 
Proverbs1:5 Nĩ kana mũndũ ũla mũĩ ew’e, na kwongeleka kwosa momanyĩsyo; Na nĩ kana mũndũ wa ũmanyi akwate motao meanĩu:" 
Proverbs1:6 Kũmanya nthimo, na ũalyũlo wayo, Ndeto sya andũ oĩ, na ndaĩ syoo." 
Proverbs1:7 Kũmũkĩa Yeova nĩ wambĩlĩlyo wa ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ ala atumanu mavũthasya ũĩ na ũmanyĩsyo. 
Proverbs1:8 Mwana wakwa, ĩw’a ũmanyĩsyo wa ĩthe waku, Na ndũkaatie mĩao ya inyia waku:" 
Proverbs1:9 Nũndũ makeethĩwa ta ngovia ya mumo mũtwenĩ waku, Na mĩnyoo ngingonĩ yaku." 
Proverbs1:10 Mwana wakwa, ethĩwa andũ athe nĩmeũkũsengasenga, Ndũketĩkĩle." 
Proverbs1:11 Ethĩwa makakwĩa, Ũka tũendan’ye, Twoveesye twĩtĩkye nthakame; Twoveesye kĩmbithĩnĩ ala mate na ĩvĩtyo vate kĩtumi;" 
Proverbs1:12 Tũmamelye me thayũ ta Seoli, Na me aima, ta ala matheeaa yĩla iĩmanĩ;" 
Proverbs1:13 Tũkoona syĩndũ syonthe syĩ vata mũno; Tũkausũsya nyũmba sitũ na mũtavo: 
Proverbs1:14 Ũkekye mũlimano waku vamwe naitũ; Ithyonthe tũkeethĩwa na ngusu ĩmwe: 
Proverbs1:15 Mwana wakwa, ndũkaendan’ye nzĩanĩ wĩ namo, Siĩĩa kũũ kwaku nzĩanĩ syoo:" 
Proverbs1:16 Nũndũ maũũ moo masembaa meke ũthũku, Na mekalaataa metĩkye nthakame." 
Proverbs1:17 Nũndũ nĩ mana kũtambũũkya kĩtei Nyũnyi yene: 
Proverbs1:18 Na asu moveeasya nthakame yoo ene; Moveeasya na kĩmbithĩ mathayũ moo ene. 
Proverbs1:19 Nĩ w’o itilyĩ nzĩa sya kĩla ũmwe wĩ na ĩtomo ya ũtandĩthyo; Nĩyĩvetaa thayũ wa ene mayo. 
Proverbs1:20 Ũĩ nũkayĩaa na wasya mũnene nzĩanĩ nene; Nĩumĩasya wasya waw’o kũndũnĩ kwaamu; 
Proverbs1:21 Nũkayĩaa vandũ va ndaĩa va kũmbanĩa; Ũlikĩlonĩ wa mbingĩlo, Nthĩnĩ wa ndũa, nĩumĩasya ndeto syaw’o:" 
Proverbs1:22 Inyw’ĩ mũte ũmanyi, mũkenda kũtamanya kwenyu kũvika ĩndĩĩ? Na akaakaan’ya matanĩa kũkaakaasyanĩ kwoo, Na ndia kũmena ũmanyi?" 
Proverbs1:23 Ĩthyũũe kwondũ wa kũkanw’a ninyie: Sisyai, ngoonosya veva wakwa ĩũlũ wenyu; Ngamũmanyĩthya ndeto syakwa." 
Proverbs1:24 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩnĩtanĩte, na nĩmũleete; Nĩnĩtambũũkĩtye kw’oko kwakwa, na vati mũndũ ũsisya;" 
Proverbs1:25 Ĩndĩ nĩmũtw’ĩte motao makwa onthe mana, Na mũtikwĩtĩkĩla mokan’yo makwa:" 
Proverbs1:26 O nakwa ngatheka mũthenyanĩ wa wanangĩko wenyu mũnene; Ngavũa ngũĩ yĩla w’ĩa wenyu wĩũka; 
Proverbs1:27 Yĩla w’ĩa wenyu wĩũka ta kĩlingi, Na wanangĩko wenyu mũnene wĩũka ta kĩlingi; Yĩla monyamao na woo mũnene meũka ĩũlũ wenyu." 
Proverbs1:28 Nĩvo ĩndĩ makengaĩla, ĩndĩ ndikasũngĩa; Makamantha na kĩthing’ĩĩsyo, ĩndĩ matikambona." 
Proverbs1:29 Nũndũ nĩmamenie ũmanyi, Na matyaanyuva kũkĩa Yeova," 
Proverbs1:30 Matyaaĩtĩkĩla motao makwa, Nĩmavũthisye mokan’yo makwa onthe." 
Proverbs1:31 Kwondũ wa ũu makaya ũsyao wa mĩendele yoo ene, Na kusũwa nĩ mĩtavyo yoo ene." 
Proverbs1:32 Nũndũ kũsyoka na ĩtina kwa ala mate ũmanyi kũkamoaa, Na kalengo ka ndia kakasyananga." 
Proverbs1:33 Ĩndĩ o ũla ũmbĩthukĩĩsya akatũaa eyelelye, Na akekala athũmũĩte vate w’ĩa wa ũthũku." 
Proverbs2:1 Mwana wakwa, ethĩwa ũkakwata ndeto syakwa, Na kwiaa mĩao yakwa nthĩnĩ waku," 
Proverbs2:2 O na kũtea kũtũ kwaku wose ũĩ, Na kũnengana ngoo yaku ũmanyinĩ;" 
Proverbs2:3 Ĩĩ, ethĩwa ũkaĩĩa kũvathũkan’ya kũseo, Na kũkĩlya wasya waku wone ũmanyi;" 
Proverbs2:4 Ethĩwa ũkoomantha ta vetha, Na kũmantha ta syĩndũ mbithe syĩ vata mũno:" 
Proverbs2:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wĩmanya kũmũkĩa Yeova, Na kwona ũĩ wa Ngai." 
Proverbs2:6 Nũndũ Yeova nũnenganae ũĩ; Kanyw’anĩ wake vaumaa ũmanyĩsyo na ũmanyi: 
Proverbs2:7 Aiaa ũĩ mwĩanĩu kwondũ wa ala alũngalu; Nake nĩ ngao kwa ala maendaa wĩanĩunĩ; 
Proverbs2:8 Kana atonye kũsũvĩa nzĩa sya ũsili wa katĩ, Na kũsũvĩaa mĩendele ya atheu make." 
Proverbs2:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wĩmanya ũlũngalu na usili wa w’o, Na katĩ, ĩĩ, kĩla nzĩa nzeo." 
Proverbs2:10 Nũndũ ũĩ ũkalika ngoonĩ yaku, Na ũmanyi ũkendeesya ngoo yaku;" 
Proverbs2:11 Kĩlĩko kĩkakũsyaĩĩasya; Ũmanyi ũkakũsũvĩaa: 
Proverbs2:12 Kũũvonokya kuma mĩendelenĩ mĩthũku, Kuma andũnĩ ala maneenaa maũndũ ma ngũlũ;" 
Proverbs2:13 Ala matiaa nzĩa sya ũlũngalu, Maendae mĩendelenĩ ya kĩvindu;" 
Proverbs2:14 Ala matanaw’a nĩ kwĩka ũthũku, Na kwendeew’a nĩ ngũlũ ya ũla mũthũku;" 
Proverbs2:15 Ala athyoekangu mĩendelenĩ yoo, Na me na ngũlũ nzĩanĩ syoo:" 
Proverbs2:16 Kũũvonokya kwa mũndũ mũka mũeni, O kwa ũsu wa nthĩ ĩngĩ ũla wendeeasya na ndeto syake sya ũkathĩĩo;" 
Proverbs2:17 Ũla wũlawa nĩ mũnyanyae wake wa ũika wake, Na wũlawa nĩ ũtianĩo wa Ngai wake:" 
Proverbs2:18 Nũndũ nyũmba yake yangĩe kĩkw’ũnĩ, Na nzĩa syake kwa ala akw’ũ;" 
Proverbs2:19 Kũti waasyoka ĩngĩ alika kwake, O na kũvikĩa nzĩa sya thayũ:" 
Proverbs2:20 Nĩ kana ũende mũendelenĩ wa andũ aseo, Na kũkwata nzĩa sya alũngalu." 
Proverbs2:21 Nũndũ ala alũngalu makatũa ĩ nthĩ, Na ala eanĩu makamĩkalaa." 
Proverbs2:22 Ĩndĩ ala athũku makavetwa kuma ĩ nthĩ, Na nzeleke ikakũanĩw’a na mĩi syume nthĩnĩ wayo." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwana wakwa, ndũkolwe nĩ mĩao yakwa; Ĩndĩ ngoo yaku nĩlũmye mĩao yakwa:" 
Proverbs3:2 Nũndũ ĩkakwongeleela mĩthenya mingĩ, Na myaka ya thayũ na mũuo," 
Proverbs3:3 Ndũkaaĩtĩkĩle ũseo na w’o ikũtie: Syoveee ngingonĩ yaku; Iandĩke ĩsengeanĩ ya ngoo yaku: 
Proverbs3:4 Na ĩndĩ ũkoona ũseo na ũmanyi mũseo Methonĩ ma Ngai na ma mũndũ. 
Proverbs3:5 Ĩkĩĩa Yeova na ngoo yaku yonthe, Na ndũkekwatye ũmanyi waku mwene:" 
Proverbs3:6 Mĩendelenĩ yaku yonthe mũkũsĩĩe we, Na akaũlũngalĩlya nzĩa syaku." 
Proverbs3:7 Ndũkethĩwe na ũĩ wa metho maku mwene; Mũkĩe Yeova, na ũitia ũthũku:" 
Proverbs3:8 Ũkakwĩkĩa vinya mũkonyo waku, Na mũthungo mavĩndĩ maku." 
Proverbs3:9 Mũtaĩe Yeova na syĩndũ syaku, Na ũsyao wa mbee wa wingĩvo waku w’onthe:" 
Proverbs3:10 Na kwondũ wa ũu makũmbĩ maku makausũwa nĩ wingĩ, Na maviva maku makausũa na kũng’okwa nĩ mbinyu mbĩthĩ." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwana wakwa, ndũkavũthye makũna ma Yeova; O na ndũkanow’e nĩ mokan’yo make:" 
Proverbs3:12 Nũndũ ũla Yeova ũmwendaa nũmũkanasya, O tondũ ĩthe wĩkaa mwana ũla ũtanaa kwondũ wake." 
Proverbs3:13 Mũndũ nĩ mũtanu ũla wonaa ũĩ, Na mũndũ ũla ũkwataa ũmanyi." 
Proverbs3:14 Nũndũ kwĩthĩwa naw’o kwĩ kavaa kwĩ kwĩthĩwa na vetha, Na ũtandĩthyo waw’o kwĩ thaavu ũla mũseo." 
Proverbs3:15 Wĩ na vata mũno kwĩ tũvila twa maliani: Na vati kĩmwe kya syĩndũ ila ũtonya kwenda kĩtonya kũvw’ananw’a naw’o. 
Proverbs3:16 Mĩthenya mingĩ yĩ kw’okonĩ kwaw’o kwa aũme; Kw’okonĩ kwaw’o kwa aka ve mothwii na ndaĩa. 
Proverbs3:17 Mĩendele yaw’o nĩ mĩendele ya kwendeesya, Na nzĩa syaw’o syonthe nĩ sya mũuo." 
Proverbs3:18 Nĩ mũtĩ wa thayũ kwa ala mokwataa: Na kĩla ũmwe nĩ mũtanu ũla wĩkalaa naw’o. 
Proverbs3:19 Yeova kwondũ wa ũĩ nĩwakwatisye wambĩlĩlyo wa nthĩ; Kwondũ wa ũmanyi nĩwalũlũmĩlye matu. 
Proverbs3:20 Kwondũ wa ũmanyi wake syũngũ nĩsyavingũkie, Na matu nĩmavolotangasya ĩmwe." 
Proverbs3:21 Mwana wakwa, ndũkaeke syume methonĩ maku; Sũvĩa ũĩ mwĩanĩu na kĩlĩko:" 
Proverbs3:22 Kwondũ wa ũu ikeethĩwa thayũ wa ngoo yaku, Na mumo ngingonĩ yaku." 
Proverbs3:23 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wĩendaa mĩendelenĩ yaku wĩyelele, Na kũũ kwaku kũtikalulutĩka." 
Proverbs3:24 Yĩla wĩkoma, ndũkakĩa: Ĩĩ, ũkakoma, na too waku ũkeethĩwa wĩ mũyo." 
Proverbs3:25 Ndũkakĩe w’ĩa wa kĩthũlũmũko, O na wanangĩko wa ala athũku, yĩla wĩũka:" 
Proverbs3:26 Nũndũ Yeova akeethĩwa ũĩkĩĩi waku, Na akakũsũvĩa kũũ kwaku kũikakwatw’e." 
Proverbs3:27 Ndũkamaime ũndũ ũseo ala maĩlwe nĩw’o, Yĩla wĩ ũtonyinĩ wa kw’oko kwaku wa kũwĩka." 
Proverbs3:28 Ndũkatavye mũtũi waku, Enda, na ũkyũka ĩngĩ, Na ũnĩ ngakũnenga; Naku nũkwete ĩ kĩndũ." 
Proverbs3:29 Ndũkasũanĩĩe mũtũi waku ũthũku, Nũndũ atwĩe eyelele vakuvĩ naku." 
Proverbs3:30 Ndũkatetan’ye na mũndũ vate kĩtumi, Ethĩwa ndakwĩkĩte ũthũku." 
Proverbs3:31 Ndũkamwĩw’ĩe kĩwĩu mũndũ wa ũng’endu, Na ndũkanyuve o na ũmwe wa mĩendele yake." 
Proverbs3:32 Nũndũ ũla wĩ ngũlũ nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ ũnyanya wake nĩ wake na ũla mũlũngalu. 
Proverbs3:33 Kĩumo kya Yeova kĩ nyũmbanĩ ya ũla mũthũku; Ĩndĩ nũathimaa ũtũo wa ala alũngalu. 
Proverbs3:34 Vate ndĩi nũvũthasya ala mavũthasya; Ĩndĩ anengae mumo ala menyivasya. 
Proverbs3:35 Ala oĩ makatiĩwa ndaĩa; Ĩndĩ nthoni ikeethĩwa ũnene wa ndia. 
Proverbs4:1 Ĩw’ai, ana makwa, ũmanyĩsyo wa ĩthe, Na ĩnenganei mũmanye ũmanyi:" 
Proverbs4:2 Nũndũ nĩngũmũnenga ũmanyĩsyo mũseo; Mũtikatie mĩao yakwa. 
Proverbs4:3 Nũndũ naĩ mwana kwa ĩthe wakwa, Mwololo na ũla mwende methonĩ ma mwaitũ." 
Proverbs4:4 Na amanyĩisye, na ambĩa: Ngoo yaku yĩkale na ndeto syakwa; Kwata mĩao yakwa, na ĩthĩwa thayũ;" 
Proverbs4:5 Ĩyosee ũĩ, ĩyosee ũmanyi; Ndũkolwe, ndũkatiũũke kuma ndetonĩ sya kanyw’a wakwa;" 
Proverbs4:6 Ndũkaotie, na ũkakwĩkalasya; Wende, na ũkakũsũvĩaa." 
Proverbs4:7 Ũĩ nĩ ũndũ ũnene mbee; kwondũ wa ũu ĩyosee ũĩ; Ĩĩ, na vamwe na kwosa kwaku kw’onthe ĩyosee ũmanyi." 
Proverbs4:8 Ũnenevye, naw’o ũkakũnenevya; Ũkakũete ndaĩanĩ, yĩla wĩwĩvĩtĩĩsya." 
Proverbs4:9 Ũkanenga mũtwe waku ngovia ya mumo; Ngovia ya ũsumbĩ ya ũseo ũkakũnenga. 
Proverbs4:10 Ĩw’a, we mwana wakwa, na osa ndeto syakwa; Na myaka ya thayũ waku ĩkeethĩwa mingĩ." 
Proverbs4:11 Nĩnaũmanyĩsya nzĩanĩ ya ũĩ; Nĩnaũtongoesya nzĩanĩ sya ũlũngalu. 
Proverbs4:12 Yĩla wĩendeeaa, matambya maku matikavivinyawa; Na ethĩwa nũkũsemba, ndũkalulutĩka." 
Proverbs4:13 Kwata ũlũmye ũmanyĩsyo; ndũkaeke ũthi: Ũsũvĩe; nũndũ nĩ thayũ waku. 
Proverbs4:14 Ndũkalike nzĩanĩ ya ala athũku, Na ndũkathi mũendelenĩ wa andũ athũku." 
Proverbs4:15 Myathũkĩe, ndũkamĩvĩtĩle; Ĩthyũũe kũmyuma, na endeea na mbee." 
Proverbs4:16 Nũndũ matikoma, ate o kwĩka ũthũku; Na too woo nũvetawa, ethĩwa mativalũkasya amwe." 
Proverbs4:17 Nũndũ maĩsaa lĩu wa ũthũku, Na kũnyw’a mbinyu ya ũng’endu." 
Proverbs4:18 Ĩndĩ nzĩa ya alũngalu nĩ ta kyeni kya kũikya, Kĩla kĩkenaa mbee na mbee kũvika mũthenya mwĩanĩu." 
Proverbs4:19 Mũendele wa ũthũku nĩ ta kĩvindu: Matyĩsĩ kĩla kĩmalulutĩkasya. 
Proverbs4:20 Mwana wakwa, ĩthukĩĩsye ndeto syakwa; Tea kũtũ kwaku wĩw’e ndeto syakwa." 
Proverbs4:21 Itikaaume methonĩ maku; Syĩkalye ngoonĩ yaku nthĩnĩ. 
Proverbs4:22 Nũndũ nĩsyo thayũ kwa ala masyonaa, Na vinya wa mĩĩ yoo yonthe." 
Proverbs4:23 Ĩkalya ngoo yaku na ũthangaau w’onthe; Nũndũ maũndũ ma thayũ maumaa kwayo. 
Proverbs4:24 Veta kwaku kanyw’a wĩ ũng’endu, Na ilomo syĩ ngũlũ veta kũasa naku." 
Proverbs4:25 Metho maku masisye o mbee ki, Na ilomo sya itho yaku ikĩsisya syelekele mbee waku." 
Proverbs4:26 Tindimalya nzĩa ya nyaĩĩ syaku, Na mĩendele yaku yonthe ĩthĩwe ĩmĩlũlũmĩlye." 
Proverbs4:27 Ndũkaaĩthyũũe ngalĩ ya kw’oko kwa aũme kana kwa aka: Umya kũũ kwaku ũthũkunĩ. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwana wakwa, ĩthukĩĩsye ũĩ wakwa; Tea kũtũ kwaku wose ũmanyi wakwa:" 
Proverbs5:2 Nĩ kana ũtonye kũsũvĩa kĩlĩko, Na kana ilomo syaku itonye kũlũmya ũmanyi." 
Proverbs5:3 Nũndũ ilomo sya mũndũ mũka mũeni ilovotangasya ũkĩ wa nzũkĩ, Na kanyw’a wake nĩ mũtendeu kwĩ mauta:" 
Proverbs5:4 Ĩndĩ mũminũkĩlyonĩ e ũũ ta mũtĩ wĩ ũũ, Mũĩ ta ũvyũ mũĩ ngalĩ syelĩ." 
Proverbs5:5 Maũũ make matheeaa kĩkw’ũnĩ; Matambya make malũmanĩtye na Seoli; 
Proverbs5:6 Kwondũ wa ũu ndonaa nzĩa ndindimalu ya thayũ: Mĩendele yake ti mĩlũmu, na ndamanya ũu." 
Proverbs5:7 Na yu kwondũ wa ũu, ana makwa, mbĩthukĩĩsyei, Na mũikatie ndeto sya kanyw’a wakwa." 
Proverbs5:8 Veta mũendele waku kũasa nake, Na ndũkathi vakuvĩ na mũomo wa nyũmba yake;" 
Proverbs5:9 Ndũkese kũnenga angĩ ndaĩa yaku, Na myaka yaku ala ai;" 
Proverbs5:10 Aeni matikese kusũwa nĩ vinya waku, Na mawĩa maku kwĩthĩwa nyũmbanĩ ya mũndũ wa nthĩ ĩngĩ," 
Proverbs5:11 Naku ũkesa kũĩa mũminũkĩlyonĩ waku, Yĩla nyama syaku na mwĩĩ waku ikathela," 
Proverbs5:12 Na kwasya, Ũndũ namenete ũmanyĩsyo, Na ngoo yakwa yavũthĩtye ũkan’yo;" 
Proverbs5:13 O na ndaaĩthukĩĩsya wasya wa amanyĩsya makwa, Kana kũtea kũtũ kwakwa kwa ala mandaaa!" 
Proverbs5:14 Natielye o vanini nĩthĩwe ũthũkunĩ w’onthe Nĩ nthĩnĩ wa ũmbano na ĩkomano. 
Proverbs5:15 Nyusaa manzĩ kuma kĩthimanĩ kyaku mwene kĩla kyakĩtwe, Na manzĩ ala mavĩtaa kuma kĩthimanĩ kyaku mwene." 
Proverbs5:16 Mbuluti syaku nĩsyaĩle kũnyaĩĩkw’a kũũ na kũũ, Na tũlũsĩ twa manzĩ nzĩanĩ nene?" 
Proverbs5:17 Methĩwe kwondũ waku wĩ weka, Na ti kwondũ wa aeni ala me kwaku." 
Proverbs5:18 Nthongo yaku nĩathimwe; Noitanĩa kĩveti kyaku kya ũthoo. 
Proverbs5:19 Ta ndaatai nga yĩ wendo na ngondi nga yendeeasya, Nondo syakyo nikwĩanĩae mavinda onthe; Naku ũtanĩthaw’e mavinda onthe nĩ wendo wakyo." 
Proverbs5:20 Nũndũ nĩkĩ we, mwana wakwa, ũtanĩthaw’a nĩ kĩveti kĩeni, Na kũvĩtĩanĩsya kĩthũi na ũla wa nthĩ ĩngĩ?" 
Proverbs5:21 Nũndũ mĩendele ya mũndũ yĩ mbee wa metho ma Yeova; Na nũtindimalasya nzĩa syake syonthe. 
Proverbs5:22 Mothũku make mwene makakwata ũla mũthũku, Na akalũmw’a nĩ ndii sya naĩ yake." 
Proverbs5:23 Akakw’a ũndũ wa kwaa ũmanyĩsyo; Na ũtumanunĩ wake mũnene akaa. 
Proverbs6:1 Mwana wakwa, ethĩwa nũtw’ĩkĩte mũĩkĩĩwa kwa mũtũi waku, Ethĩwa nĩwakwatanie moko maku na mũeni;" 
Proverbs6:2 Nũkwatĩtw’e nĩ ndeto sya kanyw’a waku, Nũtwaĩtwe nĩ ndeto sya kanyw’a waku." 
Proverbs6:3 Ĩka ũũ yu, mwana wakwa, na ũkĩvonokya mwene, Nũndũ nĩwalika kw’okonĩ kwa mũtũi waku: Enda, wĩnyivye, noimwĩsũva mũtũi waku;" 
Proverbs6:4 Ndũkaeke metho maku makome, Kana kwombosya kwa ilomo sya metho maku;" 
Proverbs6:5 Ĩvonokye ta kĩlong’a kuma kw’okonĩ kwa mũsyĩmi, Na ta nyũnyi kuma kw’okonĩ kwa mũtei wayo." 
Proverbs6:6 Enda vala ve nditikũ, we ũla mũtulu; Syaĩĩsya mĩkĩle yasyo, na ũkyũĩva:" 
Proverbs6:7 Ila ite mũnene, Mũsyaĩĩsya kana mũsumbĩki" 
Proverbs6:8 Syĩyiĩaa lĩu wasyo ĩvinda ya syũa, Na kwĩyũmbanĩsya lĩu wayo ĩvinda ya ngetha." 
Proverbs6:9 Ũkakoma kũvika ĩndĩĩ, we mũtulu? Ũkookĩla kuma toonĩ waku ĩndĩĩ?" 
Proverbs6:10 No kũkomanga vanini, kwombosya vanini, O vanini kũkwatan’ya syaa na kũkoma:" 
Proverbs6:11 O ta ũu ũkya waku ũkooka ta mũvutani, Na kwaĩwa kwaku ta mũndũ wĩkĩĩte mĩio ya kaũ." 
Proverbs6:12 Mũndũ ũte vata, mũndũ wa ũthũku, Nĩ ũla ũendaa na kanyw’a wĩ ngũlũ;" 
Proverbs6:13 Ũla ũvenanĩasya na metho make, ũla ũneenaa na maũũ make, Ũla wonanasya na syaa syake;" 
Proverbs6:14 Ũla ngoonĩ yake ve ngũlũ, Ũla ũsũanĩaa ũthũku ĩndĩ yonthe, Ũla ũvuĩaa kĩthokoo." 
Proverbs6:15 Kwondũ wa ũu wanangĩko wake mũnene ũkooka na kĩthũlũmũko; O mĩtũkĩ akaanangĩka vate mũiito. 
Proverbs6:16 Ve maũndũ thanthatũ ala Yeova ũmenete; Ĩĩ, mũonza ala me ũthatyo kwake:" 
Proverbs6:17 Metho me mĩtũlyo, ũĩmĩ ũla ũneenaa ũvũngũ, Moko ala metĩkasya nthakame ĩte ĩvĩtyo;" 
Proverbs6:18 Ngoo ĩla ĩsũanĩaa maũndũ mathũku, Maũũ ala mekalaataa kwĩka ũthũku," 
Proverbs6:19 Ngũsĩ ya ũvũngũ ĩla ĩneenaa movũngũ, Na ũla ũvuĩaa kĩthokoo katĩ wa ana‐aasa." 
Proverbs6:20 Mwana wakwa, kwata mwĩao wa ĩthe waku, Na ndũkatie mwĩao wa inyia waku:" 
Proverbs6:21 Myoveee ngoonĩ yaku ĩndĩ yonthe; Myoveee ngingonĩ yaku. 
Proverbs6:22 Yĩla wĩendaa ĩkakũtongoeasya; Yĩla wĩkomaa, ĩkakũsyaĩĩasya; Na yĩla wĩamũkaa, ĩkaneenaa naku." 
Proverbs6:23 Nũndũ mwĩao nĩ taa; na mĩao nĩ kyeni; Na mokan’yo ma ũmanyĩsyo nĩ nzĩa ya thayũ: 
Proverbs6:24 Kũkũsũvĩa vala ve mũndũ mũka mũthũku, Kwa kwendeesya na ndeto sya ũkathĩĩo kwa ũĩmĩ wa mũndũ wa nthĩ ĩngĩ." 
Proverbs6:25 Ndũkew’ĩe mũmbĩlwe wake mũseo ĩtomo ngoonĩ yaku; O na ndũketĩkĩle akũkwate na ilomo sya metho make. 
Proverbs6:26 Nũndũ wa ĩlwaya mũndũ mũũme nũvikaa vala ũtonya kwaĩwa nĩ kalungu ka mũkate; Na kĩlaalai nĩkĩsyĩmaa thayũ ũla wĩ vata mũno. 
Proverbs6:27 Mũndũ nũtonya kũkua mwaki kĩthũinĩ kyake, Na ngũa syake ikalea kũvya?" 
Proverbs6:28 Kana mũndũ nũtonya kũkinyĩla ĩũlũ wa makaa me mwaki, Na maũũ make makalea kũvya?" 
Proverbs6:29 No ta ũu ũla ũlikaa kwa kĩveti kya mũtũi wake; O ũla ũkĩkiita ndatĩa kũsilĩlwa. 
Proverbs6:30 Andũ mativũthasya kĩng’ei, ethĩwa kĩũya Ũndũ wa kwĩyĩanĩsya yĩla kĩ na nzaa:" 
Proverbs6:31 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa kĩkakwatwa, kĩkatũnga kũndũ mũonza; Kĩkanengane syĩndũ syonthe sya nyũmba yakyo." 
Proverbs6:32 Ũla wĩkaa ũlaalai na mũndũ mũka nde na ũmanyi: Ũla ũkwenda kwananga ngoo yake mwene nũwĩkaa. 
Proverbs6:33 Mawũkite na kwanangĩwa ndaĩa akakwata, Na kũvũthw’a kwake kũtikavangũlĩka." 
Proverbs6:34 Nũndũ kĩwĩu nĩ ũthatu mwai wa mũndũ; Nake ndakew’ĩa tei mũthenya wa kũĩvanĩsya. 
Proverbs6:35 Ndaketĩkĩla mbovosya o na yĩva; Ndakeanĩwa, o na wamũnenga mĩthĩnzĩo mingĩ." 
Proverbs7:1 Mwana wakwa, kwata ndeto syakwa, Noyia mĩao yakwa vala ũĩ." 
Proverbs7:2 Kwata mĩao yakwa na kwĩkala thayũ; Na ũmanyĩsyo wakwa ta kyũma kya itho yaku. 
Proverbs7:3 Myoveee syaanĩ syaku; Mĩandĩke masengeanĩ ma ngoo yaku. 
Proverbs7:4 Tavya ũĩ, Nue mwĩĩtu‐a‐ia; Na ĩta ũmanyi mũndũ mũka wa mũvĩa waku:" 
Proverbs7:5 Nĩ kana ikũsiĩĩe kwa mũndũ mũka mũeni, Kwa mũndũ mũka wa nthĩ ĩngĩ ũla wendeeasya na ndeto syake sya ũkathĩĩo." 
Proverbs7:6 Nũndũ mbũthinĩ ya nyũmba yakwa Nasyaĩlya mĩtĩnĩ yakwa mĩkelangan’ye; 
Proverbs7:7 Na noona katĩ wa ala mate ũmanyi, Na namũvathũkan’ya katĩ wa imwana, Mwanake ũte na ũmanyi," 
Proverbs7:8 Aivĩtĩla nzĩanĩ nene vakuvĩ kĩkotonĩ kya ũ mũndũ mũka; Nake athi na nzĩa ya nyũmba ya mũndũ mũka ũsu," 
Proverbs7:9 Ũmithinĩ, wĩoo wa mũthenya, Ũtukũ katĩ na kĩvindunĩ." 
Proverbs7:10 Na, sisya, mũndũ mũka akomana nake Ekĩĩte ngũa ya ĩlwaya na e na ũseleke wa ngoo." 
Proverbs7:11 (E na kĩlonzo na ũng’endu; Maũũ make matyĩkalaa nyũmbanĩ yake: 
Proverbs7:12 Oyu e nzĩanĩ nene, yu e kũndũnĩ kũthanthau, Na oveesya kĩla kĩkotonĩ.)" 
Proverbs7:13 Na ĩndĩ ũ mũndũ mũka amũkwata, na amũmumun’ya, Na e na ũthyũ ũte nthoni amwĩa:" 
Proverbs7:14 Nthembo sya nthembo sya mũuo syĩ nakwa; Ũmũnthĩ nĩnĩanĩsye mawĩvĩto makwa. 
Proverbs7:15 Kwondũ wa ũu nĩnaumaala kũkomana naku, Kũmantha ũthyũ waku na kĩthing’ĩĩsyo, na nĩnakwona." 
Proverbs7:16 Nĩnalanĩtye ũkomo wakwa mũto mũseo mũno, Na ngũa syĩ nzoa sya ndii sya Misili." 
Proverbs7:17 Nĩnyungĩthĩtye ũkomo wakwa Na manemane, na uuti, na mũtalasini." 
Proverbs7:18 Ũka, twose wĩanĩu witũ wa wendo kũvika kĩoko; Twĩtan’ye ene na mawendo." 
Proverbs7:19 Nũndũ ũ mũndũ mũũme nde mũsyĩ; Nĩ mũendu kyalo kĩasa: 
Proverbs7:20 Nũendete na mũvuko wa mbesa; Akenũka mwei walũma nthĩ. 
Proverbs7:21 Na nũndũ wa ndeto syake nyingĩ sya kwendeesya nũmwĩtĩkĩlĩthasya; Kwondũ wa kwendeesya na ndeto sya ũkathĩĩo sya ilomo syake nũmũkusasya. 
Proverbs7:22 Nake nũmũatĩĩaa mĩtũkĩ, O tondũ ng’ombe ĩendaa kĩthĩnzĩonĩ, Kana ta ũmwe mũtumanu ũmanyĩaw’a na mbĩngũ;" 
Proverbs7:23 Kũvika mũsyĩ ũtonye ĩtema yake; Tondũ nyũnyi ĩkalaataa kũthi vala ve kĩtei, Na ndĩsĩ atĩ nĩ kwondũ wa thayũ wayo." 
Proverbs7:24 Yu kwondũ wa ũu, ana makwa, mbĩw’ai, Na ĩthukĩĩsyei ndeto sya kanyw’a wakwa." 
Proverbs7:25 Ngoo yaku ĩtikelekele mĩendele yake; Ndũkaĩe nzĩanĩ syake. 
Proverbs7:26 Nũndũ nake nĩwavalũkilye nthĩ aingĩ me okite: Ĩĩ, oawa make onthe nĩ nguthu yĩ vinya." 
Proverbs7:27 Nyũmba yake nĩ nzĩa ya kũthi Seoli, Kũtheea tũsũmbanĩ twa kĩkw’ũ." 
Proverbs8:1 Ũĩ ndũkayaa, Na ũmanyi kumya wasya waw’o?" 
Proverbs8:2 Ĩũlũ wa kũndũ kũtũlu nzĩanĩ, Vala nzĩa ikomanĩe, nũũngamaa;" 
Proverbs8:3 Vakuvĩ na mbingĩlo, ũlikĩlonĩ wa ndũa, Ũlikĩlonĩ mĩomonĩ, nĩwũkĩlĩlasya wasya mũnene:" 
Proverbs8:4 Inyw’ĩ aũme, nĩngũmwĩta; Na wasya wakwa nĩ kwa ana ma andũ." 
Proverbs8:5 Inyw’ĩ mũte ũmanyi, manyai ũĩ; Na, inyw’ĩ ndia, ĩthĩwai na ngoo yĩ ũmanyi." 
Proverbs8:6 Ĩw’ai, nũndũ nganeena maũndũ manene; Na kũtumũka kwa ilomo syakwa kũkeethĩwa maũndũ ma w’o." 
Proverbs8:7 Nũndũ kanyw’a wakwa ũkaneena w’o; Na ũthũku nĩ ũthatyo kwa ilomo syakwa. 
Proverbs8:8 Ndeto syonthe sya kanyw’a wakwa nĩ ndũngalu; Vati ũndũ mũthyoeku kana ngũlũ nthĩnĩ wasyo. 
Proverbs8:9 Syonthe syĩ ũtheinĩ kwa ũla ũmanyaa, Na sya w’o kwa ala monaa ũmanyi." 
Proverbs8:10 Osa ũmanyĩsyo wakwa, na ti vetha; Na ũmanyi kwĩ thaavu mũseo mũno." 
Proverbs8:11 Nũndũ ũĩ nĩ kavaa kwĩ tũvila twa maliani; Na syĩndũ syonthe ila itonya kwendua ititonya kũelekanw’a naw’o. 
Proverbs8:12 Nyie ũĩ, nĩndw’ĩte kĩlĩko vandũ vakwa va ũtũa, Na kũmantha ũmanyi na ũi wa kĩlĩko." 
Proverbs8:13 Kũmũkĩa Yeova nĩkw’o kũmena ũthũku: Ngathĩĩo, na wĩnenevyo, na mũendele mũthũku, Na kanyw’a wĩ ngũlũ, isu nĩngwimena." 
Proverbs8:14 Ũtao nĩ wakwa, na ũĩ mwĩanĩu: Ninyie ũmanyi; nĩ na ũtonyi." 
Proverbs8:15 Kwondũ wakwa asumbĩ nĩmasumbĩkaa, Na anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ nĩmatusaa katĩ." 
Proverbs8:16 Kwondũ wakwa anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ nĩmasumbĩkaa, Na ala me ndaĩa, o na asili onthe ma nthĩ." 
Proverbs8:17 Nĩnĩmendaa ala mambendaa; Na ala mamanthaa na kĩthing’ĩĩsyo makambona. 
Proverbs8:18 Ũthwii na ndaĩa syĩ nakwa; Ĩĩ, ũthwii ũla wĩkalaa na ũlũngalu." 
Proverbs8:19 Ũsyao wakwa nĩ mũseo kwĩ thaavu, ĩĩ, kwĩ thaavu mũseo mũno; Na wongeleko wakwa kwĩ vetha mũseo." 
Proverbs8:20 Nĩendaa nzĩanĩ ya ũlũngalu, Katĩ wa nzĩa sya ũsili wa katĩ;" 
Proverbs8:21 Nĩ kana nĩtume ala mambendaa matiĩwa ũthwii, Na nĩ kana nusũsye kũndũ kwoo kũla kwiawa ũthwii." 
Proverbs8:22 Yeova aĩ nakwa mwambĩlĩlyonĩ wa nzĩa yake, Mbee wa mawĩa make ma tene." 
Proverbs8:23 Nĩnookĩlilw’e kuma tene tene, kuma mwambĩlĩlyonĩ, Nthĩ ĩtanamba kwĩthĩwa." 
Proverbs8:24 Yĩla kũtaĩ syũngũ, nyie nĩnaumĩlĩtw’e, Yĩla kũtaĩ nthongo syĩ na manzĩ maingĩ." 
Proverbs8:25 Iĩma itanamba kũlũlũmĩlw’a, Mbee wa tũlĩma nyie nĩnaumĩlĩtw’e;" 
Proverbs8:26 Yĩla ũtaĩ anamba kũtw’ĩkĩthya nthĩ, kana isesi, Kana mwambĩlĩlyo wa kĩtoo kya nthĩ." 
Proverbs8:27 Yĩla walũmilye matu, naĩ vo: Yĩla waiie kilinge ĩũlũ wa ĩ kyũngũ," 
Proverbs8:28 Yĩla walũmilye matu ĩũlũ, Yĩla nthongo sya ĩ kyũngũ syatw’ĩkie syĩ vinya," 
Proverbs8:29 Yĩla wanengie ũkanga mũvaka waw’o, Kana manzĩ matikavĩtye mwĩao wake, Yĩla watwie myambĩlĩlyo ya nthĩ;" 
Proverbs8:30 Ĩvinda yĩu naĩ vakuvĩ nake, mũthũkũmi mũnene; Na naĩ ũtanu wake kĩla mũthenya, Ngĩtanĩa mavinda onthe mbee wake," 
Proverbs8:31 Ngĩtanĩa nthĩ yake ĩtwĩe andũ; Na ũtanu wakwa waĩ na ana ma andũ. 
Proverbs8:32 Yu kwondũ wa ũu, ana makwa, mbĩthukĩĩsyai; Nũndũ nĩ aathime ala makwataa nzĩa syakwa." 
Proverbs8:33 Ĩw’ai ũmanyĩsyo, na ĩthĩwai oĩ, Na mũikolee." 
Proverbs8:34 Nĩmũathime mũndũ ũla ũmbĩw’aa, Akĩsyaĩĩsya kĩla mũthenya mbingĩlonĩ syakwa, Akyeteela mĩtĩnĩ yĩ ndee sya mĩomo yakwa." 
Proverbs8:35 Nũndũ ũla ũmbonaa nĩwonaa thayũ, Na akoona ũseo kwa Yeova." 
Proverbs8:36 Ĩndĩ ũla ũmbĩtanĩasya nĩwĩkaa ngoo yake mwene naĩ: Na onthe ala mamenaa nyie mendaa kĩkw’ũ. 
Proverbs9:1 Ũĩ nĩwakĩte nyũmba yaw’o; Nĩwasũvĩtye ituĩ mũonza syaw’o: 
Proverbs9:2 Nĩwũaĩte nyamũ syaw’o; nũvulanĩtye mbinyu yaw’o; O na nĩwalanĩtye mesa yaw’o: 
Proverbs9:3 Nũtũmĩte eĩtu maw’o; Nĩwũkĩlĩlasya wasya kũndũnĩ kũtũlu mbee kwa ndũa: 
Proverbs9:4 Ũla ũte na ũĩ, nĩathũkĩle vaa: Na ũndũ wa ũla ũte ũmanyi nũũmũtavya," 
Proverbs9:5 Ũkai, inyw’ĩ mũye lĩu wakwa, Na nyw’ai mbinyu ĩla nĩvulanĩtye." 
Proverbs9:6 Ekai, inyw’ĩ mũte na ũmanyi, na mũkĩkala thayũ; Na kũkinya nzĩanĩ ya ũmanyi." 
Proverbs9:7 Ũla ũmwonasya mũkaakaan’ya mavĩtyo nĩwĩyoseaa kũumangwa; Na ũla ũkanasya mũndũ mũthũku nĩwĩyoseaa ĩlanga. 
Proverbs9:8 Ndũkakan’ye mũkaakaan’ya, ndakese ũkũmena: Kan’ya mũndũ mũĩ, nake akakwenda." 
Proverbs9:9 Manyĩsya mũndũ mũĩ, nake akeethĩwa mũĩ mbee: Manyĩsya mũndũ mũlũngalu, nake akongeleka kwosa momanyĩsyo." 
Proverbs9:10 Kũmũkĩa Yeova nĩkw’o wambĩlĩlyo wa ũĩ; Na kũmũmanya Ũla Mũtheu nĩkw’o ũmanyi. 
Proverbs9:11 Nũndũ kwondũ wakwa mĩthenya yaku ĩkaingĩvw’a, Na myaka ya thayũ waku ĩkongeleelw’a." 
Proverbs9:12 Ethwa wĩ mũĩ wĩ mũĩ kwondũ waku mwene; Na ethĩwa nũkaakaanasya, we wĩ weka ũkookua." 
Proverbs9:13 Mũndũ mũka mũtumanu e na kĩlonzo; Nde ũmanyi, na ndesĩ ũndũ." 
Proverbs9:14 Nĩwĩkalaa mũomonĩ wa nyũmba yake, Kĩvĩlanĩ kĩ kũndũ kũtũlu kwa ndũa," 
Proverbs9:15 Amete ala meũvĩta, Ala maendete nzĩanĩ syoo:" 
Proverbs9:16 Ũla ũte na ũĩ, nĩathũkĩle vaa; Na ũle ũte ũmanyi, emwĩa," 
Proverbs9:17 Manzĩ moyĩtwe me mũyo, Na lĩu ũkĩĩwa kĩmbĩthĩnĩ nĩ wa kwendeesya." 
Proverbs9:18 Ĩndĩ ũ mũndũ ndesĩ atĩ akw’ũ me vo; Aeni ma ũ mũndũ mũka me syũngũnĩ sya Seoli. 
Proverbs10:1 Nthĩmo sya Solomoni. Mwana mũĩ nũtanĩthasya ĩthe; Ĩndĩ mwana mũtumanu nĩ kĩmako kya inyia wake. 
Proverbs10:2 Syĩndũ syũmbanĩtw’e na ũthũku itiunaa; Ĩndĩ ũlũngalu nũvonokasya kuma kĩkw’ũnĩ. 
Proverbs10:3 Yeova ndakaeka ngoo ya ũla mũlũngalu ĩnyale; Ĩndĩ nũluutĩĩlaa ũtee kwenda kwa ũla mũthũku. 
Proverbs10:4 Ũla ũtethasya wĩa na kw’oko kũleelu nũtw’ĩkaa ngya; Ĩndĩ kw’oko kwa ũla mũthingu nĩkũthuasya. 
Proverbs10:5 Ũla wũmbanasya ĩvinda ya syũa nĩ mwana mũĩ; Ĩndĩ ũla ũkomaa ĩvinda ya ngetha nĩ mwana ũla ũsonokasya. 
Proverbs10:6 Moathimo me ĩũlũ wa mũtwe wa ũla mũlũngalu; Ĩndĩ ũng’endu nũtumĩaw’a kanyw’anĩ wa ũla mũthũku. 
Proverbs10:7 Ũlilikano wa ũla mũlũngalu nĩ mũathimĩku; Ĩndĩ syĩtwa ya mũthũku yĩkoa. 
Proverbs10:8 Ala oĩ ngoonĩ makoosa mĩao; Ĩndĩ ndia ĩla ĩvulũkaa ndeto ĩkavalũka. 
Proverbs10:9 Ũla ũendaa na mĩendele myaĩlu aendaa na ũĩkĩĩi; Ĩndĩ ũla welelũkasya mĩendele yake akamanyĩka. 
Proverbs10:10 Ũla ũvenanĩasya na itho aetae woo; Ĩndĩ ndia ĩla ĩvulũkaa ndeto ĩkavalũka. 
Proverbs10:11 Kanyw’a wa alũngalu nĩ nthongo ya thayũ; Ĩndĩ ũng’endu nũtumĩaw’a kanyw’anĩ wa ũla mũthũku. 
Proverbs10:12 Kĩmena nĩkyũkĩlasya mateta; Ĩndĩ wendo nũvw’ĩkaa mavĩtyo onthe. 
Proverbs10:13 Ũĩ nĩwonekaa ilomonĩ sya ũla ũvathũkanasya maũndũ; Ĩndĩ ndata nĩ ya mũongo wa ũla ũte na ũmanyi. 
Proverbs10:14 Andũ oĩ maiaa ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ kanyw’a wa ũla mũtumanu nĩ wanangĩko wa yu. 
Proverbs10:15 Syĩndũ sya mũndũ mũthwii nĩ ndũa yake yĩ vinya: Wanangĩko wa ngya nĩ ũkya woo. 
Proverbs10:16 Wĩa wa ũla mũlũngalu wangĩe thayũnĩ; Wongeleko wa ũla mũthũku welekele naĩnĩ. 
Proverbs10:17 Ũla wĩw’aa aikanw’a e nzĩanĩ ya thayũ; Ĩndĩ ũla ũleaa ũkan’yo nũvĩtasya. 
Proverbs10:18 Ũla ũvithaa kĩmena nĩ wa ilomo ineenaa ũvũngũ; Na ũla ũneenaa nzukũ nĩ ndia. 
Proverbs10:19 Wingĩnĩ wa ndeto vatyaa ĩvĩtyo; Ĩndĩ ũla ũsiĩĩaa ilomo syake nĩwĩkaa na ũĩ. 
Proverbs10:20 Ũĩmĩ wa ũla mũlũngalu nĩ ta vetha mũseo: Ngoo ya ũla mũthũku nĩ ya vata mũnini. 
Proverbs10:21 Ilomo sya mũlũngalu niathĩasya aingĩ; Ĩndĩ atumanu makusaa nũndũ wa kwaa ũmanyi. 
Proverbs10:22 Ũathimo wa Yeova, naw’o nũthuasya; Na ndawongelanasya na woo." 
Proverbs10:23 Nĩ ta ĩthaũ kwa ndia kwĩka ũthũku; Now’o ũilyĩ ũĩ kwa mũndũ wĩ na ũmanyi. 
Proverbs10:24 W’ĩa wa mũthũku, naw’o ũkooka ĩũlũ wake; Na kwenda kwa alũngalu kũkeanĩwa." 
Proverbs10:25 Yĩla kĩlingi kyavĩta, mũthũku nde vo; Ĩndĩ ũla mũlũngalu nĩ wambĩlĩlyo wa tene na tene." 
Proverbs10:26 Tondũ siki ũtilyĩ maeonĩ, na tondũ syũki yĩtilyĩ methonĩ, Now’o mũtulu ũilyĩ kwa ala mamũtũmaa." 
Proverbs10:27 Kũmũkĩa Yeova nĩkwongelaa mĩthenya; Ĩndĩ myaka ya athũku ĩkakuvĩvw’a. 
Proverbs10:28 Wĩkwatyo wa mũlũngalu ũkeethĩwa ũtanu; Ĩndĩ weteelo wa mũthũku ũkaa. 
Proverbs10:29 Nzĩa ya Yeova nĩ ngome yĩ vinya kwa mũlũngalu; Ĩndĩ nĩ wanangĩko kwa eki ma naĩ. 
Proverbs10:30 Mũlũngalu ndakavetwa nongi; Ĩndĩ mũthũku ndakatũa ĩ nthĩ. 
Proverbs10:31 Kanyw’a wa mũlũngalu nĩwumasya ũĩ; Ĩndĩ ũĩmĩ wĩ ngũlũ ũkatilwa. 
Proverbs10:32 Ilomo sya mũlũngalu nĩsyĩsĩ kĩla kĩtĩkĩlĩkaa; Ĩndĩ kanyw’a wa mũthũku nũneenaa na ngũlũ. 
Proverbs11:1 Kĩthimi kya ũkengani nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ ĩvia yĩla yĩthimaa w’o nĩ ũtanu wake. 
Proverbs11:2 Yĩla ngathĩĩo yoka, nĩvo ĩndĩ nthoni yũkaa; Ĩndĩ ũĩ wĩ na ala menyivasya." 
Proverbs11:3 Wĩanĩu wa ala alũngalu ũkamatongoeasya; Ĩndĩ ngũlũ sya nzeleke ikasyananga. 
Proverbs11:4 Ũthwii ndwĩuna mũthenya wa ũthilĩku; Ĩndĩ ũlũngalu nũvonokasya kuma kĩkw’ũnĩ," 
Proverbs11:5 Ũlũngalu wa ũla mwĩanĩu ũkalũngalya mũendele wake; Ĩndĩ ũla mũthũku akavalũka kwondũ wa ũthũku wake mwene. 
Proverbs11:6 Ũlũngalu wa ala alũngalu ũkamavonokya; Ĩndĩ nzeleke ikakwatwa nĩ naĩ syasyo. 
Proverbs11:7 Yĩla mũndũ mũthũku ũkusaa, weteelo wake ũkaa; Na wĩkwatyo wa naĩ ũkyaa." 
Proverbs11:8 Ũla mũlũngalu nũvonokaw’a kuma thĩnanĩ; Na ũla mũthũku nũlikaa vandũ vake. 
Proverbs11:9 Mũndũ ũtakĩaa Ngai nĩwanangaa mũtũi wake na kanyw’a wake; Ĩndĩ kwondũ wa ũmanyi ũla mũlũngalu akavonokw’a. 
Proverbs11:10 Yĩla kũendaa nesa kwa ala alũngalu, ndũa nĩtanaa; Na yĩla ala athũku mekwaa, kwĩ mawasya matũlu." 
Proverbs11:11 Kwondũ wa ũathimo wa alũngalu ndũa nĩtaĩawa; Ĩndĩ nĩng’uthũlangawa nĩ kanyw’a wa athũku. 
Proverbs11:12 Ũla ũvũthasya mũtũi wake nde na ũĩ; Ĩndĩ mũndũ wĩ na ũmanyi nũvindasya. 
Proverbs11:13 Ũla wangangaa e mũsukani nũvuanasya nzama; Ĩndĩ ũla wa veva wĩ kĩthito nũvithaa ũndũ. 
Proverbs11:14 Vala vate ũtongoi mũĩ, andũ nĩmavalũkaa; Ĩndĩ vala ve wingĩ wa atai vati mũisyo." 
Proverbs11:15 Ũla ũtw’ĩkaa mũĩkĩĩwa kwondũ wa mũeni akathĩnw’a nĩ ũu; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmenaa ũvoo wa ũĩkĩĩthyo ũsu nĩ mwĩyelelu. 
Proverbs11:16 Mũndũ mũka mũseo nĩwĩkwatĩlaa ndaĩa; Na andũ ang’endu nĩmekwatĩlaa ũthwii. 
Proverbs11:17 Mũndũ wĩ tei nĩwĩkaa ngoo yake nesa; Ĩndĩ ũla mwai nũthĩnasya mwĩĩ wake mwene. 
Proverbs11:18 Ũla mũthũku nĩwĩyoseaa ĩtuvi ya ũkengani; Ĩndĩ ũla ũvuĩaa ũlũngalu e na ĩtuvi yĩte ngana. 
Proverbs11:19 Ũla mũlũmu ũlũngalunĩ akavikĩa thayũ; Ũla ũatĩĩaa ũthũku ekaa ũu kũvikĩa kĩkw’ũ kyake. 
Proverbs11:20 Ala me ngũlũ ngoonĩ nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ ala eanĩu mĩendelenĩ yoo nĩ ũtanu wake. 
Proverbs11:21 O na ethĩwa kw’oko kũkakwatana na kw’oko, mũndũ mũthũku ndakatĩa ũkũnwa; Ĩndĩ ũsyao wa ũla mũlũngalu ũkavonoka." 
Proverbs11:22 Ta ngome ya thaavu ĩnyiũũnĩ ya ngũlũe, Now’o ũilyĩ mũndũ mũka mwanake ũte na kĩlĩko." 
Proverbs11:23 Kwenda kwa alũngalu no ũseo; Ĩndĩ weteelo wa ala athũku nĩ ũthilĩku. 
Proverbs11:24 Kwĩ ũla ũnyaĩĩkaa, na ũyingĩva mũno mbee; Na kwĩ ũla ũimaa kũvĩtũka ũndũ waĩle, ĩndĩ ũendeeaa kwaĩwa." 
Proverbs11:25 Mũndũ mũlau akeethĩwa mũnou; Na ũla ũnyithasya akanyithw’a mwene. 
Proverbs11:26 Ũla ũimanaa lĩu wa mbaa ngetha, andũ makamũuma; Ĩndĩ ũathimo ũkeethĩwa mũtwenĩ wa ũla ũthooasya." 
Proverbs11:27 Ũla ũmanthaa ũseo na kĩthing’ĩĩsyo nũmanthaa ũndũ ũseo; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmanthaa ũthũku, ũkooka vala ũĩ." 
Proverbs11:28 Ũla ũĩkĩĩaa ũthwii wake akavalũka; Ĩndĩ ũla mũlũngalu akaaĩlaa ta ĩtũ yĩũ. 
Proverbs11:29 Ũla ũthĩnasya nyũmba yake mwene akatiĩwa kĩseve; Na ũla mũtumanu akeethĩwa mũthũkũmi wa ũla mũĩ ngoo. 
Proverbs11:30 Ũsyao wa ũla mũlũngalu nĩ mũtĩ wa thayũ; Na ũla mũĩ nĩwĩtĩkĩlĩthasya andũ. 
Proverbs11:31 Sisya, ala alũngalu makaĩvĩwa kũũ nthĩ; Nĩ mbee veana ata ala athũku na eki ma naĩ!" 
Proverbs12:1 O ũla wendaa kwonw’a mavĩtyo eendaa ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmenaa ũkan’yo nĩ ta nyamũ. 
Proverbs12:2 Mũndũ mũseo akoona ũseo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ mũndũ wa mosũanĩo mathũku akamũtw’a mũvĩtan’ya. 
Proverbs12:3 Mũndũ ndakalũlũmĩlw’a nĩ ũthũku; Ĩndĩ mũi wa ũla mũlũngalu ndũkathingithangw’a. 
Proverbs12:4 Mũndũ mũka mwaĩlu nĩ ngovia ya ũsumbĩ ya mũũme wake; Ĩndĩ ũla ũsonokasya nĩ ta wou mavĩndĩnĩ make. 
Proverbs12:5 Mosũanĩo ma ala alũngalu nĩ ma katĩ; Ĩndĩ motao ma ala athũku nĩ ũkengani. 
Proverbs12:6 Ndeto sya ala athũku nĩ sya kwoveesya nthakame; Ĩndĩ kanyw’a wa ala alũngalu ũkamavonokya. 
Proverbs12:7 Ala athũku nĩmanangawa, na mati vo; Ĩndĩ nyũmba ya ala alũngalu ĩkaũngama." 
Proverbs12:8 Mũndũ akataĩwa kwĩanana na ũĩ wake; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩ na ngoo yĩ ngũlũ akavũthw’a. 
Proverbs12:9 E kavaa ũla ũtalawa ta vathei, na e na mũthũkũmi, Kwĩ ũla wĩtaĩaa, na nde na lĩu." 
Proverbs12:10 Mũndũ mũlũngalu nũsiasya thayũ wa nyamũ yake; Ĩndĩ matei mololo ma ũla mũthũku no wai. 
Proverbs12:11 Ũla ũĩmaa nthĩ yake akeethĩwa na lĩu mwingĩ; Ĩndĩ ũla ũatĩĩaa andũ mate kĩĩĩ nde na ũmanyi. 
Proverbs12:12 Ũla mũthũku nĩwendaa kĩtei kya ala athe; Ĩndĩ mũi wa ũla mũlũngalu nũsyaa ũsyao. 
Proverbs12:13 Ĩvĩtyonĩ ya ilomo ve kĩtei kwa mũndũ mũthũku; Ĩndĩ ũla mũlũngalu akauma thĩnanĩ. 
Proverbs12:14 Mũndũ akeanĩw’a nĩ ũseo kwondũ wa ũsyao wa kanyw’a wake; Na meko ma moko ma mũndu makatũngwa kwake. 
Proverbs12:15 Nzĩa ya ndia nĩ ya w’o methonĩ mayo e yo; Ĩndĩ ũla mũĩ nĩwĩthukĩĩasya ũtao. 
Proverbs12:16 Ũthatu wa ndia nũmanyĩkaa ũtheinĩ; Ĩndĩ mũndũ wĩ kĩlĩko nũvithaa nthoni. 
Proverbs12:17 Ũla ũneenaa w’o nĩwonanasya ũlũngalu; Ĩndĩ ngũsĩ ya ũvũngũ, ũkengani." 
Proverbs12:18 Ve ũla ũneenaa mĩtũkĩ ateũsũanĩa ta kũtonyanga kwa ũvyũ; Ĩndĩ ũĩmĩ wa ũla mũĩ nũvoasya. 
Proverbs12:19 Kĩlomo kya w’o kĩkalũlũmĩlw’a tene na tene; Ĩndĩ ĩũmĩ ũneenaa ũvũngũ no wa kavinda kanini. 
Proverbs12:20 Ũkengani wĩ ngoonĩ ya ala masũanĩaa ũthũku; Ĩndĩ ala maseũvasya maũndũ ma mũuo kwoo nĩ ũtanu. 
Proverbs12:21 Vati ũthũku ũkekĩka kwa ũla mũlũngalu; Ĩndĩ ũla mũthũku akausũwa nĩ ũthũku. 
Proverbs12:22 Ilomo ila ineenaa ũvũngũ nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ ala mekaa w’o nĩ ũtanu wake. 
Proverbs12:23 Mũndũ wĩ kĩlĩko nũvithaa ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ ngoo ya ndia nĩtavanasya ũtumanu. 
Proverbs12:24 Kw’oko kwa ũla mũthingu kũkasumbĩka; Ĩndĩ ũla mũtulu akathũkũmĩthw’a. 
Proverbs12:25 Kĩmako ngoonĩ ya mũndũ nĩkĩminamasya; Ĩndĩ ndeto nzeo nĩmĩtanasya. 
Proverbs12:26 Ũla mũlũngalu nĩ mũtongoi wa mũtũi wake; Ĩndĩ mũendele wa ala athũku nũmavĩtĩthasya. 
Proverbs12:27 Mũndũ mũtulu ndavĩvasya kĩla wosaa aisyĩma; Syĩndũ syĩ vata mũno sya andũ nĩ kwondũ wa ala athingu. 
Proverbs12:28 Mũendelenĩ wa ũlũngalu ve thayũ; Na nzĩanĩ yaw’o vati kĩkw’ũ. 
Proverbs13:1 Mwana mũĩ nĩwĩw’aa ũmanyĩsyo wa ĩthe wake; Ĩndĩ mũkaakaan’ya ndew’aa ũkan’yo. 
Proverbs13:2 Mũndũ akaya ũseo kwondũ wa ũsyao wa kanyw’a wake; Ĩndĩ ngoo ya nzeleke ĩkaya ũng’endu. 
Proverbs13:3 Ũla ũsũvĩaa kanyw’a wake nĩwĩkalasya thayũ wake; Ĩndĩ ũla ũtumũkanganasya ilomo syake mũno akeethĩwa na wanangĩko. 
Proverbs13:4 Ngoo ya ũla mũtulu nĩyendaa, na ndĩ na kĩndũ; Ĩndĩ ngoo ya ũla mũthingu ĩkeethĩwa nou." 
Proverbs13:5 Mũndũ mũlũngalu nũmenaa movũngũ; Ĩndĩ mũndũ mũthũku nĩ ũtiiki, na avikĩaa kũsonoka." 
Proverbs13:6 Ũlũngalu nũsũvĩaa ũla mũlũngalu nzĩanĩ; Ĩndĩ ũthũku nĩwanangaa mũndũ mwathe. 
Proverbs13:7 Kwĩ ũla wĩthuasya, ĩndĩ nde kĩndũ: Kwĩ ũla wĩtusaa ngya, ĩndĩ e na ũthwii mwingĩ." 
Proverbs13:8 Mbovosya ya thayũ wa mũndũ nĩ ũthwii wake; Ĩndĩ ngya ndĩw’aa ũkan’yo. 
Proverbs13:9 Kyeni kya ũla mũlũngalu nĩkĩtanaa; Ĩndĩ taa wa ũla mũthũku ũkavow’a. 
Proverbs13:10 Kwondũ wa ngathĩĩo nĩkũkaa ngananĩo; Ĩndĩ kwa ala mataawa nesa kwĩ ũĩ. 
Proverbs13:11 Ũthwii ũla wonekaa na nzĩa ĩtaĩle ũkaolwa; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmbanasya kwondũ wa wĩa akeethĩwa na wongeleko. 
Proverbs13:12 Wĩkwatyo ũla ũtĩaa nũwaasya ngoo; Ĩndĩ kĩla kyendetwe kyooka, nĩ mũtĩ wa thayũ." 
Proverbs13:13 O ũla ũvũthasya ndeto nĩwĩeteae wanangĩko; Ĩndĩ ũla ũkĩaa mwĩao akatuvwa. 
Proverbs13:14 Mwĩao wa ũla mũĩ nĩ nthongo ya thayũ, Nĩ kana mũndũ atie itei sya kĩkw’ũ." 
Proverbs13:15 Ũmanyi mũseo nũetae ũseo; Ĩndĩ nzĩa ya mũvĩtan’ya nĩ nyũmũ. 
Proverbs13:16 Kĩla mũndũ wĩ kĩlĩko nũtethasya wĩa na ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ ndia nĩyonanasya ũtumanu wayo. 
Proverbs13:17 Mũtũmwa mũthũku nũvalũkaa naĩnĩ; Ĩndĩ mũtũmwa wĩ kĩthito nĩ wa ũvosya. 
Proverbs13:18 Ũkya na nthoni ikeethĩwa sya ũla ũleaa kwonw’a mavĩtyo; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩtĩkĩlaa ũkan’yo akataĩwa. 
Proverbs13:19 Ũla wendetwe weanĩw’a nĩ mũyo wa ngoo; Ĩndĩ nĩ ũthatyo kwa ndia kũtia naĩ. 
Proverbs13:20 Endaa na andũ oĩ, ũkeethĩwa mũĩ; Ĩndĩ ũla ũtindanasya na ndia akathĩna." 
Proverbs13:21 Ũthũku nũatĩĩaa andũ athe; Ĩndĩ ala alũngalu makaĩvwa ũseo. 
Proverbs13:22 Mũndũ mũseo nũtiĩaa esũkũũe make ũtiĩwa; Na ũthwii wa mũndũ mwathe wiawa kwondũ wa alũngalu. 
Proverbs13:23 Lĩu mwingĩ wĩ kũĩmanĩ kwa ngya; Ĩndĩ kwĩ kĩla kyanangĩtwe kwondũ wa ũsili ũte wa katĩ. 
Proverbs13:24 Ũla ũimaa mwana wake ndata yake nũmenaa mwana wake; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmwendaa nũmũkũnaa mavinda maĩle. 
Proverbs13:25 Ũla mũlũngalu nũĩsaa akavũn’ya thayũ wake; Ĩndĩ ĩvu ya ũla mũthũku yĩkeew’a nzaa. 
Proverbs14:1 Kĩla mũndũ mũka mũĩ nĩwakaa nyũmba yake; Ĩndĩ ũla mũtumanu nũomboaa na moko make mwene. 
Proverbs14:2 Ũla ũkinyaa ũlũngalunĩ wake nũkĩaa Yeova; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩ ngũlũ mĩendelenĩ yake nũmũvũthasya. 
Proverbs14:3 Kanyw’anĩ wa ũla mũtumanu ve ndata kwondũ wa ngathĩĩo yake; Ĩndĩ ilomo sya ala oĩ ikamasũvĩa. 
Proverbs14:4 Vala vate ng’ombe, vandũ va kũĩthĩw’a nĩ vathei; Ĩndĩ wingĩvo mwingĩ nĩ kwondũ wa vinya wa ng’ombe." 
Proverbs14:5 Ngũsĩ yĩ kĩthito ndĩneenaa ũvũngũ; Ĩndĩ ngũsĩ ngengani ĩneenaa movũngũ. 
Proverbs14:6 Mũkaakaan’ya nũmanthaa ũĩ, na ndawonaa; Ĩndĩ ũmanyi nĩwonekaa na ũvũthũ kwa ũla wĩ na kĩlĩko." 
Proverbs14:7 Lika vala va mũndũ mũtumanu, Na ndũkona kwake ilomo syĩ ũmanyi." 
Proverbs14:8 Ũĩ wa ũla wĩ kĩlĩko nĩ kũmanya mũendele wake; Ĩndĩ ũtumanu wa ndia nĩ ũkengani. 
Proverbs14:9 Nthembo kwondũ wa ĩvĩtyo nĩthekeeawa nĩ ndia; Ĩndĩ katĩ wa alũngalu kwĩ kwendana kũseo. 
Proverbs14:10 Ngoo nĩyĩsĩ ũũ wayo e yo; Na mũeni ndelikasya ũtanunĩ wayo. 
Proverbs14:11 Nyũmba ya ũla mũthũku ĩkang’uthũlwa; Ĩndĩ ĩeema ya ũla mũlũngalu yĩkaathimĩka. 
Proverbs14:12 Ve nzĩa ĩla ĩilyĩ ta ya w’o kwa mũndũ; Ĩndĩ mũminũkĩlyo wayo nĩ nzĩa sya kĩkw’ũ. 
Proverbs14:13 O na kũthekanĩ ngoo yĩ na woo; Na mũminũkĩlyo wa ũtanu nĩ kĩmako. 
Proverbs14:14 Ũla ũsyokete na ĩtina ngoonĩ yake akausũwa nĩ mĩendele yake mwene; Na mũndũ mũseo akeanĩw’a kuma nthĩnĩ wake mwene. 
Proverbs14:15 Ũla ũte ũmanyi nĩwĩtĩkĩlaa kĩla ndeto; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩ kĩlĩko asiasya ũndũ ũendaa. 
Proverbs14:16 Mũndũ mũĩ nũkĩaa na kũtia ũthũku; Ĩndĩ ndia nĩendaa yĩng’athĩlĩtye, na kwĩkwatya mwene." 
Proverbs14:17 Ũla ũthataa mĩtũkĩ akeka na ũtumanu; Na mũndũ wĩ mosũanĩo mathũku nũmenawa. 
Proverbs14:18 Ala mate ũmanyi matiĩawa ũtumanu; Ĩndĩ ala me kĩlĩko mekĩawa ngovia ya ũmanyi. 
Proverbs14:19 Ala athe makunamaa mbee wa ala aseo; Na ala athũku, mbingĩlonĩ sya alũngalũ." 
Proverbs14:20 Ngya nĩmenawa o na nĩ mũtũi wayo mwene; Ĩndĩ mũthwii e na anyanyae aingĩ. 
Proverbs14:21 Ũla ũvũthasya mũtũi wake nĩwĩkaa naĩ; Ĩndĩ ũla ũsyĩw’ĩaa ngya tei nĩ mũtanu. 
Proverbs14:22 Maivĩtasya ala masũanĩaa ũthũku? Ĩndĩ tei na w’o ikeethĩwa sya ala masũanĩaa ũseo. 
Proverbs14:23 Wĩanĩ w’onthe ve ũtandĩthyo; Ĩndĩ kũneena kwa ilomo kwangĩĩtye ũkyanĩ. 
Proverbs14:24 Ngovia ya ũsumbĩ ya ala oĩ nĩ ũthwii woo; Ĩndĩ ũtumanu wa ndia no ũtumanu. 
Proverbs14:25 Ngũsĩ ya w’o nĩvonokasya mathayũ; Ĩndĩ ũla ũneenaa movũngũ nũkenganaa. 
Proverbs14:26 Nthĩnĩ wa kũmũkĩa Yeova ve ũĩkĩĩi wĩ vinya; Na syana syake ikeethĩwa na wĩvitho. 
Proverbs14:27 Kũmũkĩa Yeova nĩ nthongo ya thayũ, Nĩ kana mũndũ atie itei sya kĩkw’ũ." 
Proverbs14:28 Wingĩnĩ wa andũ nĩvo ve ndaĩa ya mũsumbĩ; Ĩndĩ ũolekunĩ wa andũ ve wanangĩko wa mũnene wĩ mbee ũsumbĩnĩ. 
Proverbs14:29 Ũla mũmĩĩsya wa kũthata nĩ wa ũmanyi mwingĩ; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩ mĩtũkĩ vevanĩ nũnenevasya ũtumanu. 
Proverbs14:30 Ngoo nduu nĩ thayũ wa mwĩĩ; Ĩndĩ kĩwĩu nĩ wou wa mavĩndĩ. 
Proverbs14:31 Ũla ũthĩnasya ngya nũvũthasya Mũmbi wake; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmew’ĩaa athĩni tei nũmũtaĩaa. 
Proverbs14:32 Ũla mũthũku nũtheeaw’a kwĩkanĩ kwake kũthũku; Ĩndĩ ũla mũlũngalu kĩkw’ũnĩ kyake e na wĩvitho. 
Proverbs14:33 Ũĩ nĩwĩkalaa ngoonĩ ya ũla wĩ na ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ kĩla kĩ nthĩnĩ wa ndia nĩkĩvuanaw’a. 
Proverbs14:34 Ũlũngalu nũnenevasya mbaĩ; Ĩndĩ naĩ nĩvũthĩthasya ũko o na wĩva wa andũ. 
Proverbs14:35 Wonan’yo wa ũseo wa mũsumbĩ welekele mũthũkũmi ũla wĩkaa na ũĩ; Ĩndĩ ũthilĩku wake ũkeethĩwa ĩũlũ wa ũla ũsonokasya. 
Proverbs15:1 Ũsũngĩo mwololo nũthyũũaa ũthilĩku; Ĩndĩ ndeto mbai nĩyũkĩlasya ũthatu. 
Proverbs15:2 Ũĩmĩ wa ala oĩ nũneenaa ũmanyi katĩ; Ĩndĩ kanyw’a wa ndia nĩwonoasya ũtumanu. 
Proverbs15:3 Metho ma Yeova me kĩla vandũ, Makĩsyaĩĩsya ũthũku na ũseo." 
Proverbs15:4 Ũĩmĩ mũuu nĩ mũtĩ wa thayũ; Ĩndĩ ngũlũ syaw’o nĩ kũtũlĩka kwa veva. 
Proverbs15:5 Ndia nĩvũthasya kwonw’a mavĩtyo nĩ ĩthe wayo; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩtĩkĩlaa ũkan’yo nĩwosaa kĩlĩko. 
Proverbs15:6 Nyũmbanĩ ya mũlũngalu ve ũthwii mwie mwingĩ; Ĩndĩ motandĩthyonĩ ma ala athũku ve thĩna. 
Proverbs15:7 Ilomo sya ala oĩ ninyaĩĩkasya ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ ngoo ya mũtumanu ndĩkaa ũu. 
Proverbs15:8 Nthembo ya ũla mũthũku nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ mboya ya ũla mũlũngalu nĩ ũtanu wake. 
Proverbs15:9 Mũendele wa ũla mũthũku nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ nũmwendaa ũla ũatĩĩaa ũlũngalu. 
Proverbs15:10 Ve kũsilĩlwa kwai kwa ũla ũtiaa ĩ nzĩa; Na ũla ũmenaa kũkanw’a akakw’a. 
Proverbs15:11 Seoli na Avatoni kwĩ ũtheinĩ mbee wa Yeova; Nĩ mbee veana ata ngoo sya ana ma andũ! 
Proverbs15:12 Mũkaakaan’ya ndendaa kũkanw’a; Ndaendaa kwa ũla mũĩ. 
Proverbs15:13 Ngoo ndanu nĩtanĩthasya ũthyũ; Ĩndĩ ũndũ wa woo wa ngoo veva nũtũlĩkaa. 
Proverbs15:14 Ngoo ya ũla wĩ na ũmanyi nĩmanthaa ũĩ; Ĩndĩ kanyw’a wa ndia nũĩsaa ũtumanu. 
Proverbs15:15 Mĩthenya yonthe ya ala mathĩnaa nĩ mĩthũku; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩ na ngoo ndanu e na mboka ĩtatw’ĩkanaa. 
Proverbs15:16 Kavaa kĩndũ kĩnini, vamwe na kũmũkĩa Yeova, Kwĩ ũthwii mwie mwingĩ vamwe na thĩna." 
Proverbs15:17 Kavaa kũya nyũnyi, vala ve wendo, Kwĩ ng’ombe ĩĩthaw’a kĩtũũnĩ vamwe na kĩmena." 
Proverbs15:18 Mũndũ mũthilĩku nĩwũkĩlasya ngananĩo; Ĩndĩ mũmĩĩsya wa kũthata mũuasya ĩteta. 
Proverbs15:19 Nzĩa ya ũla mũtulu ĩilyĩ ta wiio wa mĩw’a; Ĩndĩ nzĩa ya ũla mũlũngalu nĩtw’ĩkĩthaw’a lelũ. 
Proverbs15:20 Mwana mũĩ nũtanĩthasya ĩthe; Ĩndĩ mũndũ mũtumanu nũvũthasya inyia wake. 
Proverbs15:21 Ũtumanu nĩ ũtanu kwa ũla ũte na ũĩ; Ĩndĩ mũndũ wĩ na ũmanyi nũlũngalasya mũendele wake. 
Proverbs15:22 Vala vate ũtao, maũndũ ala masũanĩĩtwe kwĩkwa nĩmanangĩkaa; Ĩndĩ vala ve wingĩ wa atai nĩmalũlũmĩlaw’a." 
Proverbs15:23 Mũndũ e na ũtanu ũsũngĩonĩ wa kanyw’a wake; Na ndeto ĩvindanĩ yayo, kote nzeo!" 
Proverbs15:24 Kwa ũla mũĩ nzĩa ya thayũ ĩelete ĩũlũ, Nĩ kana ethyũũe na kũtia Seoli ĩtheo." 
Proverbs15:25 Yeova akakũanĩsya na mĩi nyũmba ya ekathĩĩi; Ĩndĩ akalũlũmĩlya mũvaka wa mũndũ mũka ndiwa. 
Proverbs15:26 Mosũanĩo mathũku nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ ndeto nzeo nĩ ntheu. 
Proverbs15:27 Ũla wĩ na ĩtomo ya ũtandĩthyo nũthĩnasya nyũmba yake mwene; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmenaa mavaki akekala thayũ. 
Proverbs15:28 Ngoo ya ũla mũlũngalu nĩsũanĩaa kũsũngĩa; Ĩndĩ kanyw’a wa ũla mũthũku nĩwonoasya maũndũ mathũku. 
Proverbs15:29 Yeova e kũasa na ũla mũthũku; Ĩndĩ nĩwĩw’aa mboya ya ũla mũlũngalu. 
Proverbs15:30 Kyeni kya metho nĩkĩtanasya ngoo; Na maũvoo maseo manoasya mavĩndĩ. 
Proverbs15:31 Kũtũ kũla kwĩthukĩĩasya ũkan’yo wa thayũ Kũkekala katĩ wa ala oĩ. 
Proverbs15:32 Ũla ũleaa kwonw’a mavĩtyo nũvũthasya thayũ wake mwene; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩthukĩĩasya ũkan’yo nĩwosaa ũmanyi. 
Proverbs15:33 Kũmũkĩa Yeova nĩ ũmanyĩsyo wa ũĩ; Na wĩnyivyo ũtongoeasya ndaĩa. 
Proverbs16:1 Maũndũ maseũvye ma ngoo nĩ ma mũndũ; Ĩndĩ ũsũngĩo wa ũĩmĩ wumaa vala ve Yeova. 
Proverbs16:2 Mĩendele yonthe ya mũndũ nĩ mĩtheu methonĩ make mwene; Ĩndĩ Yeova athimaa maveva. 
Proverbs16:3 Mwiĩe Yeova mawĩa maku, Na mosũanĩa maku makalũlũmĩlw’a." 
Proverbs16:4 Yeova nũseũvĩtye kĩla kĩndũ na kĩtumi kyakyo; Ĩĩ, o na athũku kwondũ wa mũthenya wa ũthũku." 
Proverbs16:5 Kĩla mũndũ ũla wĩ na ngathĩĩo ngoonĩ nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova: O na ethĩwa kw’oko kũkakwatana na kw’oko, ndakatĩa kũkũnwa." 
Proverbs16:6 Kwondũ wa tei na w’o ũthũku nũvw’ĩkĩkaa; Na kwondũ wa kũmũkĩa Yeova andũ nĩmatiaa ũthũku. 
Proverbs16:7 Yĩla mĩendele ya mũndũ yendeesya Yeova, Atumaa o na amaitha make methĩwa na mũuo nake." 
Proverbs16:8 Kavaa kĩndũ kĩnini, vamwe na ũlũngalu, Kwĩ motandĩthyo manene vamwe na ũsili ũte wa katĩ." 
Proverbs16:9 Ngoo ya mũndũ nĩsũanĩaa nzĩa yake; Ĩndĩ Yeova atongoeasya matambya make. 
Proverbs16:10 Ũvuan’yo mwaĩlu wĩ ilomonĩ sya mũsumbĩ; Kanyw’a wake ndũkavĩtya kũtw’anĩ. 
Proverbs16:11 Kĩthimi kya w’o na latili sya w’o nĩ sya Yeova; Mavia onthe ma mũvuko ala mathimaa nĩ wĩa wake. 
Proverbs16:12 Nĩ ũthatyo kwa asumbĩ kwĩka ũthũku; Nũndũ kĩvĩla kya ũsumbĩ nĩkĩlũmaw’a nĩ ũlũngalu. 
Proverbs16:13 Ilomo ila ineenaa ũlũngalu nĩ ũtanu wa asumbĩ; Na mamwendaa ũla ũneenaa w’o. 
Proverbs16:14 Ũthilĩku wa mũsumbĩ nĩ ta atũmwa ma kĩkw’ũ; Ĩndĩ mũndũ mũĩ akoousya. 
Proverbs16:15 Kyeninĩ kya ũthyũ wa mũsumbĩ ve thayũ; Na kwonan’ya kwake kwa ũseo nĩ ta ĩthweo ya mbua ya uũa. 
Proverbs16:16 Kaĩ nĩ kavaa mũno kwĩthĩwa na ũĩ kwĩ thaavu! Ĩĩ, nĩ kavaa kũnyuva kwĩthĩwa na ũmanyi kwĩ vetha." 
Proverbs16:17 Lelũ wa ala alũngalu nĩ kũtia ũthũku; Ũla ũsũvĩaa mũendele wake nũsũvĩaa thayũ wake. 
Proverbs16:18 Ngathĩĩo nĩtongoeasya wanangĩko, Na veva wa wĩng’athĩlĩlyo nũtongoeasya kũvalũka." 
Proverbs16:19 Nĩ kavaa kwĩthĩwa na veva wa wĩnyivyo vamwe na ngya, Kwĩ kũaana mũtavo na ekathĩĩi." 
Proverbs16:20 Ũla wĩthukĩĩasya ndeto akona ũseo; Na ũla ũmũĩkĩĩaa Yeova nĩ mũtanu. 
Proverbs16:21 Ala oĩ ngoonĩ maketwa ma kĩlĩko; Na mũyo wa ilomo nĩwingĩvasya momanyĩsyo. 
Proverbs16:22 Ũmanyi nĩ mbuluti ya thayũ kwa ũla wĩ naw’o; Ĩndĩ kwonw’a mavĩtyo kwa ndia nĩ ũtumanu wasyo. 
Proverbs16:23 Ngoo ya ũla mũĩ nĩmanyĩasya kanyw’a wake. Na kwongela ũmanyĩsyo ilomonĩ syake. 
Proverbs16:24 Ndeto nzeo nĩ ta ĩwa, Syĩ mũyo kwa ngoo, na nivoasya mavĩndĩ." 
Proverbs16:25 Ve nzĩa ĩla ĩilyĩ ta ya w’o kwa mũndũ, Ĩndĩ mũminũkĩlyo wayo nĩ nzĩa sya kĩkw’ũ." 
Proverbs16:26 Nzaa ya mũthũkũmi nĩthũkũmaa kwondũ wake; Nũndũ kanyw’a wake nũmũthing’ĩĩsya. 
Proverbs16:27 Mũndũ ũte kĩĩĩ nũsũanĩaa ũthũku; Na ilomonĩ syake kwĩ ta mwaki ũvĩvasya. 
Proverbs16:28 Mũndũ wĩ ngũlũ nũnyaĩĩkasya ĩteta; Na ũla ũneenaa na kĩwe ataanasya anyanya anene. 
Proverbs16:29 Mũndũ mũng’endu asengasengaa mũtũĩ wake, Na kũmũtongoesya mũendelenĩ ũte mũseo." 
Proverbs16:30 Ũla ũlalasya metho make, nĩwĩkaa ũu asũanĩe maũndũ ma ngũlũ: Ũla ũtumanasya ilomo syake nũtumaa ũthũku wĩthĩwa." 
Proverbs16:31 Mũtwe wĩ mbuĩ nĩ ngovia ya ũsumbĩ ya ndaĩa; Ũkooneka nzĩanĩ ya ũlũngalu. 
Proverbs16:32 Mũmĩĩsya wa kũthata e kavaa kwĩ ũla wĩ na ũtonyi; Na ũla ũsumbĩkaa veva wake, e kavaa kwĩ ũla ũkwataa ndũa." 
Proverbs16:33 Mũlimano nĩwĩkĩtwe ngũanĩ; Ĩndĩ ũndũ ũkethĩwa no kwondũ wa Yeova. 
Proverbs17:1 Nĩ kavaa kalungu komũ ka ũya, na ũuu vamwe nako, Kwi nyũmba yusũĩte mboka vamwe na ĩteta." 
Proverbs17:2 Mũthũkũmi ũla wĩkaa na ũĩ akasumbĩka mwana ũla ũsonokasya, Na akeethĩwa na kĩanda ũtiĩwanĩ katĩ wa ana‐a‐ĩthe." 
Proverbs17:3 Na mbisũ ya kũthesya nĩ kwondũ wa vetha, na iko ĩnene kwondũ wa thaavu; Ĩndĩ Yeova nũtataa ngoo." 
Proverbs17:4 Mwĩki wa naĩ nĩwĩthukĩĩasya ilomo nthũku; Na mũneeni wa ũvũngũ nũteaa kũtũ ew’e ũĩmĩ mũthũku. 
Proverbs17:5 Ũla ũthekeeaa ngya nũvũthasya Mũmbi wake; Na ũla ũtanaw’a nĩ wanangĩko mũnene ndakatĩa kũkũnwa. 
Proverbs17:6 Nzũkũlũ nĩ ngovia ya ũsumbĩ ya andũ akũũ; Na ũtaĩo wa syana nĩ aaĩthe masyo. 
Proverbs17:7 Kũneena kũseo kũtiaĩle ndia; Nĩ mbee mũno ilomo ila ineenaa ũvũngũ kũlea kwaĩla mũnene wĩ mbee ũsumbĩnĩ. 
Proverbs17:8 Ĩvaki nĩ ta kavila ke thooa mũnene methonĩ ma ũla wĩ nayo; O vala yĩelekela, nĩyĩunĩkasya." 
Proverbs17:9 Ũla ũvw’ĩkaa ĩvĩtyo nũmanthaa wendo; Ĩndĩ ũla ũtindaa aineena ũndũ, ataanasya anyanya anene." 
Proverbs17:10 Ũkan’yo ũlikaa mũno mũndũnĩ wĩ na ũmanyi Kwĩ makũnwa ĩana nthĩnĩ wa ndia. 
Proverbs17:11 Mũndũ mũthũku nũmanthaa no ũng’endu; Kwondũ wa ũu mũtũmwa mwai akatũmwa okite nake. 
Proverbs17:12 Kavaa nduva ĩvenetwe tũswii twayo kũkomana na mũndũ, Kwĩ ndia ũtumanunĩ wayo." 
Proverbs17:13 Ũla ũtũngaa ũthũku vandũ va ũseo, Ũthũku ndũkauma nyũmbanĩ yake." 
Proverbs17:14 Wambĩlĩlyo wa ĩteta nĩ ta yĩla mũndũ wavũthũa manzĩ; Kwondũ wa ũu eka ngananĩo, kũtanethĩwa ĩteta." 
Proverbs17:15 Ũla ũtalĩlaa athũku ũlũngalu, na ũla ũtusaa alũngalu avĩtan’ya, Asu elĩ nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova." 
Proverbs17:16 Nĩkĩ mbesa syĩ kw’okonĩ kwa ndia ĩthooe ũĩ, Nayo ndĩ na ũmanyi?" 
Proverbs17:17 Mũnyanya nĩwendanaa ĩndĩ yonthe; Na mwana‐a‐ĩthe asyaiwe kwondũ wa kũthĩnũkasya. 
Proverbs17:18 Mũndũ ũte ũmanyi nũkwatanasya moko, Na aitw’ĩka mũĩkĩĩthya mũtũi wake ene" 
Proverbs17:19 Ũla wendaa ĩteta endaa ĩvĩtyo: Ũla ũkĩlasya mbingĩlo yake ĩũlũ mũno nũmanthaa wanangĩko. 
Proverbs17:20 Ũla wĩ na ngoo ngengani ndonaa ũseo o na wĩva; Na ũla wĩ na ũĩmĩ wĩ ngũlũ nũvalũkaa ũthũkunĩ. 
Proverbs17:21 Ũla ũsyaaa ndia ekaa ũu kwa woo wake; Na ĩthe wa ndia nde na ũtanu nongi. 
Proverbs17:22 Ngoo ndanu nĩ mũiito mũseo; Ĩndĩ veva mũtũlĩku ũtumaa mavĩndĩ moma. 
Proverbs17:23 Mũndũ mũthũku nĩwosaa ĩvaki kuma kĩthũinĩ, Elelũkasye nzĩa sya ũsili wa katĩ." 
Proverbs17:24 Ũĩ wĩ mbee wa ũthyũ wa ũla wĩ na ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ metho ma ndia me itulunĩ sya nthĩ. 
Proverbs17:25 Mwana mũtumanu nĩ woo kwa ĩthe wake, Na ũũ kwa ũla wamũsyaie." 
Proverbs17:26 O na kũsilĩla ala alũngalu ti ũseo, Kana kũkũna ala me ndaĩa nũndũ wa ũlũngalu woo." 
Proverbs17:27 Ũla ũsũvĩaa ndeto syake e na ũĩ; Na ũla wĩ na veva mũuu nĩ mũndũ wĩ na ũmanyi. 
Proverbs17:28 O na ndia, yĩla ĩvindĩtye, ĩtalawa nĩ mbũĩ; Yĩla ĩtumĩtye ilomo syayo, ĩtalawa yĩ na kĩlĩko." 
Proverbs18:1 Ũla wĩvathaa amanthaa kwenda kwake mwene, Na alonzanĩlasya ũĩ w’onthe mwĩanĩu." 
Proverbs18:2 Ndia ndĩtanĩaa ũmanyi, Ĩndĩ no kana ngoo yayo ĩtonye kwĩvuan’ya." 
Proverbs18:3 Yĩla mũthũku woka, kĩvũthya nakyo nĩkyũkaa, Na vamwe na nzonoko kũkaa kĩvũthya." 
Proverbs18:4 Ndeto sya kanyw’a wa mũndũ nĩ ta syũngũ; Mbuluti ya ũĩ nĩ ta kalũsĩ kavĩtĩtye. 
Proverbs18:5 Kwendeesya mũndũ mũthũku ti ũseo, Kana kwelelũkya ala alũngalu silanĩ." 
Proverbs18:6 Ilomo sya ndia nilikaa ngananĩonĩ, Na kanyw’a wayo nĩwĩtasya makũna." 
Proverbs18:7 Kanyw’a wa ndia nĩ wanangĩko wayo, Na ilomo syayo nĩ kĩtei kya ngoo yayo." 
Proverbs18:8 Ndeto sya ũla ũneenaa na kĩwe nĩ ta tũlungu tũseo twa lĩu, Na ilikaa nthĩnĩ ki." 
Proverbs18:9 O na ũla mũleelu wĩanĩ wake Nĩ mwana‐a‐inyia wa mwanangi. 
Proverbs18:10 Syĩtwa ya Yeova nĩ mwako mũtũlu wa mũnyoolo, Ũla mũlũngalu akĩĩaa vo, na nde na mũisyo." 
Proverbs18:11 Syĩndũ sya mũndũ mũthwii nĩ ndũa yake yĩ vinya, Na ta wako mũtũlu ũsũanĩonĩ wake." 
Proverbs18:12 Wanangĩko ũtanamba kũka ngoo ya mũndũ yĩ na wĩng’athĩlĩlyo; Na wĩnyivyo ũtongoeasya ndaĩa. 
Proverbs18:13 Ũla ũsũngĩaa atanamba kwĩw’a, Kwake nĩ ũtumanu na nthoni." 
Proverbs18:14 Veva wa mũndũ ũkatw’ĩĩka wonzu wake; Ĩndĩ veva mũtũlĩku nũũ ũtonya kũmĩĩsya? 
Proverbs18:15 Ngoo ya ũla wĩ na kĩlĩko nĩyosaa ũmanyi; Na kũtũ kwa ũla mũĩ nĩkũmanthaa ũmanyi. 
Proverbs18:16 Mũthĩnzĩo wa mũndũ nũmwonasya mwanya, Na kũmũete mbee wa andũ anene." 
Proverbs18:17 Ũla wambaa kũtetea ũvoo wake nĩwonekaa ta mũlũngalu; Ĩndĩ mũtũi wake ooka nũmũvuanasya. 
Proverbs18:18 Kũlimana nĩkũtumaa ngananĩo ithela, Na kũtaan’ya ala me na ũtonyi." 
Proverbs18:19 Mwana‐a‐asa alulutĩkw’a nĩ vinya kũtũngĩka kwĩ ndũa yĩ vinya; Na ngananĩo ta isu nĩ ta ivingi sya nyũmba nene yĩ kĩemo. 
Proverbs18:20 Ĩvu ya mũndũ yĩkausũw’a nĩ ũsyao wa kanyw’a wake; Akeanĩaw’a nĩ wingĩvo wa ilomo syake. 
Proverbs18:21 Kĩkw’ũ na thayũ syĩ vinyanĩ wa ũĩmĩ; Na ala mawendaa makaĩsaa ũsyao waw’o. 
Proverbs18:22 Ũla ũmeasya kĩveti nũmeasya kĩndũ kĩseo; Na kwona ũseo kuma kwa Yeova. 
Proverbs18:23 Ngya nĩsyĩsũvanaa; Ĩndĩ athwii masũngĩaa na vinya. 
Proverbs18:24 Ũla ũtumaa ndũũ na andũ aingĩ ekaa ũu ũndũ wa wanangĩko wake mwene; Ĩndĩ ve mũnyanya ũla ũlũmanasya mũno kwĩ mwana‐a‐inyia. 
Proverbs19:1 Kavaa ngya ĩla ĩkinyaa wĩanĩũnĩ wayo Kwĩ ũla wĩ na ngũlũ ilomonĩ syake na nĩ ndia. 
Proverbs19:2 O na ĩngĩ, thayũ kwĩthĩwa ũte na ũmanyi ti ũseo; Na ũla wĩkalaataa na maũũ make nũvĩtasya." 
Proverbs19:3 Ũtumanu wa mũndũ nũthũkasya mũendele wake; Na ngoo yake nĩmũnyungunyĩasya Yeova. 
Proverbs19:4 Ũthwii nĩwongelaa anyanya aingĩ; Ĩndĩ ngya nĩtaanaw’a na mũnyanyae wayo. 
Proverbs19:5 Ngũsĩ ya ũvũngũ ndĩkatĩa kũkũnwa; Na ũla ũneenaa movũngũ ndakavonoka. 
Proverbs19:6 Aingĩ makeesũva ũseo wa mũndũ mũlau; Na kĩla mũndũ nĩ mũnyanya wa ũla ũnenganae mĩthĩnzĩo. 
Proverbs19:7 Ana‐a‐inyia onthe ma ngya nĩmamĩmenaa: Nĩ mbee veana ata anyanyae mayo kũthi kũasa nayo! Nũmaatĩĩaa na ndeto, ĩndĩ nĩ aendu." 
Proverbs19:8 Ũla wĩthĩawa na ũĩ nĩwendaa thayũ wake mwene: Ũla ũsũvĩaa ũmanyi akoona ũseo. 
Proverbs19:9 Ngũsĩ ya ũvũngũ ndĩkatĩa kũkũnwa; Na ũla ũneenaa movũngũ akaaa. 
Proverbs19:10 Maũndũ ala mendeeasya thayũ ti maĩlu kwondũ wa ndia; Nĩ mbee veana ata kũlea kwaĩla, mũthũkũmi kũsumbĩka anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ." 
Proverbs19:11 Kĩlĩko kya mũndũ nĩkĩtumaa ethĩwa mũmĩĩsya wa kũthata; Na nĩ ndaĩa yake kũekea ĩvĩtyo. 
Proverbs19:12 Ũthilĩku wa mũsumbĩ nĩ ta kũluma kwa mũnyambũ; Ĩndĩ kwonan’ya kwake kwa ũseo nĩ ta ĩmwe nyekinĩ. 
Proverbs19:13 Mwana mũtumanu nĩ wanangĩko mũnene wa ĩthe wake; Na mateta ma kĩveti nĩ kũvolotanga kũtatw’ĩkanaa. 
Proverbs19:14 Nyũmba na mothwii nĩ ũtiĩwa kuma kwa aaĩthe; Ĩndĩ kĩveti kĩ kĩlĩko kyumaa kwa Yeova. 
Proverbs19:15 Ũtulu nĩwĩkasya toonĩ mũnene; Na mũndũ mũtulu akeew’aa nzaa. 
Proverbs19:16 Ũla ũkwataa mwĩao nũsũvĩaa thayũ wake; Ĩndĩ ũla ũte kĩio ũndũ wa mĩendele yake akakw’a. 
Proverbs19:17 Ũla wĩw’ĩaa ngya tei akovethasya Yeova, Na wĩko wake mũseo akamũĩva ĩngĩ." 
Proverbs19:18 Kũna mwana waku, nũndũ ve wĩkwatyo; Na ndũkende mũno ngoonĩ yaku wanangĩko wake." 
Proverbs19:19 Mũndũ wa ũthilĩku mũnene akakua ũsilĩlo, Nũndũ ethĩwa ũkamũvonokya, mũvaka wĩke ũu ĩngĩ." 
Proverbs19:20 Ĩw’a ũtao, na osa ũmanvĩsyo, Nĩ kana wĩthĩwe mũĩ mũminũkĩlyonĩ waku." 
Proverbs19:21 Kwĩ mosũanĩo maingĩ ngoonĩ ya mũndũ; Ĩndĩ ũtao wa Yeova, nĩw’o wĩĩkalaa." 
Proverbs19:22 Kĩla kĩtuma mũndũ kwendwa nĩ ũseo wake; Na mũndũ ngya e kavaa kwĩ mũneeni wa ũvũngũ. 
Proverbs19:23 Kũmũkĩa Yeova nĩkũetae thayũ; Na ũla wĩ nakw’o akekalaa eanĩwe; Ndakokĩwa nĩ ũthũku. 
Proverbs19:24 Mũndũ mũtulu nũindaa kw’oko kwake ĩsaaninĩ, Na ndeĩtĩkĩla o na kũkũete kanyw’anĩ wake ĩngĩ." 
Proverbs19:25 Kũna mũkaakaan’ya, na ũla ũte ũmanyi akeemanyĩsya kwĩthĩwa na kĩlĩko; Na kan’ya ũla wĩ na ũmanyi, na akamanya ũĩ." 
Proverbs19:26 Ũla ũmũng’endeaa ĩthe, na kũlũngya inyia wake, Nĩ mwana ũla ũsonokasya na kũete kĩvũthya." 
Proverbs19:27 Eka, mwana wakwa, kwĩw’a ũmanyĩsyo Na ĩndĩ ũkĩvĩtya na kũtia ndeto sya ũmanyi." 
Proverbs19:28 Ngũsĩ ĩte vata nĩthekeeaa ũsili wa katĩ; Na kanyw’a wa ũla mũthũku nũmelasya ũthũku. 
Proverbs19:29 Mosilĩlo nĩmaseũvĩaw’a akaakaan’ya, Na makũna kwondũ wa mĩongo ya ndia." 
Proverbs20:1 Mbinyu nĩ mũkaakaan’ya, kĩla kĩtoonasya nĩ kĩlonzo kĩnene; Na ũla ũvĩtasya kwondũ wayo ti mũĩ." 
Proverbs20:2 Ũtĩsyo wa mũsumbĩ nĩ ta kũluma kwa mũnyambũ: Ũla ũmũthatasya nũvĩtĩasya thayũ wake mwene. 
Proverbs20:3 Nĩ ndaĩa ya mũndũ kwĩkala kũasa na ĩteta; Ĩndĩ kĩla ndia ĩkatetanasya. 
Proverbs20:4 Mũndũ mũtulu nũleaa kũĩma nũndũ wa ĩvinda ya mbevo; Kwondũ wa ũu akavoya ĩvinda ya ngetha, na ndakethĩwa na kĩndũ." 
Proverbs20:5 Ũtao ngoonĩ ya mũndũ nĩ ta kyũngũ; Ĩndĩ mũndũ wĩ ũmanyi akookusya wume. 
Proverbs20:6 Andũ aingĩ matavanasya kĩla ũmwe ũseo wake mwene; Ĩndĩ mũndũ wĩ kĩthito nũũ ũtonya kũmwona? 
Proverbs20:7 Mũndũ mũlũngalu ũla ũendaa wĩanĩunĩ wake, Syana syake nĩ ngathime ĩtina wake." 
Proverbs20:8 Mũsumbĩ ũla wĩkalaa kĩvĩlanĩ kya ũsumbĩ kya kũsila Nũvalaanasya ũthũku w’onthe na metho make. 
Proverbs20:9 Nũũ ũtonya kwasya, Nĩnĩtheetye ngoo yakwa, Nĩ mũtheu kuma naĩnĩ yakwa?" 
Proverbs20:10 Mavia ala mathimaa matailyĩ ũndũ ũmwe, na ithimi itailyĩ ũndũ ũmwe, Isu syonthe nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova." 
Proverbs20:11 O na kana nĩkemanyĩthanasya kwondũ wa meko mako, Ethĩwa wĩa wako nĩ mũtheu na ethĩwa nĩ mũlũngalu." 
Proverbs20:12 Kũtũ kũla kwĩw’aa, na itho yĩla yonaa, Yeova nũseũvĩtye syelĩ." 
Proverbs20:13 Ndũkende too, ndũkese kũvikĩa ũkya; Salukya metho maku, na ũkavũna lĩu." 
Proverbs20:14 Nĩ kĩthũku, nĩ kĩthũku, easya ũla ũthooaa; Ĩndĩ eeyĩendea, nĩvo ĩndĩ wĩkathĩĩaa." 
Proverbs20:15 Ve thaavu, na tũvila twa maliani twingĩ mũno; Ĩndĩ ilomo syĩ ũĩ nĩ mũio wa wanake wĩ thooa mũnene." 
Proverbs20:16 Osa ngũa yake ũla mũĩkĩĩthya kwondũ wa mũeni; Noimwĩkalya ethĩwe ngwatĩlĩlyo ũla mũĩkĩĩthya kwondũ wa andũ ma nthĩ ĩngĩ. 
Proverbs20:17 Lĩu wa ũvũngũ wĩ mũyo kwa mũndũ; Ĩndĩ ĩtina kanyw’a wake ũkausũa thaathai. 
Proverbs20:18 Kĩla ũsũanĩo ũlũlũmĩlaw’a nĩ ũtao; Na kwatya kaũ kwondũ wa ũtongoi mũĩ. 
Proverbs20:19 Ũla ũendaa kũũ na kũũ e mũsukani nũvuanasya nzama: Kwondũ wa ũu ndũkatindan’ye na ũla ũtumũkanganasya ilomo syake mũno. 
Proverbs20:20 O ũla ũumaa ĩthe kana nyinya, Taa wake ũkavoew’a wiũnĩ wa kĩvindu." 
Proverbs20:21 Ũtiĩwa nũtonya kwoswa mĩtũkĩ wambĩlĩlyonĩ; Ĩndĩ mũminũkĩlyo waw’o ndũkaathimwa. 
Proverbs20:22 Ndũkasye, Ngeeĩvanĩsya ũthũku: Mweteele Yeova, nake akakũtangĩĩa." 
Proverbs20:23 Mavia ala mathimaa matailyĩ ũndũ ũmwe nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Na kĩthimi kya ũkengani ti kĩseo. 
Proverbs20:24 Mĩendele ya mũndũ yumaa kwa Yeova; Mũndũ atonya ata ĩndĩ kũmanya nzĩa yake? 
Proverbs20:25 Nĩ kĩtei kwa mũndũ kũneena na mĩtũkĩ, Kĩĩ nĩ kĩtheu, Na ĩtĩna wa kwĩvĩta aikũlya." 
Proverbs20:26 Mũsumbĩ mũĩ aũlũkasya ala athũku, Na kũvĩtĩlya ndĩa ya kũvũa ĩũlũ wamo." 
Proverbs20:27 Veva wa mũndũ nĩ taa wa Yeova, Ũkĩmantha nthĩnĩ wake kw’onthe." 
Proverbs20:28 Ũseo na w’o masũvĩaa mũsumbĩ; Na kĩvĩla kyake kya ũsumbĩ nĩkĩtw’ĩĩkawa nĩ ũseo. 
Proverbs20:29 Ndaĩa ya anake nĩ vinya woo; Na wanake wa atumĩa nĩ mũtwe wĩ mbuĩ. 
Proverbs20:30 Makũna ala mokitĩthasya matheasya ũthũku; Na makũna makĩlika nthĩnĩ ki. 
Proverbs21:1 Ngoo ya mũsumbĩ yĩ kwiokonĩ kwa Yeova ta mokinyĩlo ma manzĩ: Nake amĩthyũũaa o vala ũnũkwenda. 
Proverbs21:2 Kĩla mũendele wa mũndũ nĩ mũlũngalu methonĩ make mwene; Ĩndĩ Yeova athimaa ngoo. 
Proverbs21:3 Kwĩka ũlũngalu na ũsili wa katĩ Nĩkwĩtĩkĩlawa nĩ Yeova kwĩ nthembo. 
Proverbs21:4 Mũsyaĩlye wa mĩng’athĩlĩlyo, na ngoo ya ngathĩĩo, O taa wa ũla mũthũku, nĩ naĩ." 
Proverbs21:5 Mosũanĩo ma ala athingu maelete wingĩnĩ wa syĩndũ; Ĩndĩ kĩla mũndũ ũla wĩkalaataa ekalaataa kũvika akaĩwe tũ. 
Proverbs21:6 Kwosa mothwĩĩ kwondũ wa ĩũmĩ ũla ũneenaa ũvũngũ Nĩ mũki ũtwaawa kũũ na kũũ nĩ ala mamanthaa kĩkw’ũ. 
Proverbs21:7 Ũng’endu wa ala athũku ũkamatwaa kũasa, Nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩmaleaa kũsila katĩ." 
Proverbs21:8 Mũendele wa ũla ũitavĩwe nĩ naĩ nĩ mũthyoeku mũno; Ĩndĩ ũndũ wa ũla mũtheu, wĩa wake nĩ mũlũngalu." 
Proverbs21:9 Nĩ kavaa kwĩkalaa kĩkotonĩ kya nyũmba ĩũlũ, Kwĩ kwĩkalaa na mũndũ mũka wĩ ĩteta nyũmbanĩ nthanthau." 
Proverbs21:10 Ngoo ya ũla mũthũku nĩyendaa ũthũku: Mũtũi wake ndonaa ũseo methonĩ make. 
Proverbs21:11 Yĩla mũkaakaan’ya wakũnwa, ũla ũte ũmanyi nũtw’ĩkaa mũĩ; Na yĩla ũla mũĩ wamanyĩw’a, nĩwosaa ũmanyi." 
Proverbs21:12 Mũndũ mũlũngalu nũsũanĩaa ũndũ wa nyũmba ya ũla mũthũku, Ũndũ athũku mavalũkaw’a manangĩke." 
Proverbs21:13 O ũla ũkunĩkaa matũ matikew’e kĩĩo kya ngya, Nake akaĩa, ĩndĩ ndakew’ĩka." 
Proverbs21:14 Mũthĩnzĩo kĩmbithĩnĩ nũvoovasya ũthatu; Na mũthĩnzĩo kĩthũinĩ nũvoovasya ũthilĩku mwai. 
Proverbs21:15 Nĩ ũtanu kwa ala alũngalu kũsila katĩ; Ĩndĩ nĩ wanangiko kwa eki ma ũthũku. 
Proverbs21:16 Mũndũ ũla wangangaa kuma nzĩanĩ ya ũmanyi Akathũmũa ũmbanonĩ wa akw’ũ. 
Proverbs21:17 Ũla wendaa motanu akeethĩwa mũndũ ngya: Ũla wendaa mbinyu na mauta ndakethĩwa mũthwii. 
Proverbs21:18 Ũla mũthũku nĩ mbovosya kwondũ wa ũla mũlũngalu; Na nzeleke nĩyũkaa vandũ va ũla mũlũngalu. 
Proverbs21:19 Nĩ kavaa kũtũaa nthĩ yĩ yalata, Kwĩ kũtũaa na mũndũ mũka wĩ ngananĩo na mũnyungunyĩsyo." 
Proverbs21:20 Ve syĩndũ syĩ vata mũno o na mauta ũtũonĩ wa ala oĩ; Ĩndĩ mũndũ mũtumanu nĩwimelasya. 
Proverbs21:21 Ũla ũatĩĩaa ũlũngalu na ũseo Nĩwonaa thayũ, na ũlũngalu, na ndaĩa." 
Proverbs21:22 Mũndũ mũĩ nũlĩsaa alike ndũanĩ ya ala me na ũtonyi, Na aitheeesya vinya wa wĩkwatyo wayo." 
Proverbs21:23 Ũla ũsũvĩaa kanyw’a wake na ũĩmĩ wake Nũsũvĩaa ngoo yake mathĩna. 
Proverbs21:24 Mũndũ e na ngathĩĩo na wĩng’athĩlĩlyo, syĩtwa yake nĩ mũkaakaan’ya; Nũtethasya wĩa wĩnenevyonĩ wa ngathĩĩo." 
Proverbs21:25 Kwenda kwa ũla mũtulu nĩkũmũaaa; Nũndũ moko make nĩmaleaa kũtethya wĩa. 
Proverbs21:26 Kwĩ ũla wĩw’aa ĩtomo na ũtoonu mũthenya w’onthe; Ĩndĩ ũla mũlũngalu nũnenganae na ndaimaa. 
Proverbs21:27 Nthembo ya ũla mũthũku nĩ ũthatyo: Nĩ mbee veana ata, yĩla wĩete na kĩlilikano kĩthũku!" 
Proverbs21:28 Ngũsĩ ya ũvũngũ ĩkaaa; Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũla wĩw’aa akaneenaa ĩndĩ yonthe. 
Proverbs21:29 Mũndũ mũthũku nĩwetasya ũthyũ wake; Ĩndĩ ũndũ wa ũla mũlũngalu, nake nũlũlũmĩlasya mĩendele yake." 
Proverbs21:30 Vati ũĩ kana ũmanyi Kana ũtao ũtonya kũkita na Yeova. 
Proverbs21:31 Mbalasi nĩyũmbanĩtw’e ũndũ wa mũthenya wa kaũ; Ĩndĩ ũkĩlyo nĩ wa Yeova. 
Proverbs22:1 Nĩ kavaa kũnyuva syĩtwa ĩseo kwĩ mothwii manene, Na ũseo ũla wonanaw’a nĩ wendo kwĩ vetha na thaavu." 
Proverbs22:2 Athwii na ngya makomanaa vamwe: Yeova nĩwe mũmbi woo onthe. 
Proverbs22:3 Mũndũ wĩ kĩlĩko nĩwonaa ũthũku, na kwĩvitha; Ĩndĩ ala mate ũmanyi nĩmaendeeaa, na kũthĩna." 
Proverbs22:4 Ĩtuvi ya wĩnyivyo na kũmũkĩa Yeova Nĩ ũthwii, na ndaĩa, na thayũ." 
Proverbs22:5 Mĩw’a na itei syĩ nzĩanĩ ya ala me na ngũlũ: Ũla ũsũvĩaa ngoo yake akeethĩwa kũasa nasyo. 
Proverbs22:6 Manyĩsya kana nzĩa ĩla kaĩle kũendaa nayo, O na akũa ndakamĩtia." 
Proverbs22:7 Mũthwii nũsumbĩkaa ngya; Na ũla ũkovaa nĩ mũthũkũmi wa ũla ũkovethasya. 
Proverbs22:8 Ũla ũvuĩaa ũthũku akaketha wanangĩko mũnene; Na ndata ya ũthilĩku wake ĩkaa vinya. 
Proverbs22:9 Ũla wĩ na itho ĩlau akaathimwa; Nũndũ nũnengae ngya kuma lĩunĩ wake. 
Proverbs22:10 Mwĩkye nza mũkaakaan’ya, na ngananĩo ĩkaumaala; Ĩĩ, ĩteta na nzonoko ikathela." 
Proverbs22:11 Ũla wendaa ũtheu wa ngoo, Nũndũ wa mumo wa ilomo syake mũsumbĩ akeethĩwa mũnyanyae." 
Proverbs22:12 Metho ma Yeova masũvĩaa ũla wĩ na ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ nĩwanangaa ndeto sya nzeleke. 
Proverbs22:13 Mũndũ mũtulu easya, Ve mũnyambũ nza; Ngooaĩwa nzĩanĩ nene." 
Proverbs22:14 Kanyw’a wa aka aeni nĩ ĩima ĩliku; Ũla ũthĩthawa nĩ Yeova akavalũka nthĩnĩ wayo. 
Proverbs22:15 Ũtumanu nĩwovetwe ngoonĩ ya kana; Ĩndĩ ndata ya kwon’ya mavĩtyo ĩkoolũngya kũasa nako. 
Proverbs22:16 Ũla ũthĩnasya ngya nĩ kana aingĩvye ũtandĩthyo wake, Na ũla ũnenganae kwa athwii, akavika kwaĩwanĩ tũ." 
Proverbs22:17 Tea kũtũ kwaku, nokĩw’a ndeto sya ala oĩ, Noinengane ngoo yaku ũmanyinĩ wakwa." 
Proverbs22:18 Nũndũ nĩ ũndũ wa kwendeesya ethĩwa ũkasyĩkalya nthĩnĩ waku, Ethĩwa nilũlũmĩlw’e vamwe ilomonĩ syaku." 
Proverbs22:19 Nĩ kana ũĩkĩĩi waku wĩthĩwe nthĩnĩ wa Yeova, Nĩnĩkũmanyĩthĩtye syo ũmũnthĩ, o we." 
Proverbs22:20 Ndikũandĩkĩe maũndũ manene Ma motao na ũmanyi," 
Proverbs22:21 Nĩtume ũmanya ki ndeto sya w’o, Nĩ kana ũmatũngĩae ndeto sya w’o ala makũtũmaa?" 
Proverbs22:22 Ndũkavute ngya, nũndũ nĩ ngya; O na ndũkathĩnye ala athĩni mbingĩlonĩ:" 
Proverbs22:23 Nũndũ Yeova akamatetea, Na kũmavuta thayũ ala mamavutaa." 
Proverbs22:24 Ndũkatume ndũũ na ũla ũthataa; Na ndũkaendan’ye na mũndũ ũthilĩkaa: 
Proverbs22:25 Ndũkese kwĩmanyĩsya mĩendele yake, Na kwosea ngoo yaku kĩtei." 
Proverbs22:26 O na ndũkethĩwe ũmwe wa ala makwatanasya moko, Kana wa aĩkĩĩthya kwondũ wa mathĩĩ." 
Proverbs22:27 Ethĩwa ndwĩ na kya kũĩva, Aĩle ata kũtwaa ũkomo waku kumya ungu waku?" 
Proverbs22:28 Ndũkaakũĩĩsye kyambo kya mũvaka wa tene, Kĩla aaĩthe maku meekĩie." 
Proverbs22:29 Nũkwona mũndũ mũthingu wĩanĩ wake? Akaũngama mbee wa asumbĩ; Ndakaũngama mbee wa andũ mate na nguma. 
Proverbs23:1 Yĩla wĩĩkala nthĩ kũya na mũsumbĩki. Sũanĩa mũno ũla wĩ mbee waku; 
Proverbs23:2 Nokĩkĩa kavyũ mũmeonĩ waku, Ethĩwa wĩ mũndũ ũla wendaa kũya." 
Proverbs23:3 Ndũkende sya ũya syake nzeo; Nũndũ nĩ malĩu ma ũkengani. 
Proverbs23:4 Ndũkenosye wĩthĩwe mũthwii; Ekana na ũĩ waku mwene. 
Proverbs23:5 Ũkaketeea kĩla kĩte vo? Nũndũ vate ndĩi mothwii nĩmeseũvĩasya nthwau, Ta ndiũ ĩla ĩũlũkaa yelekele ĩtunĩ." 
Proverbs23:6 Ndũkaye lĩu wa ũla wĩ na itho ĩthũku, O na ndũkende sya ũya syake nzeo:" 
Proverbs23:7 Nũndũ, o tondũ ũsũanĩaa nthĩnĩ wake mwene, now’o ũilyĩ: Ekwĩa, Ya na nyw’a; Ĩndĩ ngoo yake ndĩ vamwe naku." 
Proverbs23:8 Kalungu kala waya ũkakatavĩka, Na kũsyasya ndeto syaku syĩ mũyo." 
Proverbs23:9 Ndũkaneene ndia ĩkĩw’a; Nũndũ ĩkavũthya ũĩ wa ndeto syaku. 
Proverbs23:10 Ndũkaakũĩĩsye kyambo kya mũvaka wa tene; Na ndũkalike mĩũndanĩ ya ala makw’ĩĩwe nĩ aaĩthe: 
Proverbs23:11 Nũndũ Mwovosya woo e na vinya; Akamatetanĩsya kwaku. 
Proverbs23:12 Nengane ngoo yaku ũmanyĩsyonĩ, Na matũ maku ndetonĩ sya ũmanyi." 
Proverbs23:13 Ndũkasiĩĩe ũkan’yo kwa kana; Nũndũ ethĩwa ũkakakũna na ndata, kaikakw’a." 
Proverbs23:14 Ũkakakũna na ndata, Na kũvonokya thayũ wako kaikalike Seoli." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwana wakwa, ethĩwa ngoo yaku nĩ mbũĩ, Ngoo yakwa ĩkatana, o ĩ yakwa:" 
Proverbs23:16 Ĩĩ, ngoo yakwa ĩkatana, Yĩla ilomo syaku ineenaa maũndũ ma w’o." 
Proverbs23:17 Ngoo yaku ndĩkamew’ĩe andũ athe kĩwĩu; Ĩndĩ ĩthĩwa ũkĩmũkĩa Yeova mũthenya w’onthe: 
Proverbs23:18 Nũndũ vate ndĩi kwĩ ĩtuvi; Na wĩkwatyo waku ndũkavetwa. 
Proverbs23:19 Ĩw’a we, mwana wakwa, na ĩthĩwa na ũĩ, Noitongoesya ngoo yaku nzĩanĩ." 
Proverbs23:20 Ndũkethĩwe katĩ wa anywi ma mbinyu Katĩ wa ayi ma nyama na ũtoonu: 
Proverbs23:21 Nũndũ mũnywi na mũyi makavika ũkyanĩ; Na kwombosya nĩkũmũvw’ĩkaa mũndũ matani. 
Proverbs23:22 Ĩthukĩĩsye au ũla wakũsyaie, Na ndũkavũthye mwenyu akũa." 
Proverbs23:23 Thooa w’o, na ndũkothoosye; Ĩĩ, ũĩ, na ũmanyĩsyo, na ũmanyi." 
Proverbs23:24 Ĩthe wa ũla mũlũngalu akatana mũno; Na ũla wĩsyaa kana koĩ akeethĩwa na ũtanu kwondũ wako. 
Proverbs23:25 Au na mwenyu methĩwe na mũyo, Na ũla wakũsyaie natane." 
Proverbs23:26 Mwana wakwa, nenga ngoo yaku; Na metho maku matanĩe nzĩa syakwa." 
Proverbs23:27 Nũndũ ĩlwaya nĩ mũtaũ mũliku; Na mũndũ mũka wa nthĩ ĩngĩ nĩ ĩima ĩtheke. 
Proverbs23:28 Ĩĩ, nĩwoveeasya ta mũvutani, Na kwingĩvya nzeleke katĩ wa andũ." 
Proverbs23:29 Nũũ wĩ na woo? Nũũ wĩ na kĩmako? Nũũ wĩ na ngananĩo? Nũũ wĩ na mũnyungunyĩsyo? Nũũ wĩ na mawũkite vate kĩtumi? Nũũ wĩ na metho matune? 
Proverbs23:30 Ala mekalaa ĩvinda ĩasa mainyw’a; Ala maendaa mamanthe mbinyu mbulan’ye. 
Proverbs23:31 Ndũkasisye mbinyu yĩla yatunĩva, Yĩla ĩtisatisĩaa kĩkombenĩ, Yĩla ĩnĩũmeleka nesa:" 
Proverbs23:32 Mũminũkĩlyo nĩũmanaa ta nzoka, Na kũtonya ta kĩmbuva." 
Proverbs23:33 Metho maku makoona maũndũ maeni, Na ngoo yaku ĩkaneena maũndũ ma ngũlũ." 
Proverbs23:34 Ĩĩ, ũkeethĩwa ta ũla ũkomaa ũkanganĩ katĩ, Kana ta ũla ũkomaa mũthyanĩ wa mũlingoti." 
Proverbs23:35 Ũkasya, Nĩmangũnĩte na ndyaaĩkwa ũndũ ũthũku; Nĩmangũnĩte, na ndyaaĩw’a ũndũ: Ngaamũka ĩndĩĩ? Ngamĩmantha ĩngĩ." 
Proverbs24:1 Ndũkamew’ĩe kĩwĩu andũ athũku; O na ndũkende kwĩthĩwa nao. 
Proverbs24:2 Nũndũ ngoo syoo nĩsũanĩaa kũthĩn’ya, Na ilomo syoo nineenaa ũndũ wa ũthũku." 
Proverbs24:3 Kwondũ wa ũĩ nyũmba nĩyakawa; Na kwondũ wa ũmanyi nĩlũmaw’a; 
Proverbs24:4 Na kwondũ wa ũĩ tũsũmba nĩtusũaw’a Mothwii onthe me vata mũno na ma kwendeesya. 
Proverbs24:5 Mũndũ mũĩ e na vinya; Ĩĩ, mũndũ wa ũmanyi nĩwingĩvasya ũtonyi." 
Proverbs24:6 Nũndũ kwondũ wa ũtongoi mũĩ ũkakwatya kaũ waku; Na wingĩnĩ wa atai kwĩ ũkĩlyo. 
Proverbs24:7 Ũĩ wĩ ĩũlũ mũno kũmĩvĩtũka ndia: Ndĩathamĩasya kanyw’a wayo mbingĩlonĩ. 
Proverbs24:8 Ũla ũsũanĩaa kwĩka ũthũku, Andũ makamwĩta mũkwatya wa ũthũku." 
Proverbs24:9 Ũsũanĩo wa ũtumanu nĩ naĩ; Na mũkaakaan’ya nĩ ũthatyo wa andũ. 
Proverbs24:10 Ethĩwa nũnyalaa mũthenya wa thĩna, Vinya waku nĩ mũnini." 
Proverbs24:11 Vonokya ala matwaawa kĩkw’ũnĩ, Na ala makilĩlye kũawa sĩsya kana ũmasiĩĩe." 
Proverbs24:12 Ethĩwa wĩasya, Sisya, tũtyaamanya ũu; Ũla ũthimaa ngoo ndasũanĩaa ũu? Na ũla ũsũvĩaa ngoo yaku, ndesĩ ũu? Na ndakamũĩva kĩla mũndũ kwĩanana na wĩa wake?" 
Proverbs24:13 Mwana wakwa, ya ũkĩ wa nzũkĩ, nũndũ nĩ mũseo; Na mavolotango ma ĩwa me mũyo ũkĩmasama:" 
Proverbs24:14 O ta ũu ũkamanya ũĩ ũilyĩ ũu kwa ngoo yaku; Ethĩwa nũwonete, nĩvo kũkethĩwa ĩtuvi, Na wĩkwatyo waku ndũkavetwa." 
Proverbs24:15 We mũndũ mũthũku ndũkoveesye ũtũo wa ũla mũlũngalu; Ndũkaanange vandũ vake va ũthũmũa: 
Proverbs24:16 Nũndũ mũndũ mũlũngalu nũvalũkaa mavinda mũonza, na kũkĩla ĩngĩ: Ĩndĩ ala athũku nĩmanangawa nĩ wanangĩko mũnene." 
Proverbs24:17 Ndũkatane yĩla mũmaitha waku ũvalũkaa, Na ngoo yaku ndĩkatane yĩla wanangĩkaa;" 
Proverbs24:18 Yeova ndakese kũwona, na ũkamwĩw’ĩthya woo, Na aithyũũa ũthilĩku wake ume kwake." 
Proverbs24:19 Ndũkenyamasye ũndũ wa eki ma ũthũku; O na ndũkamew’ĩe kĩwĩu ala athũku: 
Proverbs24:20 Nũndũ kũikethĩwa ĩtuvi ya mũndũ mũthũku; Taa wa ũla mũthũku ũkavow’a. 
Proverbs24:21 Mwana wakwa, mũkĩe Yeova o na mũsumbĩ; Na ndũkatindan’ye na ala maalyũkaa:" 
Proverbs24:22 Nũndũ wanangĩko woo mũnene ũkookĩla na kĩthũlũmũko; Na kwananga kwa asu elĩ, nũũ ũla ũkwĩsĩ?" 
Proverbs24:23 Ii nasyo nĩ ndeto sya ala oĩ. Kwendeesya andũ ũkĩsila ti kũseo. 
Proverbs24:24 Ũla ũtavasya ũla mũthũku, Wĩ mũlũngalu, Ngo sya andũ ikamũuma, mbaĩ ikamũthĩtha;" 
Proverbs24:25 Ĩndĩ ala mamũkanasya makeethĩwa atanu, Na ũathimo mũseo ũkamokĩa." 
Proverbs24:26 Nũmumunyaa ilomo Ũla ũsũngĩaa ũsũngĩo wa w’o. 
Proverbs24:27 Seũvya wĩa waku na ku nza, Wĩseũvĩsye mũũnda; Na ĩtina aka nyũmba yaku." 
Proverbs24:28 Ndũkamũkũsĩĩe mũtũi waku vate kĩtumi; Na ndũkakengane na ilomo syaku. 
Proverbs24:29 Ndũkasye, Ngamwĩka o tondũ ũmbĩkĩte; Ngamũĩva ũ mũndũ kwĩanana na wĩa wake." 
Proverbs24:30 Navĩtĩla ũtee wa mũũnda wa mũndũ mũtulu, Na mũũnda wa mĩsavivũ wa mũndũ ũtaĩ ũmanyi;" 
Proverbs24:31 Na, sisya, wausũĩte mĩw’a, Na weekunĩkĩlw’e nĩ syĩnyeelya, Na ũvai wa mavia waw’o waĩ mũvalũku." 
Proverbs24:32 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nasiisye, na kũsũanĩa nesa; Noona, na noosa ũmanyĩsyo:" 
Proverbs24:33 Too mũnini, kwombosya vanini, Kũkwatan’ya syaa vanini ũkome;" 
Proverbs24:34 O ta ũu ũkya waku ũkooka ta mũvutani, Na kwaĩwa kwaku ta mũndũ wĩkĩĩte mĩio ya kaũ." 
Proverbs25:1 Ii nasyo nĩ nthimo sya Solomoni, ila andũ ma Esekia mũsumbĩ wa Yũta meeyumĩĩĩsye." 
Proverbs25:2 Nĩ ũtaĩo wa Ngai kũvitha ũndũ; Ĩndĩ ũtaĩo wa asumbĩ nĩ kũmantha ũndũ. 
Proverbs25:3 O tondũ matunĩ kũtũlĩte, na nthĩ kũlikĩte, Now’o ngoo ya asumbĩ ndĩmanthĩka." 
Proverbs25:4 Umya makwaũ nthĩnĩ wa vetha, Na kũkaumĩla mũio kwondũ wa mũui waw’o;" 
Proverbs25:5 Umya ala athũku mbee wa mũsumbĩ, Na kĩvĩla kyake kya ũsumbĩ kĩkalũlũmĩlw’a ũlũngalunĩ." 
Proverbs25:6 Ndũkenenevye vala ve mũsumbĩ, Na ndũkaũngame vandũnĩ va andũ anene:" 
Proverbs25:7 Nũndũ nĩ kavaa ũkewa, Ambata vaa, Kwĩ kũtheeangw’a mũnene wĩ mbee ũsumbĩnĩ ene, Ũla metho maku mamwonete." 
Proverbs25:8 Ndũkaumaale mĩtũkĩ ũkatete, Ndũkese kũlea kũmanya wa kwĩka mũminũkĩlyonĩ waw’o, Yĩla mũtũi waku ũkũsonoketye." 
Proverbs25:9 Ĩoan’ye na mũtũi waku, Na ndũkavuan’ye nzama ya ũngĩ;" 
Proverbs25:10 Ũla ũmĩw’aa ndakese ũkũuma, Na nguma yaku nthũku ĩkĩlea kũvetwa." 
Proverbs25:11 Ndeto ĩneenawa ĩvinda yayo Nĩ ta mosyao ma mũevo ma thaavu kĩkavũnĩ kya vetha. 
Proverbs25:12 Ta ngome ya kũtũ ya thaavu, na wananake wa thaavu mũseo, Now’o kũilyĩ mũkan’ya mũĩ kũtũnĩ kũla kwĩw’aa." 
Proverbs25:13 Ta mbevo ya ĩa ĩvinda ya ngetha, Now’o ũilyĩ mũtũmwa wĩ kĩthito kwa ala mamũtũmaa; Nũndũ nũvuũkasya ngoo ya mavwana make." 
Proverbs25:14 Ta mathweo na kĩseve vate mbua, Now’o ũilyĩ ũla wĩkathĩĩaa na ũkengani kwondũ wa mĩthĩnzĩo yake." 
Proverbs25:15 Kwondũ wa kũmĩĩsya ĩvinda ĩasa mũsumbĩki nũtonya kũkikw’a, Na ũĩmĩ mwololo nũtũlaa ĩvĩndĩ." 
Proverbs25:16 Nĩwonete ũkĩ wa nzũkĩ? Ya ũla ũkwĩanĩe, Ndũkese kusũwa nĩw’o, noyũtavĩka." 
Proverbs25:17 Kũũ kwaku kũikethĩwe nyũmbanĩ ya mũtũi waku kaingĩ, Ndakese kũnow’a nue, na akĩkũmena." 
Proverbs25:18 Mũndũ ũla ũmũkũsĩĩa mũtũi wake ũvũngũ Nĩ kĩiva kya mũtĩ, na ũvyũ, na mũsyĩ mũĩ." 
Proverbs25:19 Uĩkĩĩi mũndũnĩ ũte kĩthito ĩvinda ya thĩna Nĩ ta ĩeo ĩtũlĩku, na kũũ kũkitũku." 
Proverbs25:20 O tondũ mũndũ ũla wumasya ngũa ĩvinda ya mbevo, na ta siki ĩũlũ wa ĩtai, Now’o ũilyĩ ũla winĩaa ngoo ngito mbathi." 
Proverbs25:21 Ethĩwa mũmaitha waku e na nzaa, mũnenge lĩu wa kũya; Na ethĩwa e na waũni, mũnenge manzĩ ma kũnyw’a:" 
Proverbs25:22 Nũndũ ũkamũmbĩĩa makaa ma mwaki mũtwenĩ wake, Na Yeova akakũĩva." 
Proverbs25:23 Kĩseve kyumĩte ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ nĩkĩetae mbua; Now’o ũĩmĩ wĩ nzuku ũetae ũthyũ mũthatu. 
Proverbs25:24 Nĩ kavaa kũtũa kĩkotonĩ kya nyũmba ĩũlũ, Kwĩ kũtũa na mũndũ mũka wĩ ĩteta nyũmbanĩ nthanthau." 
Proverbs25:25 Ta manzĩ mathithu kwa mũndũ wĩ waũni, Now’o ũilyĩ ũvoo mũseo wumĩte nthĩ yĩ kũasa." 
Proverbs25:26 Ta nthongo nthokoan’ye, na mbuluti mbukye, Now’o ũilyĩ mũndũ mũlũngalu ũla ũkusĩkaa nĩ ala athũku." 
Proverbs25:27 Ti ũseo kũya ũkĩ wa nzũkĩ mwingĩ; No ta ũu andũ kũmantha ndaĩa yoo ene nĩ ũthũku. 
Proverbs25:28 Ũla ũtasiĩĩaa veva wake Nĩ ta ndũa ĩla ĩomboetwe na ĩte na maũvai. 
Proverbs26:1 Ta ĩa ĩvinda ya syũa, na ta mbua ngethanĩ, O ta ũu ndaĩa ti mbaĩlu kwa ndia." 
Proverbs26:2 Ta mũthoonzwe kwanganganĩ kwaw’o, ta nthũngũlũlũ kũũlũkanĩ kwayo, Now’o kĩumo kĩte kĩtumi kĩtavũĩlaa." 
Proverbs26:3 Kĩvoko kwondũ wa mbalasi, mũkwa kwondũ wa mũtwe wa ĩng’oi, Na ndata kwondũ wa mũongo wa ndia." 
Proverbs26:4 Ndũkasũngĩe ndia kwĩanana na ũtumanu wayo, Ndũkese kwĩthĩwa tayo." 
Proverbs26:5 Sũngĩa ndia kwĩanana na ũtumanu wayo, Ndĩkese kwĩyona ta mbũĩ." 
Proverbs26:6 Ũla ũtũmaa ũvoo na kw’oko kwa ndia Nũtilaa maũũ make mwene, na kũnyw’a wasyo." 
Proverbs26:7 Maũũ ma ala mathuaa nĩmaseesangaa; Now’o ĩilyĩ ngelekan’yo kanyw’anĩ wa ndia. 
Proverbs26:8 Ta mũndũ ũla woveeaa ĩvia kĩkũthanĩ, Now’o ũilyĩ ũla ũnengae ndia ndaĩa." 
Proverbs26:9 Ta mwĩw’a ũla ũtonyaa kw’oko kwa mũthengi, Now’o kũilyĩ ngelekan’yo kanyw’anĩ wa ndia." 
Proverbs26:10 Ta mũndũ wa ũta ũla wũkitaa onthe, Now’o ũilyĩ ũla ũandĩkaa ndia na ũla ũandĩkaa avĩti." 
Proverbs26:11 Ta ngitĩ ĩla ĩalũkĩlaa matavĩka mayo, Now’o ĩilyĩ ndia ĩla yĩkaa ĩngĩ ũtumanu wayo." 
Proverbs26:12 Nũkwona mũndũ ũla wĩyonaa mwene ta mũĩ? Kavaa kwĩkwatya ndia kwĩ ũsu. 
Proverbs26:13 Ũla mũtulu easya, Ve mũnyambũ nzĩanĩ; Mũnyambũ wĩ nzĩanĩ nene." 
Proverbs26:14 O tondũ mũomo wĩalyũlĩlaa ikwatinĩ syaw’o, Now’o ũla mũtulu wĩkaa ũkomonĩ wake." 
Proverbs26:15 Ũla mũtulu nũindaa kw’oko kwake ĩsaaninĩ; Nĩ mĩnoo kwake kũkũete ĩngĩ kanyw’anĩ wake. 
Proverbs26:16 Ũla mũtulu nĩwĩyonaa ta mũĩ Kwĩ andũ mũonza ala matonya kwonan’ya kĩtumi. 
Proverbs26:17 Ũla ũvĩtaa, na kwĩnyamasya na ĩteta yĩte yake, Ailyĩ ũla ũkwataa ngitĩ matũ." 
Proverbs26:18 Ta mũndũ wa ndũũka ũla wĩkasya isinga, Na mĩsyĩ, na kĩkw’ũ," 
Proverbs26:19 Now’o mũndũ ũilyĩ ũla ũkengaa mũtũĩ wake, Na kwasya, Ndiũthaũka?" 
Proverbs26:20 Nũndũ kũte ngũ mwaki nũvoaa; Na vala vate ũla ũneenaa na kĩwe, ngananĩo nĩthelaa." 
Proverbs26:21 O tondũ makaa mailyĩ vala ve makaa makanu, na ngũ vala ve mwaki, Now’o ũilyĩ mũndũ wa ngananĩo ũndũ wa kwakan’ya ĩteta." 
Proverbs26:22 Ndeto sya ũla ũneenaa na kĩwe nĩ ta tũlungu tũseo twa lĩu, Na nĩtũlikaa nthĩnĩ ki." 
Proverbs26:23 Ilomo mbyũvu na ngoo nthũku Iilyĩ ta mũio wa yũmba ũvakĩtwe makwaũ ma vetha. 
Proverbs26:24 Ũla ũmenanaa evithanasya na ilomo syake; Ĩndĩ nĩwiaa ũkengani nthĩnĩ wake: 
Proverbs26:25 Yĩla ũnũũneena nesa, ndũkamwĩtĩkĩle; Nũndũ ve mothatyo mũonza ngoonĩ yake:" 
Proverbs26:26 O na ethĩwa kĩmena kyake nĩkĩkwĩvw’ĩka ũĩ wa ũkengani, Ũthũku wake ũkoonanw’a ũtheinĩ mbee wa ũmbano." 
Proverbs26:27 O ũla wĩnzaa ĩima akavalũka nthĩnĩ wayo; Na ũla ũvingilitasya ĩvia, yĩkasyoka ĩũlũ wake." 
Proverbs26:28 Ũĩmĩ ũla ũneenaa ũvũngũ nũmenaa ala wũkitĩte; Na kanyw’a wa kwendeesya na ndeto sya ũkathĩĩo nũomboaa. 
Proverbs27:1 Ndũkekathĩĩe ũndũ wa ũnĩ; Nũndũ ndwĩsĩ ũndũ mũthenya ũtonya kumĩlya. 
Proverbs27:2 Mũndũ ũngĩ nakũtaĩe, na ti kanyw’a waku mwene; Mũeni, na ti ilomo syaku mwene." 
Proverbs27:3 Ĩvia nĩ ĩito, na kĩthangathĩ nĩ kĩito; Ĩndĩ ũthatu wa ndia nĩ mũito kwĩ isu syelĩ." 
Proverbs27:4 Ũthilĩku nĩ mwai, na ũthatu nĩ mũkĩlu vyũ; Ĩndĩ nũũ ũtonya kũũngama mbee wa kĩwĩu?" 
Proverbs27:5 Kavaa ũkan’yo wĩ ũtheinĩ Kwĩ wendo ũvithĩtwe. 
Proverbs27:6 Mawũkite ma mũnyanya nĩ ma kĩthito; Ĩndĩ momumunyo ma mũmaitha nĩ maingĩ. 
Proverbs27:7 Mũndũ ũvũnĩte nũmenaa ĩwa; Ĩndĩ kwa mũndũ wĩ na nzaa kĩla kĩndũ kĩ ũũ kĩ mũyo. 
Proverbs27:8 Ta nyũnyi ĩla yangangaa ĩkĩtia ndala yayo, Now’o mũndũ ũilyĩ ũla wangangaa kuma vandũ vake." 
Proverbs27:9 Mauta na syĩndũ ila inyungaa nesa matanĩthasya ngoo, No ta ũu mũyo wa mũnyanyae wa mũndũ ũla wumaa ũtaonĩ wa ngoo." 
Proverbs27:10 Mũnyanyau waku mwene, na mũnyanyae wa au, ndũkamatie; Na ndũkaende nyũmbanĩ ya mwana‐amwenyu mũthenya wa wanangĩko waku mũnene: Kavaa mũtũi ũla wĩ vakuvĩ kwĩ mwana‐a‐inyia ũla wĩ kũasa." 
Proverbs27:11 Mwana wakwa, ĩthĩwa mũĩ, noitanĩthya ngoo yakwa, Nĩ kana nĩmũsũngĩe ũla ũmbũthasya." 
Proverbs27:12 Mũndũ wĩ kĩlĩko nĩwonaa ũthũku na kwĩvitha; Ĩndĩ ala mate ũmanyi nĩmaendeeaa na kũthĩna. 
Proverbs27:13 Osa ngũa yake ũla mũĩkĩĩthya kwondũ wa mũeni; Noimwĩkalya ethĩwe ngwatĩlĩlyo ũla mũĩkĩĩthya kwondũ wa mũndũ mũka wa nthĩ ĩngĩ. 
Proverbs27:14 Ũla ũathimaa mũnyanyae wake na wasya mũnene, akyũkĩla kĩoko tene, Ũndũ ũsu ũkatalwa kwake nĩ kĩumo." 
Proverbs27:15 Kũvolotanga ĩvinda yonthe mũthenya wa mbua nyingĩ Na mũndũ mũka ũla ũtetanasya nĩ ũndũ ũmwe: 
Proverbs27:16 Ũla ũkenda kũmũsiĩĩa asiĩĩaa kĩseve; Na kw’oko kwake kwa aũme nĩkwakwata mauta. 
Proverbs27:17 Kĩaa nĩkĩnoaa kĩaa; O ta ũu mũndũ nũnoaa ũthyũ wa mũnyanyae. 
Proverbs27:18 O ũla ũsũvĩaa mũkũyũ akaya ũsyao waw’o; Na ũla ũtaĩaa vwana wake akataĩwa. 
Proverbs27:19 O tondũ kũilyĩ manzĩnĩ ũthyũ nĩwelekelaa ũthyũ, Now’o ngoo ya mũndũ kwa mũndũ." 
Proverbs27:20 Seoli na Avatoni kũtikolaa nongi; Na metho ma mũndũ matikolaa nongi. 
Proverbs27:21 Mbisũ ya ũthesya nĩ kwondũ wa vetha, na iko ĩnene kwondũ wa thaavu; Na mũndũ nũtatawa nĩ kũtaĩwa kwake." 
Proverbs27:22 O na ethĩwa ũkakimĩa ndia ndĩĩnĩ na mũthi vamwe na nganũ mbũe, Ũtumanu wayo ndũkauma nthĩnĩ wayo." 
Proverbs27:23 Ĩthĩwa na kĩthito ũndũ wa kũmanya ũndũ ndĩthya syaku sya mbũi na malondu iilyĩ, Noisisya nesa ũndũ wa ndĩthya syaku sya ng’ombe:" 
Proverbs27:24 Nũndũ ũthwii ti wa tene na tene; Na ngovia ya ũsumbĩ nĩyĩkalaa mosyaanĩonĩ onthe? 
Proverbs27:25 Nyeki nyũmũ nikuĩtwe, na nyeki nziũ nithandĩkangĩte, Na nyũnyi sya iĩmanĩ nĩsyũmbanĩtw’e nthĩnĩ." 
Proverbs27:26 Tũtena twa malondu nĩ kwondũ wa ngũa syaku, Na mbũi nĩ sya kũthooa mũũnda;" 
Proverbs27:27 Na kũkeethĩwa ĩia ya mbũi yĩanĩe lĩu waku, na lĩu wa andũ ma nyũmba yaku, Na lĩu wa athũkũmi maku eĩtu." 
Proverbs28:1 Ala athũku nĩmakĩaa yĩla vate mũndũ ũmaatĩĩe; Ĩndĩ ala alũngalu nĩ ngũmbaũ ta mũnyambũ. 
Proverbs28:2 Kwondũ wa ĩvĩtyo ya nthĩ anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ nĩ aingĩ; Ĩndĩ kwondũ wa andũ me ũmanyi na ũĩ nĩendeeaa kwĩkala. 
Proverbs28:3 Mũndũ mũthĩni ũla ũthĩnasya ngya Nĩ ta mbua ĩtwaĩthasya ĩla ĩtatiaa lĩu o na wĩva. 
Proverbs28:4 Ala matiaa mĩao mataĩaa ala athũku; Ĩndĩ ala makwataa mĩao makananĩaa nao.
